[{"Name":"Cameron Aljilani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKGvd7t6Ro1_LCzbT_z5DELQDSpw61Cv24Gw369DpXTcHutpA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a great location to have breakfast or lunch and view the La Jolla shore, surfers, and ocean.  These can be a LONG line.  In order to get a table you need to order first and get a number.  This keeps people from camping on tables while the rest of the party waits in line.  To go orders are faster and there are plenty of places to sit downstairs or near the beach with having to wait for a table.  Definitely put his on your list of places to visit in La Jolla but be prepared for a wait.  Also, plthe parking lot is limited to UCSD students and faculty during school hours.  Pay attention to parking signs.  ParkMobile app is used when public parking is permitted.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAbHST1EXtjIf5jgRdR_MJY&fid=0x0:0x4b71cff3f0ce7ad"],"When":"2025-11-30"},{"Name":"Ritz Bitz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWr6UENZg0cxGhN1U87AuSbn2HENPBqLKGdifAqUP79pqcCUbQE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a wonderful lunch at Caroline's. With a gorgeous view of the ocean, the food tasted even better. I had for myself the beef rib (under eggs section). It was so delicious and tender. I would have it again! Service was very professional and much appreciated too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCGwN9z-3J5bSnod6pAgKUQ&fid=0x0:0x4b71cff3f0ce7ad"],"When":"2025-12-1"},{"Name":"Kathryn Toma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXfqA5AEsO_CsBlEVexjWyDiexEU6DPrFDUceoTDWVVVg7Em2WNxQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing atmosphere overlooking La Jolla and tasty brunch. Highly recommend beef short rib + eggs - very flavorful. Great day date with sharing decadent carrots cake and perfect temperature flat white. Will be returning (closed for Dec 15- mid January) so glad we stopped in before the hiatus.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBg_6we2ZuIezfW6j9Av1ii&fid=0x0:0x4b71cff3f0ce7ad"],"When":"2025-12-15"},{"Name":"Frank C.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMkVsbVGyyxa8ALmC7yHlFSnes_18RlcB25rPuNQdL57dL324W=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time here. It is a very popular place. Arrive early. The food was amazing as well as the view. We went on a Saturday arrived at noon. The staff were very helpful and also helped with holding a table for us while ordering our food. Great staff on site.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBFyjfWap7nzofrlElkpAnq&fid=0x0:0x4b71cff3f0ce7ad"],"When":"2025-10-13"},{"Name":"Emily Seaver","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXWQZLfi0mV7h8njt-F6n3-miguxnJ7rwkprLfQMpcEX-AWO2V9=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This place is lovely! Lots of seating, with beachside views, very casual environment and laid-back. The food is great, coffee was ok. They don’t allow studying with computers or books. Parking is very hard to find. Otherwise it’s a great place to grab a meal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCXWsi58WIHdXWDstx7I7NT&fid=0x0:0x4b71cff3f0ce7ad"],"When":"2026-1-1"},{"Name":"Oscar Gomez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWM9kQnmpTnOqWM9eQW3ZpkQSwusw2GkYa1b3guz7ckSMTp2ydv=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Im local to San Diego and I always walk my dogs in this area. and always said that I'll stop by to get a coffee from this spot. So I did stop by and ordered coffee.  As I received my cup and went to look for a seat , 1 minute later I was approached  by a manager and she started that all tables and seat are for customers that purchase food only.

I really felt so unappreciated. As a customer because I just bought something from thier menu. She gave us a minute . So we left right away.

I was treated unfair and I was treated wrongly. Just for that I will not be returning. I will also send a letter to the school (UCSD) property owner for this unfair treatment.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAPK481q2J0of8PXHqm0WlS&fid=0x0:0x4b71cff3f0ce7ad"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"Rocio B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6X5PObjez4GnLjyPspCwkmNkeFuKy0ZNhlJvbMdTwHYE0704=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"probably the best view of La Jolla shores from any restaurant near by, paired with great and friendly service, and fresh delicious food, its absolutely worth the live and even the parking adventure.
(nothing to do with the restaurant, La Jolla is just hard to find parking after 9 am) so go early and watch the surfers and dolphins while enjoying fine coffee and your choice of breakfast.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBB-y9dZ0Cqdbd-5lZW2r_Q&fid=0x0:0x4b71cff3f0ce7ad"],"When":"2025-9-15"},{"Name":"Marette Flora","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX8mw_3R6Adfe3GaGQyrYwNIV3wir5VfehVkA1ijly5EqV2-ZS7og=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We lucked out by getting a table next to the glass with a view. All the tables had been full. The potatoes and vegetarian omelet were good. The eggs were a bit softer than I like. The sourdough was tasty. The iced Chai was also delicious.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC7nUp1nmgs5QSdoUcHLUc9&fid=0x0:0x4b71cff3f0ce7ad"],"When":"2025-8-8"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Ellen Scheumann","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV3MLG0a8wuSzo21vz2LhhTfi0ybmK1LPLYZsMUFhtaQyu69mjv=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Shore Rider Bar was the perfect spot to celebrate our son’s 18th birthday after an evening swim! The food was absolutely amazing—fresh, flavorful, and a total hit with our group. Even though we arrived late, our server was incredibly friendly and attentive, kindly letting us know the kitchen was closing soon while ensuring we had plenty of time to order. The service and atmosphere made the night extra special. Highly recommend this place for delicious eats and great vibes!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCFnqbfZXVwMcvT6gKXGF9q&fid=0x0:0xb1c3d8265fc4f525"],"When":"2025-8-26"},{"Name":"Wilfred Jeremiah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpT7WpCp8l1R5PiHcTTTw55O-oCoUcHgfjkZt6zTrXE9PxXEYj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There used to be a burger, tater tots, and beer here, but they were delicious so I eated them right up.
Friendly laid back attitude with extra beachy vibes.
Great place to pull up and watch the game with sand still between your toes. Wide selection of local brews, and well made fare. Cozy, tasty, friendly as can be. Great place to bring your squad for a good time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDEh-BG2hD0ZR71qhvYyJUA&fid=0x0:0xb1c3d8265fc4f525"],"When":"2025-11-13"},{"Name":"Alma Rosa Reed","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVmdi4b7BLegUlWFSxSRN7oji-VOjg-7HoK9drtlvYW4cTZYFL_w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Had lunch with family here. I really wanted to give them more stars because I was enjoying the kale salad with chicken but there was a hair in it and it completely ruined my appetite. Brownie points for them because they didn’t charge me for it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDZYmvj__MYYPjnsteGheRN&fid=0x0:0xb1c3d8265fc4f525"],"When":"2025-9-3"},{"Name":"Angela C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVq9EId3pCpyX0vLO7vdcu-RgCzWlCh259eYNzytWIa2yDTpfeQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"We popped into Shore Rider on a whim after a beach day, and it turned out to be a great choice! It was busy, but the space is large and open, so it didn’t feel overwhelming. We ordered the fish tacos and chips with guacamole, and everything was fresh, flavorful, and came out fairly quickly despite the crowd. Our margaritas took a bit longer to arrive, but the bar was definitely slammed as there was a Padres game on, so that could have been part of it. What really stood out to me was how family- and dog-friendly the place is. It’s clean, casual, and perfect if you’re out with a group or want to bring the kiddos or pups along. They also had a solid beer selection for those who prefer brews over cocktails. Great place to kick back and enjoy a casual, coastal evening.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB0vtXFSnL8dg-hKFH-nQYI&fid=0x0:0xb1c3d8265fc4f525"],"When":"2025-7-17"},{"Name":"Ericka C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI5xa58ST6GLOEFN-nQ6ioDy036YMGcEwwxm5MljjOE6O7V1aI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We got a bite and a drink here before our kayak tour- it was a great beachy vibe, delicious tacos, and a good margarita! The place was huge and wasn’t too busy on a Saturday afternoon. Nathan helped us out at the bar and he was really nice. We ended up doing fish tacos and shrimp tacos. Both were so good! The fish tacos were a nice chunk of fish and are not to be missed.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEMChleKa0um4HQ&fid=0x0:0xb1c3d8265fc4f525"],"When":"2025-6-9"},{"Name":"Jessica C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI6H-qkK_Xus0_TOCYJ5pb6p91CjuH6PLsgYZz3TV_I_dai=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is one of my new go to places in San Diego! We went here for dinner and got the rice bowl and the poke bowl! Both were so good we had to go back another time before leaving at the end of our vacation. Their lemonades are great as well!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAMvHknncZ8YJS6wBrD9HHv&fid=0x0:0xb1c3d8265fc4f525"],"When":"2025-9-15"},{"Name":"Beullah Escalante","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVktHCnUFEwERAQA5iVleCAEtFivAaM_5BFe5i6SqNNLBn-uQPJzQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great service and vibe.

10/10 Drinks: great, delicious margaritas plus, they have some variety with the mocktails.

3/10 Starter: we got the Brussel sprouts. It wasn't crispy, cold, too much going on flavor wise. Probably not in season.

Food:

I got the poke bowl, hawaiian style/
ahi. And it doesn't taste like oahu hawaiian style poke you can get at foodland or onos but it was good enough. Rice was def cali portion and it comes with some side chips. (Please see photos)

My got the shrimp, carne asada, and first tacos.
He states the best one is the carme asada, while the fish and shrimp were tied.

The tacos were socal style surfer tacos and nothing at all like the kind you get from a downtown or SD street style tacos.

Vibes: very beachy and touristy. Can be fun with groups and family friendly. They have indoor and outdoor seating.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDI37_PMw&fid=0x0:0xb1c3d8265fc4f525"],"When":"2025-4-14"},{"Name":"Sushil P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWfVYIXcZkr6daBNpXM176puWvBIaQmPJVosSUlyKVNmvS4LYu4bw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Shorerider sits in a cute, well-lit stretch of La Jolla, surrounded by a lively cluster of restaurants—perfect for a casual evening out.

The menu had good variety, and the mezcal-based drink was excellent. Definitely one of the highlights.

Tacos were solid, though I wish the salsa had more depth. The chicken quesadilla was also tasty—not overly cheesy, which worked well.

Service wasn’t bad—understandable given how busy it was—but it did feel a bit stretched at times.

One thing to note: even though the place is listed as open till 10 PM, the kitchen stopped taking orders by 9 PM, which was a bit of a letdown.

Overall, good food, great drinks, and a lively vibe. A solid 4-star experience—just make sure to get there earlier if you’re planning a late dinner!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhApF_5z0wAh6qtaz1afeBuS&fid=0x0:0xb1c3d8265fc4f525"],"When":"2025-6-18"}]

[{"Name":"Brandon Nolte","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtoI3lwUCA8iBkLYqFo-PJFi8nZL1hASn6zauNOtNn1h7iNciedg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The sunset views over La Jolla Shores are beautiful, and the staff was genuinely kind and welcoming, which made the visit worthwhile. The food, however, was fairly average. The ceviche tasted a bit plain, and the soup could have used more acidity and some added texture to bring it to life. Portions were generous, but the flavors didn’t quite match the setting.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAsq2yNhtl_0Z2UF0-Ue6QM&fid=0x0:0x5fccc6433e71bfbb"],"When":"2026-1-11"},{"Name":"Steven Ellison","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgm2rhMx1vVtkcb2q0QinNjOilo4SWZa7bzPlYJDG-9YIrKN-xqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"They have a dog friendly patio, which we had never realized. The patio was right on the beach, which was really cool! We were surprised at how many dogs were on the patio. The service is always top notch. The menu has slowly been going downhill, it used to be much fancier fare but it's slowly going simpler and cheaper. That's fine for attracting more customers, but it feels like such a fancy place to eat that they should still have a lot more higher end items on their menu. The food itself is fine, it's good but I've never felt wowed by it. They validate parking, which is important if you're going on a busy beach day.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCu4x1HLxzve7do_29JM5uC&fid=0x0:0x5fccc6433e71bfbb"],"When":"2025-9-12"},{"Name":"Andrew Deluise","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtTsoT63PKuwGhSFjdSI5UXiAas8AnT9GiHbcsB_ZLpiIB-hph=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"🌊 Beachfront Bliss Awaits! 🍸🧉🍻🍷🥂

Looking for the perfect spot to relax by the waves? This restaurant offers an unbeatable beachfront location where you can enjoy a snack, lunch, or dinner with stunning ocean views.

✨ Why you’ll love it:

Immaculate service that goes above and beyond.

Delicious dishes crafted with care.

Cozy vibes—even on brisk nights (thanks to those heat lamps!).

I started with the mussels appetizer—a rich tomato mussel broth paired with warm garlic bread. Absolutely divine! 🍞🦪
To complement it, I sipped on their house Pinot Grigio, which was crisp and refreshing.

If you’re craving great food, amazing drinks, and a relaxing seaside experience, this is the place to be. 🌅","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC1kpigGgDXyX1vFkOHJPc7&fid=0x0:0x5fccc6433e71bfbb"],"When":"2025-10-29"},{"Name":"Esther Jou","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWMVyF5wt6GqUJiD03NhBLa9pMHY_dVdo195k-DtUorQz1XifPXHw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The restaurant is located inside the hotel, has a beach front view with inside and outdoor seating facing the beach and ocean. We went on Saturday morning around 11am and there wasn’t a wait for tables. The food took about 15 minutes to come out, tasted not bad, but also not amazing. Standard American brunch food - omelette and turkey sandwich (the sweet potato fries tasted off). Server was great, really friendly and attentive! Would come back for the vibes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDASbZUxJSjIwXo7Dt0fums&fid=0x0:0x5fccc6433e71bfbb"],"When":"2025-7-8"},{"Name":"The Calm one","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXGFdrg_jxwLTraOfcIrgn3HLajC0aFs08VW5z54mSCYiluhLLv=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had come here for the Easter Brunch. It was decent. Great Ahi poke,Prime Rib,salmon, crab legs, shrimp,chicken with spinach and mushroom, root vegetable, omelet station, salad, fruit, cookies. Total per person after tip and tax $125. I should have taken more photos but I was to busy eating pounds of Ahi and prime Rib. Service was great and the view is perfection","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDoxMLA3gE&fid=0x0:0x5fccc6433e71bfbb"],"When":"2025-4-22"},{"Name":"Maria Mnatsakanova","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvXbwttzyydYB06fa8wV9HX-aAoYsibNJz1nzDLykVyyDfSmr3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve had breakfast, lunch, and dinner at The Shores, and every time, it’s been a great experience. The food is always delicious, and I never skip the ceviche - it’s a must.

But for me, it’s never just about the food. I love places where all my senses are engaged: the ambiance, warmth, service, and of course, the views.

The Shores is part of a hotel, and while the hotel isn’t the newest, the restaurant is well-maintained, welcoming, and beautifully set up. The staff is always friendly, the dishes are colorful and beautifully presented, and the whole space just feels good.

The view is phenomenal. My favorite spot is in the arch booth by the bar, looking out through the arched windows to the ocean. Any time of day, it’s beautiful, but for sunset, book in advance. Also, very kid-friendly, which makes it even better.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCQ1qivvgE&fid=0x0:0x5fccc6433e71bfbb"],"When":"2025-3-4"},{"Name":"Jason Harris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX07JenIwnRNWREuEseQBt7lHS7zq8lAcH8IlSKpWd4NWAiR-g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"located at the Shores hotel, very quaint, reasonably priced lunch menu. sit indoor or outdoor and people watching along the boardwalk. the yellowtail tacos 🌮 were filling, but their sweet potato fries were yummy 😋","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB98kPjDBB3j6pCYOfjRKZA&fid=0x0:0x5fccc6433e71bfbb"],"When":"2025-7-17"},{"Name":"Omid Armani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUrUkcCz6ajAJJDjoi9stPVFviVXyVuYMaSlzMeieqRNiWBvIxd=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"We chose this restaurant primarily for the waterfront view and made a reservation in advance for outdoor seating for a party of seven. We arrived on time, but were seated indoors, far from any windows. When I mentioned that our reservation was specifically for outdoor seating, the host told us they don’t have outdoor seating available for a party of seven. I then pointed out a large empty patio table with eight seats, but was told the table was “closed” and that the manager had confirmed it wouldn’t be used. We reluctantly sat inside. Not long after, we watched another party the same size as ours get seated at that exact table.

The food was okay but portions were very small for the price. Nothing terrible, but not in line with the prices.

I’m giving this place 3 stars mainly for the potential of the view—assuming you’re actually able to secure a window or patio table.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Mike Sperando","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW_en4hstmxQlXEez9ODYd4-J_QV5-fzf9jhq4e4RBikF-eflXL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently visited George’s at the Cove in La Jolla and had a great experience overall. The location is absolutely stunning, offering beautiful ocean views right from your table, especially if you manage to get a window seat as I did.

I booked my reservation on the same morning around 8 or 9 a.m. and was surprised to find availability for a 12:45 p.m. lunch. Although there was some construction noise on the top deck, the staff accommodated my request to sit by the window and enjoy the view.

The food itself was great; I started with the salmon tartare and had rockfish tacos for lunch. The service was good- and the overall atmosphere was very enjoyable. I’d definitely recommend George’s at the Cove to anyone visiting La Jolla for the first time who’s looking for a great meal with a fantastic coastal view.

For those concerned about local wildlife smells, I personally didn’t notice any issue with sea lions during my visit, so it was a non-factor. Overall, a great spot for lunch with a view.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBYAfYqwQN4igucbQcQzc-F&fid=0x0:0xfc6e0e0f7901c1bc"],"When":"2025-12-16"},{"Name":"Haylee Jane Monteiro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4F6GmFKEiNWrzo0vPgBuUR_Cl9LqyfsnuPuZFB3oLMLipcJNuMQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I would give them 6 stars if I could!

Came here for our wedding anniversary dinner and they definitely made it very special. They knew it was our anniversary so they upgraded us to the terrace seating and even brought champagne on the house.

Servers were quite nice and prompt to check on us, asking if we needed anything and if the food was good. General manager also came and stopped by our table twice and was quite a gem to talk to.

Portobello Mushroom - just wow!
I was not expecting to have loved this so much! Mushroom cap was perfect and went so well together with that Thai sauce and those shishito peppers! And oh gosh, even those cashews on the side had some flavor of their own. What a lovely combination here!

Salad - could be better.
Really love the concept of the pair and the blue cheese and the hazelnut, but that cabbage was actually quite a lot in volume and a bit too wrong and crunchy and some pieces were also fairly bitter. I think if the base was mostly mixed greens with a little bit of cabbage, this with salad would have been next level!

Chicken - 10/10
What an absolutely beautiful dish! That chicken was cooked so so so perfectly soft and there was that avocado salsa on the side and that creamed corn and the squash. And oh my goodness me!  Have everything together and one bite and it's a burst of flavor and texture in your mouth and it was just so so good! 🤌🏻
Only downside is that the piece of chicken was quite small like I think it was a quarter chicken instead of a half chicken like we were expecting.

Side of Grilled Chicken
Order this because there was two little chicken in the entree. Chicken was quite generally cooked and quite a large piece of chicken breast which actually also came on some pasta so they don't serve it plain. Very nice gesture. The pasta itself was extremely oily though, so we didn't really have any of it.

Banana Sticky Toffee dessert - speechless!
Everything was just beautiful on this plate. Really really soft sticky toffee pudding and then the bananas on top had that caramelized crispness on top like you get on a creme brulee. That ice cream had a lovely flavor of its own and then there was the sesame crisp thing and the little crunch on the side.. just wow!

Definitely recommend this place for a good date night!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDVCg2aw-JcMRMQXupo46LJ&fid=0x0:0xfc6e0e0f7901c1bc"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"Nicholas Stevenson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWJrSguNnpCfdIWFghfqGKzaxpD_fRkOcIfNCvO9FYJhrU9h-DU6g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you want to enjoy a delicious meal overlooking an absolutely stunning ocean view then make a reservation at George’s at the Cove

We were lucky to snag a table just at the edge of the upstairs balcony,  but to be honest, when you’re up there, there really isn’t a bad seat. Even aside from the incredible views, the rooftop restaurant offered a solid ambiance/vibe. The decor, fixtures, bar, etc were all trendy and clean

The staff were great. We didn’t have to wait long to be seated, we ordered almost immediately, and our food came out in a timely manner. We also sat and enjoyed the views and conversation a bit after we finished eating, and our server came by to check on us but we never felt pressured to leave

The menu offers something for everything. We shared the rock fish tacos and their burger. Both were hearty and very flavorful. I would also recommend the chips and guacamole/salsa. I didn’t love the salsa flavor, but the guacamole was solid

Some tips:
Definitely consider making a reservation and ask if you can request a table that overlooks the water. There is only street parking and garage parking. We circled around a few times before parking at the nearby parking garage. But be warned, it’s $30 to park there. But after you eat, walk down to the cost and explore the La Jolla cove, the sea caves, see the seals, and explore some of the parks along this scenic stretch of coastline

Cheers!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDzl-UaFs3DFOABOC7pDBqs&fid=0x0:0xfc6e0e0f7901c1bc"],"When":"2025-9-1"},{"Name":"Jie-Wei Wu (Jie-Wei Wu)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVqHzyCZHsz6RNqctg3MItuo2jkA9zF8fXrnXTlwfQMFcFnOkrG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The service was good and the staff was friendly. However the $44 flat iron was a disappointment. It was not tender and even bitter because of overcooked and black surface. The $38 pork was also a bit salty. The taco was good though. Overr food quality did not meet my expectations of a high end restaurant with good sea view.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhArruUJDn_P2xzuC5jwNHQE&fid=0x0:0xfc6e0e0f7901c1bc"],"When":"2025-12-8"},{"Name":"Ella Park","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW46ztq2Pc89_-r0lUZl0DZb6lxuMIr5KvodvjiWy8U_ZCtKkBQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I’m not a local from San Diego. The two times I visited this place, everything was underwhelming from service to food.

1. Food - Salmon from the main entree, is not properly seasoned. I guess it is cooked thoroughly, but I am not tasting any seasoning other than bland potatoes and some dill. $38 for mediocre food is just really not worth it.

2. Additional Service fee of 5% is just unacceptable. I’m not sure why some restaurants in San Diego charge 5% of your total bill.

3. Views are great.

4. Please locals drop some good food recommendations. I’m so tired of bad restaurants in San Diego.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC_uxWv9ujIdUAd1t8wibmG&fid=0x0:0xfc6e0e0f7901c1bc"],"When":"2026-1-30"},{"Name":"rohan tibrewala","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIi4YamSdkMJWyclDIjWe7qeyn2gO5fa8BBvEXpGMzovr0rgQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Go for the view, food maybe!
They have the right combinations, right ideas however food sometimes felt like it missed the mark. Cocktails are decent. I would recommend the spicy pina margaritas and you cannot go wrong with the watermelon feta salad.
Optimally priced for California standards.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDx6nIFRXUtWs2FDVNzIIvg&fid=0x0:0xfc6e0e0f7901c1bc"],"When":"2025-8-30"},{"Name":"Cheryl Fordham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUto-VERm9qOatuGJ70CDzLK7OCXLg-U95AXjN5n5VZmwYe_7kz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Always enjoying George’s and this time was great as well. We always order the Famous Soup. Cocktails were wonderful and chocolate desert was fantastic. View doesn’t disappoint. However, the city really needs to clean the pelican droppings from the cliffs below, the smell is out of control. Thank goodness the wind changed before our food arrived.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCQ44SkLUgYI5_kdF_Mcw5r&fid=0x0:0xfc6e0e0f7901c1bc"],"When":"2025-9-16"},{"Name":"Maria","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWdI46QxRb819KpNeubsmPxZGVMusDXXyba7Ciq8srMG3NY6n9pbg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing view of the beautiful ocean and what a sunset!!! The option to dine out is perfect! Bring a coat but their heat appliances are good.
The food is delicious. I had of course the meat it was so tender, filling and well cooked.
Creme brulee did not disappoint plus that side cookie...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA_tA3bfamLLrXdM2ymbcXL&fid=0x0:0xfc6e0e0f7901c1bc"],"When":"2025-10-9"}]

[{"Name":"Bob Gregitis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWharWlwS-4EnbyAGGr7cJGN6lUoRMhrUAgEJXBr-tYRgX3d4dC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We stopped here for a late lunch, it’s a very relaxed vibe with lots of tables or a bar to sit at, it also has some tables on the street.

A great selection of beers and there is so much to choose from on the menu. Service was excellent and very attentive.

Vegetarian options were good for my wife and daughter on the menu as well. My wife had the mac & cheese, I had the steak which was cooked perfectly. My son had a hotdog which he said was the best he’s had so far.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB7sZHquv7Qx11hiDkFq26x&fid=0x0:0x4c8f254d035741d6"],"When":"2025-7-16"},{"Name":"Alexandra Guay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXoiAjKXzCOwE00Wdv3zrSpuEmEaZdBM1YKIo_0NaGL1nksUzZw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great vibes all around and the service was excellent! Would definitely come again! [{"Name":"Felicity","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI2p0Le-PMxO5_1GXj3OMalG02p3VFpXnWX7rbNEIG07s_X_7Mc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were here for restaurant week, and we left with bellies full of yummy food. Good vibes, nice ocean view, outdoor seating with heated lamps. Food was amazing and I highly recommend the ahi poke tacos. It was very delicious and fresh. We also ordered a fish entree. Mac and cheese was a bit watery but the breaded fish was cooked to perfection. Now.... The dessert. THE DESSERT!! This pie was the highlight of my day. 10/10 will come back again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAeXKK__o0G5DeYlXgLTLjA&fid=0x0:0x8586c50eac92a120"],"When":"2026-1-30"},{"Name":"Maura B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWdJHSbFY6h1tCGGzHjmwr1_uWRQHbUi9KVf-M2cp3hzObKMdCf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Duke’s La Jolla — A Truly Memorable Dining Experience

Duke’s La Jolla is exceptional in every way — delicious food, a beautiful atmosphere, and a level of hospitality that stays with you long after you leave. Every dish was fresh, flavorful, and prepared with real care, making the meal feel both comforting and elevated.

What made the experience truly stand out was the outstanding service. The entire team was warm and attentive, but I especially want to recognize Will Landry, Special Events Coordinator, whose professionalism and kindness made the evening unforgettable. His gracious hospitality and genuine care for guests set the tone for an experience that felt personal and incredibly welcoming.

From the ocean view ambiance to the thoughtfully prepared dishes and exceptional staff, Duke’s is the perfect place to enjoy a beautiful meal in La Jolla. Highly recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCZCcAYN1kuftfMBJ2Odmvw&fid=0x0:0x8586c50eac92a120"],"When":"2025-12-1"},{"Name":"Samantha Mimi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKqdTilwO0RcRv0hvCaQsV6qT5eUWOBvDKPqXcki7uuJvkk5A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Dukes is a classic Hawaiian-fusion restaurant chain found among the coast in Southern California. It’s a great place for groups, which is the only time I go. Dukes is one of my family’s to-go restaurants. The food is really standard (like Hawaiian Cheesecake Factory) but it has a fantastic view! Definitely worth a visit, especially for those coming from out of town. Aloha!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCxGI6P3lbnXgMzCwURvMBx&fid=0x0:0x8586c50eac92a120"],"When":"2025-12-9"},{"Name":"Bobby Bautista","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLY6r7c2l_7vMwXvxV4tyVSccb3IVGmTa0ceRrpD4SPVEd3yg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We stopped by Duke’s La Jolla on our way back to Los Angeles after visiting the La Jolla Cove, and it turned out to be one of the highlights of the trip. It happened to be Restaurant Week, so we took advantage of their specials—and wow, the food was fantastic. The poke tacos especially stood out, fresh and full of flavor.

We sat in the back overlooking the ocean and mountains, and the view alone was worth the stop calm, scenic, and relaxing. The staff were friendly, attentive, and our server went above and beyond to make sure everything was perfect.

If you’re in La Jolla Cove, I definitely recommend stopping here. Great food, amazing views, and a welcoming atmosphere make Duke’s a must-visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCm6AB7MEWlhya7ngUCvXGC&fid=0x0:0x8586c50eac92a120"],"When":"2025-9-20"},{"Name":"Vera Quill","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJBjg7P12NrSR9EGk5oSuanWq0MjgDW0anIi_1QbxIPD6gs1LM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We came here on a recommendation for the views and the food—and both delivered beautifully. The service was warm and attentive, the non-alcoholic mixed drinks were refreshingly delicious, and the food was just as satisfying. We especially enjoyed learning about Duke’s history and its impact on the local community—it added a meaningful layer to the experience. A memorable visit all around!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDyXK21g4s6cv37hVssiqc6&fid=0x0:0x8586c50eac92a120"],"When":"2025-10-2"},{"Name":"Curtis Grace","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFAzM7t7amv9oMP6UiIyzCOFs51UxxNXpefzjMioVDl5_SYKPt_g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Found Duke’s online and had to try it while in La Jolla for surgery at UCSD. It was the perfect celebratory dinner. Great table with a sunset view, and our server was incredibly sweet with excellent recommendations.

The coconut shrimp and mac nut herb-crusted fresh fish were delicious, and the rice pilaf was perfect. Finished with key lime pie and an after-dinner cocktail at the bar. Wonderful food, great service, and an all-around fantastic experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDR2BG9sml0MhHIaCzlKUru&fid=0x0:0x8586c50eac92a120"],"When":"2026-1-26"},{"Name":"Brad Newton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWmp5AA-zKlcgFiYEt3MGI6UUp19ij-orImzN-LSIk2KIEtxsVP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really cool spot with great outdoor seating. Our server was awesome and the food was incredible. My wife's filet came out over done, but the quickly got her a new steak, comped the filet, and  offered free dessert as an apology. One of the sides for the steak is a creamed corn, and it was the best corn my wife and I have ever had.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDrf1gEx9sXUWmuisT6BP3y&fid=0x0:0x8586c50eac92a120"],"When":"2026-1-30"},{"Name":"Edna G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9wxr_9VeIoYYVc4hGcextKYAGGCarFmH7j_z3CdRYu4geOwX8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"To my surprise, the view of this restaurant is spectacular during sunset. Easy to find. Some street parking but best to come by uber. Came here with a group of 7 for a company group outing. This place is great for big groups, company meal, or romantic dinner. Their outdoor patio dining is where to sit at. I almost felt like I was in Hawaii. The staff were very accommodating as we wanted to sit closer to the ledge to see the water. I didn’t know how everyone’s food tasted but my husband’s and my dishes were good.

For appetizers, we tried their ‘crab wontons’ and ‘panko crusted calamari’. I loved the crab wontons had a good amount of filling that you didn’t need the sauce.  That is how it should be like. The squid in the calamari could be a tiny bit softer. I think it was a little overcooked but still tasted good with the sauce. We had their Mai Tai and Lavender Colada. The Mai Tai was all alcohol but better that way for the price! Haha The Lavender Colada, you have to add dark rum on top. It was good but did not taste any lavender in it but the coloring. I had their Hot Pot and it was excellent. Flavor of the coconut broth was so good, I finished the soup. It came with a small lobster tail, mussels and white fish. A good balance. My husband’s had the ‘Filet Mignon’. I thought it was cooked well with good seasoning. Didn’t like the corn with it though but then I am not really into corn. They only have two desserts that we liked and that was the Hula pie and Key Lime Pie. Key Lime Pie is the one to get! I love the crust!

You just have to be wary if you are not sitting underneath the big umbrellas as outdoor eating attracts the birds. Make sure you are fully underneath the umbrella. Still a great place for service, food and views. Totally recommended this place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB3XqvEArhnw-pqqK3l5_1G&fid=0x0:0x8586c50eac92a120"],"When":"2025-11-1"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Sina -","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIWKUXUdP3IZt4AYwmeaICqItk8DqSotRAsTnRKjTtY_6ZDSQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I visited today because I’ve always liked the vibe and design, which looked inviting, appetizing, and popular. I arrived around 6:50 PM—just before 7 PM—when there was hardly any line. There was only one party ahead of me, but the cashier had stopped taking orders. I waited for about 10 minutes, and still, no one was ordering. Then, an older woman behind me mentioned that she had ordered online for pickup, so I immediately placed my own online order.

After ordering, I saw the estimated wait time was 30 minutes. As more people began lining up, I went to ask C whether the wait time for online orders and in-person orders was different. I explained that I had been in line to order but had also placed an online order, and asked if it could be marked as dine-in. C told me the wait time would be the same. I then sat outside to wait. Over half hour I paid even closer attention to the announcements, but I never heard my name called, not even once.

At 7:38 PM—my order’s estimated ready time—I went to the counter asked loudly if my order was ready. No one responded. One thing I noticed about your store is that no one at the counter seems willing to acknowledge customers, even when it’s obvious they are trying to get help.

After no response, I asked again about order #154 and was again ignored. I have to zoomed in with my phone camera and saw they were already preparing orders in the 160s. I loudly asked again where my #154 was, pointing out they were far past my number. Only then did C casually point to a box behind her and say, “It’s right here; we called you but you didn’t come.”

From 7:30 PM to 7:38 PM, I had been watching my phone and listening carefully. I walked to the counter at 7:38 and did not receive my burger until after 7:40 PM. C’s expression was clearly unfriendly, with no smile and a demeanor suggesting the problem was mine.

By that point, I was already very upset—not only because of the wait but also because of the lack of assistance and C’s cold attitude. She didn’t say “thank you” or “sorry.” My two-year-old son was waiting outside in the seating area, and I had been going back and forth while keeping an eye on him. By then the sun had gone down, it was cold, and the burger I finally received was only lukewarm. Standing outside with that half-warm burger, I felt the entire experience was wrong.

I went back to confront C, speaking loudly about my experience and their unprofessional and dishonest handling of the situation. I only wanted an apology or acknowledgment. Instead, C kept her attitude, making me feel like I was the unreasonable one. She said she was the manager. When I asked her name, she said, “It doesn’t matter.” Of course it matters—without accountability, customers with real concerns will be brushed off.

C not only had an attitude and failed to do her job, but also made excuses, treated me disrespectfully, lied and acted in a way that I felt was discriminatory.

After call the real manager, C’s attitude changed completely, and she offered explanations—but without any real sincerity. She even tried to convince me that I had misunderstood her, claiming my burger was only ready at 7:42 PM and that she had just called my name before I asked. She said that if no one claims an order, they call again every 5 minutes. By then it was nearly 8 PM, and I still hadn’t eaten. I told her multiple times I didn’t want explanations—I just wanted to go home.

Everyone who ordered after me had already received their food. beef patty was burnt and dry. Although I saw the bun being toasted on a pan during preparation, it arrived soggy, flattened like dumpling dough, and sticky—tasted like undercooked","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC5qmkFskQiFIZWWIbVBdEB&fid=0x0:0x93be1a598f13b75c"],"When":"2025-8-18"},{"Name":"Yuka","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX2Wmg1XResQeW6MMlOFuyBCLh_nCigHbCvo6QzONzdfqVc9CI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I ordered the 1/4 lb cheeseburger ($9.95) and it was delicious, juicy, flavorful, and cooked just right. The onion rings ($5.95) were crispy and satisfying, and the curly fries ($5.45) were seasoned well and hit the spot.

I also got the lemonade ($3.45), which was refillable and actually pink lemonade. I highly recommended this drink!! Super refreshing and a great addition to the meal.

We sat outside, which was nice because the place is dog-friendly and has a relaxed beach vibe. You don't actually see the beach from the seating area, but it's nearby, so it still feels coastal. The only downside was that no one was cleaning the outdoor tables, and bugs can be a bit annoying at times but that comes with outdoor seating.

Overall, the burger was excellent, the food was worth the price, and overall, a solid experience and a dependable go-to for burgers. I'd recommend it and will be back.

Our daughter loves the chicken nuggets.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDR_dzTUQ&fid=0x0:0x93be1a598f13b75c"],"When":"2023-5-2"},{"Name":"Anthony Khalifeh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXC9c2XL1FJltnZ7FCeVRw6Xc6-_KXFbXzLC9C2TYcr2gGil4xk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jeff’s Burgers in La Jolla is a must-visit! Marina’s exceptional management truly sets this spot apart. Her attention to detail and genuine care for customers elevate the entire experience.

For incredible food and outstanding service, Jeff’s Burgers is a local gem you won’t want to miss!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICfrvyP0QE&fid=0x0:0x93be1a598f13b75c"],"When":"2024-12-29"}]

Piattis doesn't ever dissapoint. The handmade raviolis were absolutely amazing. Service was on point.
I'm  inspired by spaces like this that are an easy blend of comfortable and classy @healing-ground.online","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEJHYqsSqrc3lEw&fid=0x0:0xed5f0fbe9a6415f6"],"When":"2025-5-20"},{"Name":"Sohrob H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJKrX9_wgY9rXmyIDE1ks23TiltEkzJuT2EQgHVJtpxXvGaY6AA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I recently dined at Piatti, and unfortunately, the experience was quite disappointing. From the moment we sat down, the service was slow and unorganized. After placing our order, it took 50 minutes for our food to arrive, which was extremely frustrating. To make matters worse, several tables that were seated after us received their meals before we did, leaving us wondering what was going on in the kitchen aside from them burning our food.

The only saving grace of the evening was the busboy, who was attentive and friendly. He kept our water glasses filled and checked in on us far more frequently than our actual server. Without his help, the experience would have been even worse. Because of his excellent service, I’m giving this place two stars instead of just one.

On top of the poor service, there were unexpected charges that left a bad taste in our mouths. We were charged an extra $3 for a small side of marinara sauce to pair with our calamari order and another $3 for soda water. At no point were we informed that these items came with an additional cost, which felt like a sneaky way to nickel-and-dime customers. For a restaurant that claims to be a quality Italian establishment, these kinds of surprises are unacceptable.

With so many other great Italian restaurants in the area, I won’t be returning here. The long wait, inattentive service, and hidden fees made for a frustrating dining experience, and there are far better options out there that provide both better service and transparency.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICXqa2jOg&fid=0x0:0xed5f0fbe9a6415f6"],"When":"2024-10-18"}]

[{"Name":"Zan Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUN5C3H72aGGcR8PtqR1l-OglvxT_md2x261gTi8kiOsK2nOLA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I grew up in La Jolla, so I have been coming to this street for decades to dine and can honestly say Shorehouse Kitchen is one of my favorites, in terms of breakfast. We stopped in this morning for brunch and had a wonderful meal. We were a party of four and arrived around 9:30 and did not have to wait at all for a table. Inside is quite large they have outdoor and indoor seating available and many different table size options. Our server was polite and everything that we ordered came out very fast. Parking this area is pretty easy, we were able to find a free street spot very close to the front door.

I started off my breakfast with a Salted Caramel Latte and honestly loved it. Salted caramel is one of my favorite flavors so I was expecting to like it and was happy to see it was as good as I hoped. With that theme going I decided to get the Salted Caramel Waffle and also really liked it. It was a thin waffle, not one of the fluffy Belgian types, but more so the type at a Waffle House. My waiter advised me that it wasn’t very much in terms of size so I ordered a side of scrambled eggs and cheese and thought it was a nice addition and felt it was a good size for one person. I would highly recommend this place to anyone and I plan to be back again in the near future.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhALiR6Harrj4NA6aBXzm7NU&fid=0x0:0xb48b3518b8ee25f"],"When":"2025-11-24"},{"Name":"Conner Jolly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-WYGE7k-vmS-sbe05Km8sQbeORd80n172TiutkDAHeikS3zdLXw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"While Le jolle is not necessarily the place to go for food, this is the exception.  We ended up getting a bloody marry and veggie benidict and both were great.  In fact the bloody marry inspired us to start making them at home so we got the stuff for it right after.  The benidict had a nice mix that even included a pistatio spread which worked well.  The hash was probably the best hash I have had.  A perfect ballance of crispy edges and tender insides.  It all might be a bit pricy for breakfast but worth it.

The atmosphere was nice but nothing crazy either.  There was a decent amount of natural lighting and seating next to it which was nice.  One of the small touches that I liked was the addition of a dog menu that they post on their front stand.

The staff was friendly and had plenty of good recommendations.   We lucked out on parking but It seems like normally pretty rough to find a spot.

Overall a great place to grab breakfast.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAosvduhvdTyR5pi-KmaKqO&fid=0x0:0xb48b3518b8ee25f"],"When":"2025-10-22"},{"Name":"Foodie Traveler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_EnSgIrQhgBkeuZgrKVfWLInLVZCAISjuEHNei4jRf7t78N4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We visited this place because our local friends had recommended it. With its impressive Yelp and Google reviews, and a long line when we arrived, we made the right decision to come here. The service was exceptional, and the food was absolutely delicious! We enjoyed their famous Tahitian French toast, which was incredibly tasty that even our picky eater, who doesn’t usually like French toast, couldn’t resist asking for more. The salmon benedicts were also quite good, and the grilled cheese was a classic choice that couldn’t be wrong.

However, I had high hopes for their Kyoto coffee, which supposedly features homemade macadamia nut milk. Unfortunately, it was a disappointment. I couldn’t even finish a single sip because it was so watery and tasteless.

Now, let’s talk about the parking situation. This neighborhood has no public parking, so you’re either fighting to find a spot or arriving super early. We arrived around 10 am on a Saturday and had to park about a mile away. It wasn’t a terrible distance, but it wasn’t ideal, especially when you’re hangry.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAhmSCvUc4hnR_8nZT6o3UE&fid=0x0:0xb48b3518b8ee25f"],"When":"2025-8-2"},{"Name":"Alex Pritchard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXUfdggPl3DPLd-dX8_OL6rLDVp4_QpxX2aSMQSGMdkH10REJPN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Man do I love a little beach town Cafe. Food was delicious and came fast, hey now. I got the scrabbled eggs and potatoes and my partner got the Huevos Rancheros. I messed up I seriously should have gotten them as well. The Huevos Rancheros were dope, 10/10 world recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAiX42d6AlFCbMJQUdTKzp8&fid=0x0:0xb48b3518b8ee25f"],"When":"2025-11-5"},{"Name":"mj Fahrman (MJ)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXBRmE5ZF8f_8dvUTdQES4JCsrDiqRXUkhnnD9qfeJhUskDNxTn0w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Visited July 8, 2025 - BREAKFAST
My husband remembered this place from a visit years ago. He started it was a bit dated from when he originally visited. It happens. At least it was still open! He was pretty excited to bring us here!
The initial sitting, which was indoors was a bit disappointing as we waited at least waited 5-10 min until someone came to greet us and take our drink order. However, upon observation I noticed one of our waitress was training another. But non of them clarified this.
Anyway, after the initial negative, the rest of our breakfast service went smoothly.
We had a basic breakfast: coffee, oj (fresh squeezed) pancakes, French toast, omelet with toast were all delicious and satisfying. Don’t miss eating here.
You have the option of indoor or outdoor seating. The wait staff is friendly. Just make sure to get here early bc it seems to be a popular place!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCGJTFvdAPyTCx61134KKuB&fid=0x0:0xb48b3518b8ee25f"],"When":"2025-7-23"},{"Name":"Wing Man CA","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVj150oIedzRjp0yhmU66829EOEXVRTwbpAyp1CLlfx7PQ2nWLP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Restaurant Review: Maple Fried Chicken Sandwich & Fries

During my visit, I ordered the Maple Fried Chicken Sandwich accompanied by a side of fries. While the meal was enjoyable, it lacked a standout element that would make it truly memorable.

Food – 7/10

Maple Fried Chicken Sandwich – 6/10

The sandwich was well-prepared, featuring fresh cheese with a satisfying pull and a well-cooked egg that added a rich texture. However, I made the mistake of pressing down on it too quickly, preventing me from fully savoring its flavors. The bacon, while present, lacked seasoning and was barely noticeable within the sandwich. The highlight was the chicken itself, which had a pleasant maple syrup glaze that complemented its crispiness. Despite these positives, the sandwich didn’t have a “wow” factor—everything was good, but nothing was exceptional.

Fries – 4/10

The fries, though served in a generous portion, were relatively small. They had a nice crispiness and were mildly seasoned, but their texture caused them to dissolve too quickly, making it difficult to fully appreciate their flavor.

Service – 12/10

The service was truly outstanding. We were seated almost immediately due to the efficiency of the staff, who quickly cleaned and prepared tables despite the restaurant being packed. The waitstaff were exceptionally attentive, engaging in friendly conversation and maintaining a great sense of humor. Their attentiveness and energy greatly enhanced the dining experience.

Overall Impression

While the food was solid but unremarkable, the outstanding service made the visit worthwhile. If the flavors were as impressive as the hospitality, this meal could have been exceptional.

Side note I saw a really cool car and took a picture and edited it to look cool 😎","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCQuIKHrwE&fid=0x0:0xb48b3518b8ee25f"],"When":"2025-3-1"},{"Name":"Nest Disney","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVrdfEdK3z3zEkFpF3JkTIT0YAoXBTMjVEE3w515JQs37KjSp0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The hostess was not very nice, but the rest of the staff was amazing! Found this spot after a great hike! Food a bit pricey, but that's everywhere now. It's very tasty food, worth it. We sat outside, in the sidewalk table area, it was fine. Would go again if in the area. We got there early and missed the crowd. It was very busy as we left. Parking is in the residential area, just a heads up.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEMDxjI_agNvwVQ&fid=0x0:0xb48b3518b8ee25f"],"When":"2025-5-14"},{"Name":"Michael Laracuente","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2EWJgpu4jE8hCxzxSLgcHzhjZryMaOLCcVs3zK4qZepmzefI8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I got the chilaquiles which were flavourful and delicious. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Marie Lawson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUPpTaZid2QQgWmNu1k3Exn7iK6mfrVtpkJScEgqh8MuFghvLcpAA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I was SO excited to try this spot for Christmas vibes but was extremely disappointed. Only reason for 2 stars is for the Christmas decorations which were very jolly indeed. HOWEVER the service was SO poor and the food was even worse. We had a reservation for 5:30pm on a Sunday, and we didn't finish dinner till close to 9PM. I do realize it was very busy since this is a popular spot, but everything was slow and things came out wrong too. Now onto the food:

Charcuterie Board: was afraid of food poisoning honestly, seemed like it had been sitting out for a while (cute plates though) - also the meat was touching the cheese so my vegetarian friend couldn't try it.

Caesar salad: actually not too bad!

Pepperoni pizza: can't expect much from pizza in California but this was gross - crust was sloppy and undercooked and way too much cheese.

Cocktails/wine: Specialty Christmas cocktails seemed super cute but I learned the espresso martini is batched so I couldn't get tequila instead of the vodka. The other tequila option was VERY blue and way too sweet. Ordered white wine and it came out warm - gave me a massive stomachache and headache due to poor quality.

Maybe the food and service is better when it's not so busy during the holidays, but do not recommend the Christmas pop up as it is overpriced, slow service, and poor quality.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBUw8SGYRMKC4zdk3Z9OvZa&fid=0x0:0x59a53a5c863897a6"],"When":"2025-12-18"},{"Name":"Medi Eslani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK3y2IJGljAp-ru_ZUqcKGFsHe9VyQ4BkGM7mErembE4tRt74I=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I rarely give 1 star but this restaurant definitely deserves 1 star. We ordered their special. It was rare inside. When we told them they insisted this is how ot should be. Ultimate they took the plate back but instead of replacing it with a a new order, they just sauteed the previous plate.
In their salad we found piece of plastic.
Not recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBYavp9q7aBNEWvwRSRsb0V&fid=0x0:0x59a53a5c863897a6"],"When":"2025-9-2"},{"Name":"Jessica Kuharik","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUn3_Bxl0bh5RmKrtPJ0V_HxTijit_itI2CqsFycFzMBu2GbwDmlA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Barbarella's is awesome for the ambiance since they go all out for the holidays! I loved Halloween and Christmas! Our server was good and attentive. The themed food is cute, but it's not very tasty and it's definitely overpriced!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAeVCKtGk7RuJqsKrbfNnEx&fid=0x0:0x59a53a5c863897a6"],"When":"2025-11-22"},{"Name":"MCK","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWDvE5HrBfcyzRo3H1uKqInHdphV61aX_3dT_AjVIhP3Z6r-w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"My friend and I met friends here for an early weekday dinner. We were a total party of 4. Our friends had made reservation. We were greeted and seated under the covered patio which was nice. It's funny the vibe of the casual restaurant reminded me of a Mexican restaurant rather than an Italian one. Our server was very nice and attentive through out the evening.

We started off with cocktails while looking over the menu. Our server was very patient with us as we talked and talked to catch up with old friends. After the 3rd come-around we all decided on the Caesar Salad, Greek Salad, Woodfire Oven Roasted Salmon, Chicken Parmesan and Mushroom Risotto. The salads were very fresh and good. The entrees came out hot and cooked perfectly and tasted good.

Atmosphere: casual relaxing vibe. Service: good. Food: good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDA-KfrQw&fid=0x0:0x59a53a5c863897a6"],"When":"2025-2-6"},{"Name":"Lala","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLka8EfW7FIaUcORbrZ_atXn9u_aRCNDevX8qzuSCUVzuKn6g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The restaurant was nicely decorated for Halloween, which made me decide to go there for lunch. I ordered the chicken breast (Jidory chicken breast)but it came out looking unappetizing and had a strange smell. If you visit this restaurant and have a strong sense of taste or smell, I don’t recommend ordering the chicken breast. I paid $35 for my meal but couldn’t eat it. I’m just disappointed that the nice decorations caught my eye and led me here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCCA1K85iaMrZRpjsv2z5F2&fid=0x0:0x59a53a5c863897a6"],"When":"2025-10-3"},{"Name":"Tamara Daniels","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVSd5ksc0fV_mRhSvShD1y1dNpkyDzKcu9lZUr89hYS1XDxbenW=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This was my 1st time to Barbarella. It couldn't have been a more perfect time. My brother and SIL were visiting from DC for Thanksgiving. We wanted a spot that was in the Xmas spirit as we would not be together for the holiday. Barbarella is all the Christmas vibes! Decorations to Christmas themed cocktails. I will definitely head back down this cute, charming place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB50eTVpHCgV28uZzzEzTGq&fid=0x0:0x59a53a5c863897a6"],"When":"2025-12-1"},{"Name":"Angie Gomez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvtsEG_GtOt0vM6GH7dSf6v4ouNBI2adztkcgvKY-VGO3kqhHY7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My family came to visit and made reservations for me and my boyfriend. There was a really kind server that kept coming around to get our order since we were trying to catchup with my cousin who had just come into town. We ordered the calamari fritters, the fettuccine bouloungese, and the ravioli, and the pizza. Everyone was very satisfied. So delicious.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBAzLnC32QdWq769QpOGB-_&fid=0x0:0x59a53a5c863897a6"],"When":"2025-7-23"},{"Name":"Megan Hill","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUEmcS39x-DxO-aHgyRkj-FGYVYd6uhFq1zCHg7VWR02kx_9czi=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an amazing experience at Barbella! The food was absolutely delicious—everything was cooked to perfection. Our waiter, Art, provided excellent service, staying attentive and making sure we had everything we needed. They also had sooo many gluten-free options, which was a huge plus! The Valentine's decorations outside were adorable and added a charming touch to the atmosphere. We realized after leaving that we forgot to check out the inside, but based on the outdoor decor, I’m sure it was just as lovely. Can’t wait to come back and try more!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCgqqGDNQ&fid=0x0:0x59a53a5c863897a6"],"When":"2025-2-16"}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"Veronika Mindal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXF5d2W1HcwJKl5uf3-nWRRcoG3hfVJkWob9hScuWe5XJRiCiFo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was looking for a place to eat quickly but with real, well-cooked food — not fast food, and this place was exactly what I needed. Everything was fresh, flavorful, and good quality, and my order was ready in just a few minutes. Portions are generous, prices are reasonable, and the ordering process is very efficient (online or via self-ordering kiosks).\n\nFast, tasty, and well done. Highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDKJqojYS7iPIsxhKFfK5go\u0026fid=0x0:0x577a35ddf2ca575f"],"When":"2026-1-18"},{"Name":"Adrian Macarescu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKZ29zQBYt0OLbwFIAuwbBMj3uSeJ9orARiyYIAQBgKd9WVDA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I stop by here a couple times a week after work, and the food is always on point. Fellipe is the man! Always a pleasure to see. He always has a smile on his face, and takes the time to answer any questions about the menu, and always makes sure I’m satisfied with my order. Best location I've been to so far. You get what you pay for here, everything is delicious and the service is on point!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA1C2dTbQWTU8DpZr0Oq62c\u0026fid=0x0:0x577a35ddf2ca575f"],"When":"2026-1-15"},{"Name":"Vince Cheung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLiHQ8Jhyq9l5NRIJG45qwfb_T-AFUqnsflcE5FehCdkEKkZHI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ahi tuna salad was great and kids liked the Mac and cheese. Outside patio seating is nice and they have overhead heaters to stay warm. Kandice was very helpful and accommodating!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhApg4T_lugXOphQxx_dSzCh\u0026fid=0x0:0x577a35ddf2ca575f"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"John K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4_X7UO5IluBtaZPcLJ2MKwu-8g7IPa3Qjhob4SdL7d0W38PU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We were greeted by an awesome nice person, Rory. She lifted us up with her positive attitude. We split the steak plate and our two sides were organic, beet salad with goat cheese with rustic bread and carrots and beets. We asked for the steak to be cooked medium well. After we ordered we received a number to display on our table. Rory delivered our meal. What a great customer facing person to have interacting with customers. The steak was cooked perfectly. Parts of the steak were too chewy to swallow. The beets and goat cheese, the rustic bread and the carrots and beets were amazing. Great flavors and they complemented each other well. There’s a large parking lot in front of the restaurant. The restaurant has heaters on their patio which felt cozy.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBb4zW8M66P4HErQaylM8Gz\u0026fid=0x0:0x577a35ddf2ca575f"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"Mary Scharfe","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZjWjvdRmZYfZmlsHrbPviE9e9Abr82NVocTmS0fpqn1-trtx-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a lovely experience. Had never been here before. The food was excellent and the service was amazing. Kandice offered her advice in selecting our lunch. We sat outside, enjoyed the fresh air on a Sunday, and listened to some jazz. I would highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCOkUjIN1HiLERLQAuQSX-S\u0026fid=0x0:0x577a35ddf2ca575f"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"Jenica Santos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpm_jSoybVgiwMOKLnFAXbyIS_w9oFj5KXDHjgDCEpEaAA4YM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Service was AMAZING thanks to Fellipe!!! He truly made the experience great giving recommendations, and walking us through the menu as it was our first time. Ambiance was clean, warm and inviting. Definitely will recommend this place!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA-yaVpN4Vno0bVfHgwkVoT\u0026fid=0x0:0x577a35ddf2ca575f"],"When":"2025-12-27"},{"Name":"Karen Orell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMg9wc9RrAkzQMK-xeSqan6-_voIaYYxaGv4DNCNGloJxfUobl=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've lived in the UTC area for many years and have been coming to Urban Plates since they first opened. I've always gotten an excellent meal and love the menu choices as well as quality of food. This is a quick in and out spot for a super yummy healthy meal. A few seats inside where orders are taken and meals prepared, but most seating is outside. There are space heaters above the tables so you can enjoy the patio year round comfortably. I'm a pescatarian and love the fish and veggie choices. Sea bass, tuna, salmon and shrimp sustainably sourced are all tasty. The menu has a combination of sandwiches, soup, salads, and entrees with a large number of sides as well. Some seasonal changes are made to the menu too. Kandace is also a great host \u0026 cashier there.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAjhZ4mXKIMBXlJj0NqBvPI\u0026fid=0x0:0x577a35ddf2ca575f"],"When":"2026-1-5"},{"Name":"anahita esmaeilian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJJoTiDTD9asmnjusJUGjZaJyFK8VjRJbX-VQf8sp04CmQxog=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Food was okay. We ordered salmon fish and steak sandwich. I liked fish itself but not steak sandwich. The meat of steak had bad smell. The side  salad and mushrooms were too oily which wasn't good.  I would give score of 3.5.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCHOHXxtHSBvFv3QMZBfiLO\u0026fid=0x0:0x577a35ddf2ca575f"],"When":"2025-11-29"}]

[{"Name":"Camille S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkioWafI8kFVU-c2lA_O-KRnO1gg6fqZfcKEYegSZn1Q11Lzbp=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Steps away from La Jolla Shores, is this closed street full of restaurants and bars, and a spot we visited again was Sushi Mori!

Everyone was so kind from the moment we got there!

This is what we ordered:
-sushi of the day $20 (as shown in the today's special deal)
-unagi don $28 (first time ordering this and it was sooo good!)
-chirashi $34 (got this last time and it still was just as amazing)
-cherry blossom $18 (first time ordering this and it has spicy imitation crab, avocado, cucumber and on top is tuna, salmon, avocado with spicy mayo...would get this roll again!)

Such a cute sushi date night spot that is intimate! Recommend going during sunset time to see the beautiful hues as it gets darker.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDcVSn8XbRk_6dfqh76e6vd&fid=0x0:0xc6a78c4e2a93378b"],"When":"2025-9-29"},{"Name":"Rakesh Venugopal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlWwuFLgvI_sKO3j10keWqlk6kwhpMvS7GFsA7z2Y_asLecJOsrg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great sushi and sashimi.. good service and great location. Well priced too","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCvX8vX1Xl17xgcMUdoXdI5&fid=0x0:0xc6a78c4e2a93378b"],"When":"2025-9-11"},{"Name":"Brigitte Rince","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXdjZPQtJV2Li2QhS0pTkxzPkKHbefSyloxq5oanBGWkDGzTjDE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food is delicious. It is fresh and cooked to perfection. The service is absolutely wonderful. We will come back again and again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBVixL82saNLuXe-B_8HRfz&fid=0x0:0xc6a78c4e2a93378b"],"When":"2025-8-13"},{"Name":"Wandering in Paradise","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSLRkcVKfn8mGP8HPJKIma5T3q5jdsoxt7AmvtkP6bVJnf5lw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Phenomenal sushi at Sushi Mori! All the seafood was so fresh and delicious tasting. We ordered the bluefin tuna toro, yellowtail belly, yellowtail, and Uni nigiri. Also the popcorn lobster and Gucci roll. We sat on the dog friendly patio. The service was excellent, quick and friendly. Definitely recommend, great area to walk around and right next to the beach.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICXw570_AE&fid=0x0:0xc6a78c4e2a93378b"],"When":"2024-10-19"},{"Name":"Nikhil Bansal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU_g_C2dtY15kLmFB5L6KuwgoXZFmvSmPv4L2upTUZBi8N1YEOd=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great sushi place, prices are very reasonable and the taste was amazing. If you like sushi you should definitely visit here. Also I am happy that there were so many option for vegetarian sushi.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDn7IfdlwE&fid=0x0:0xc6a78c4e2a93378b"],"When":"2024-10-4"},{"Name":"Cindy Wang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXBwPMHeJ2ccd4ve1VpcIBWAosFd4qPlNKyGDpl-OefdTK5hj7C=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There is nothing better than fresh sushi rolls and steaming hot ramen to start the weekend! Luckily at Sushi Mori you can have both and so much more. Their fish is cut fresh daily and the rolls are almost too beautiful to eat. Sushi Mori has been family owned for over 15 years and is truly a gem. Plus it’s only a short walk to the iconic La Jolla Shores.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICB197PrAE&fid=0x0:0xc6a78c4e2a93378b"],"When":"2023-1-6"},{"Name":"Gen Eisan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI3kPwh5X2gMwLgP8IRqaGBljutoByQ39jkVuzyTKT7sC6IIA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was my first visit to La Jolla and our group went to Sushi Mori on our first night.  I was surprised to see Uni on the menu in this little sushi restaurant so I had to order it.  Our very helpful waitress suggested that I get the king scallop and uni sushi. I did and oh my goodness did it exceed my expectations.  I am a big foodie and uni has been on my bucket list for years.  Living in Texas,  it has been impossible for me to get because it is so cost prohibitive to ship here.  So I was delighted to be on the west coast where uni is harvested.
The sushi plate has the sweetness of the scallop and the creamy umami flavor of the uni. I was in foodie heaven.  It was so good, I went back for lunch the next two days!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDpxrX2Vg&fid=0x0:0xc6a78c4e2a93378b"],"When":"2023-8-21"},{"Name":"Renata","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWLJ30BR3GiVnkdaczinr3sM7Vei4Ya2D00IGcO0oK1_D5u8rU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I love sushi!!! The sushi and sashimi here is super fresh and delicious. Service is excellent. I haven't had a roll here I didn't like, and I've had a lot of different ones. I like to order something new on the menu each time, plus my favorite dragon roll.

One thing that, for me, would make this place 5 stars would be adding a mango roll to the menu.","Images":null,"When":""}]
