user_reviews: [{"Name":"A Ram","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIj4jukEssl8rypVx29sJTqMMtZlnUJbSH8-PpCMxt5fbv3nXc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This establishment is in an  historic building giving it a  nostalgia feel, it has a great atmosphere with very nice staff who are attentive and professional. The view overlooks the Cove and  ocean and is beautiful and relaxing.  Be aware there's stairs get up to reach this resturaunt, I didn't notice any other way to get up,  they have outside patio and inside seating. The restroom was small but clean and I had to wait to use it. Parking can be tricky during the weekend. We got here early on a Sunday and we're able to find two spots to park with no issues. Other than that the food here is excellent add the stunning view of the cove with lots of seals, swimmers and birds and relaxing atmosphere along with the good staffing makes for a good place to eat and enjoy, I highly recommend this  gem when visiting the area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAJhw9Lkve-bO3rb5I8EDfn\u0026fid=0x0:0x6c627041bd7e3dd8"],"When":"2025-11-16"},{"Name":"Stephen Soloway","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVyYL-mmRScuB6d2rXdStmO1fXHSnKQF6M_AuthtZ_RSmkh6zA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"lovely group event dinner . everything was done with professionally great fish meat chicken.  full bar wine spirits. water views were wonderful. historic old building with charming atmosphere.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDbbFFtnK2NArMAwWqXZIKC\u0026fid=0x0:0x6c627041bd7e3dd8"],"When":"2026-1-23"},{"Name":"Neli B.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKwg67xYy_9mLKS6F5oCGc9IYCuvtCz4MDgdyYMQQcHyAMPRfM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The views from the patio/deck tables is great. The drinks were good, but the spritz’s I don’t think had actual champagne like it says. Our waitress acted like we were bothering her every time she came to our table; however, the blond waitress was very sweet! The food was delicious, but the lemon couscous should not be $14. Finally, their menu hours are so confusing. We got there around 3:15 pm and they don’t serve lunch, but they don’t serve dinner either even though we got the dinner menu, which said it’s from 3 pm - 8 pm.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCFCfE0UOZbJryyQK8aAkSz\u0026fid=0x0:0x6c627041bd7e3dd8"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"allan lopatinsky","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKbCDBIgsWFDaFP7AVxE3QteO6KIZ41QpXgxXR1SoCZeML3fw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"On vacation for anniversary, this place is amazing! We came for the great view of the cove, and shore line, but the FOOD! The staff was all super friendly and accomodating and the food was fresh and delicious. The food took an extra minute (not long at all) to come out but we did order alot of food and the staff was so nice about it, they brought us a french toast without us even having said anything, do yourselfs a favor YOU MUST TRY the french toast. 11/10 would rate higher if i could.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhClbVWx7Twsk4aqd670SAEX\u0026fid=0x0:0x6c627041bd7e3dd8"],"When":"2025-12-4"},{"Name":"DMOSTI","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXRDLFEkw-U-L87oKjEY2hFkP82UFDXYJjwC8WiGKtK_BoaWc4k=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We think the abalones' set in stone is a great idea. The host, server, cook, and manager were all so attentive and helpful. We had the crab cake Benedict, and chefs special seafood omelette... Incredible! Topped with their BV Mocha (espresso and Mexican chocolate). Well worth the time and money.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB6qGK25Hc4J_Bvsf7QQPS9\u0026fid=0x0:0x6c627041bd7e3dd8"],"When":"2026-1-1"},{"Name":"amirreza bahramian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxHFcc51gr33_zTZGGzT6AgN3nwXRYGxpiL3-d2cwWA4WQE24=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I ate a lobster sandwich with chicken soup for dinner, it was delicious and good quality, we had a great time since it was my wife's birthday that same night.\nThey are so friendly with us.\nI recommend it if you want delicious seafood and a great ocean view.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC6YFtrfy2MAzvbv9rJUinV\u0026fid=0x0:0x6c627041bd7e3dd8"],"When":"2025-11-23"},{"Name":"Lij T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI9uqDR9DTOTk9RqHe4-kNLFTAwKft2nRclHmDDKAhZUZAi9Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I stopped in for a late breakfast on Labor Day. The setting is lovely, with beautiful ocean views from certain tables that make the visit worthwhile. The food itself was fairly ordinary and on the pricier side, but the atmosphere helps make up for it. My waiter was sweating and he said there was no fee to use credit card but the final bill aftwr paying showed a credit card fees.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCwkBAID_WMlskpr7nu53-P\u0026fid=0x0:0x6c627041bd7e3dd8"],"When":"2025-9-1"},{"Name":"Chaitrali Joshi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlyozBEMuS3nHPhvyIThGh1b4TAIH1GtobCMZXe_7YNNFen3AR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We went to this spot because of some good reviews and it's views of the beach and ocean. But it was a great disappointment. First the lady who sat us down was very rude, stalled us for no reason. We saw our table was empty for a long time before we were seated. Its way too expensive for the food quantity and quality served. The food tasted very stale, was of bad quality and weird taste.  Their roasted garlic hummus and pita bread was good, but bread was bit burnt though. We order for buffalo cauliflower cakes, high tide tacos and vegan breakfast tacos. We could taste stale oil, the cauliflower cakes were fried probably too many times, it tasted like it was frozen for a long time before being served. The tacos were a disaster - broken tortillas,  too much filling, no taste other than side of salsa, very dry, no flavour. The ambience is okay, though questionable hygiene, too many houseflies and insects all the time, smelly restaurant and not in a good way.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBBQB-DddGqZ9mWbWnY1-gm\u0026fid=0x0:0x6c627041bd7e3dd8"],"When":"2025-11-1"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Hamilton Greene","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXIvwNO4Wgua6lAvPA0rO4WxQfjdtFuzmfn8lCo8yRU1kgoJBPCfg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good cafe. Got the sunrise sandwich on a croissant which was decent. Large black iced tea was good. Came out to ab $15 total. Only place on the strip open before 7 on a Saturday.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD9prdP_k84EAygi7_WthhK&fid=0x0:0x6aadfc50937ee704"],"When":"2025-10-11"},{"Name":"Diego Valenzuela","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnevBrC2IufUOiSTOk7XaSd-Skg6ZdltcRaz-L43x5WE67LbU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can't say enough good things about Brick & Bell! This cozy La Jolla cafe is a gem, and it's quickly become my go to for a perfect morning or afternoon treat. The staff is always welcoming, the atmosphere is perfectly relaxed, and the food is absolutely top tier.
First, the hot chocolate is a must have, especially on a chilly morning. It's a creamy, rich, and perfectly balanced chocolatey dream that feels like a hug in a mug. It’s sweet without being overpowering, making it a truly delicious and comforting beverage.
Then there are the cookies pure perfection. The chocolate chip cookies are baked to gooey perfection and are the ideal companion to a coffee or hot chocolate. They also have a variety of other delicious pastries and scones that are just as amazing.
And for something savory, the avocado toast is divine. It's fresh, flavorful, and piled high with ripe avocado on wonderful, fresh baked bread. It's a genuinely delicious and satisfying start to the day.
Whether you're looking for a quick coffee to go or a place to sit and savor a meal, Brick & Bell is the place to be. You'll be glad you stopped in!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBYR71n4acA-Ma77CB3bcyz&fid=0x0:0x6aadfc50937ee704"],"When":"2025-10-13"},{"Name":"Laura Gomez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUWbyw3NWb0Qsg3Rcm1XC1HKyOqJALKXKYihD6C3cODlGNSIlh4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Lovely experience, Quick and easy. The vibe is great the coffee ia great quality and the location is excellent.
Ordered the mocha ice and it was refreshing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBNZeqGUjyUSVumaY6asvy9&fid=0x0:0x6aadfc50937ee704"],"When":"2026-1-31"},{"Name":"Patricia Leupp","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWizVjOGi_DyrHeGA4UQeHSFX3h38J69iV9SA495HH4kM4vIjGqxw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Went here on a recommendation from a couple of girls at the Kayak  shop. It did not disappoint! The coffee was on pointe  and  the cranberry scones were delicious! Light and fluffy. Not too sweet. The best I ever had in fact. We like to come here to La Jolla to get away every so often. This will be my new coffee place . The prices are very reasonable considering the area.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chitrita Saxena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX0p_FjSnzE8VqavCHVKdGiiKsoyvzQrWJUl6pT8hvm_-uxb2iBQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Okay wow I came here earlier today literally minutes before my Uber arrived, ordered 2 random things because I was so hungry from kayaking, and here I am sitting in my hotel room wishing I had gotten 3 more treats, a sandwich and a coffee... I got one of their Chocolate muffins and their almond cake- the cake was soo soft and sweet without it being overbearing, and the chocolate muffins were decadent without being heavy. The person behind the counter was so efficient but still answered my questions and gave me recommendations, and the general vibe was so cute, cozy and perfectly coastal! 10/10 would recommend!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Flavien Booth","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJanj-riqYj9klUWT506ViokG612NXnOXd3xBG40u4Q-JyF_A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great spot. Very friendly staff and good quality coffee at a reasonable price considering the area. The drink in the photo is the iced Mexican mocha which is fantastic. The chocolate chip cookie is great as well. In general everything is super fresh. I’ve been going to this place for the last three years and will continue to when I’m back in San Diego.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwk7jXNw&fid=0x0:0x6aadfc50937ee704"],"When":"2025-3-20"},{"Name":"Stephen Bruno","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnn3YpLdaeImBaL4vRaqow9YqtCwh_aMy9PasRAZnHES0atdGD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Currently enjoying a large iced almond latte and a maple scone. A nice pick-me-up on a sunny beach day!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDfyqwiekaZFp6sdILuYLJ2&fid=0x0:0x6aadfc50937ee704"],"When":"2025-9-4"},{"Name":"julia semenenko","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVRIl0vY4RQXSAcXs9uqOz9zFregFLrmEA3_ZCupbPAvvykWLaq=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The location is perfect, not far from the Shores Hotel. We got a dirty iced vanilla chai, the sunrise bagel with bacon, mini maple scone and the mini cranberry scone and it was all really good! I liked that they have a 12oz size which a lot of coffee shops don't have. The staff was friendly and ready to answer my questions. But the person taking my order didn't really acknowledge us when we walked up until I spoke up, so I wasn't sure if she was ready to take our order. The kitchen staff that brought out the bagel was really nice and asked if I needed anything else. It wasn't too busy when we came in so I'll definitely come again when I'm in the area!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"John K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4_X7UO5IluBtaZPcLJ2MKwu-8g7IPa3Qjhob4SdL7d0W38PU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This might be the first 5 I have ever given for a fast food restaurant. I wanted max protein and healthy as possible so I ordered the Classic Grilled Chicken Sandwich with cheddar cheese and I added tomato and I got the ranch dressing on the side.
We used the kiosk to place our order which was easy and intuitive. The only change I would make to the kiosk ordering app is to be able to have the sauce that you want on the side. I had to order without any sauce then I asked for the ranch dressing when I picked up my order.
1. My sandwich had a decent size piece of chicken.
2. The chicken was tender with every bite.
3. Tasty combination of chicken, cheddar cheese, and a butter toasted potato bun.
I was thoroughly enjoyed the entire sandwich.
They have small cups for water which was perfect for us.
I enjoyed the dill pickle spear. It was a nice thick spear that was fresh with great flavor. There was zero trace of food left on my tray.
I enjoyed dipping my sandwich into the ranch dressing. It elevates the flavors even more.
The dining area was clean and we enjoyed the vibe of the music and of the restaurant.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBhuWd3eDGd2UCvvfhE-j7f&fid=0x0:0xe3be4db207191525"],"When":"2025-12-12"},{"Name":"food_from_the_usa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPfv3OL5STXT2g4xo3qiaxJJIunzwNyQ7E9qintXD_TEk9ebY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great location. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Raúl","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUC4ggSCKF2uOb9mz28pm8os6XhmHWP9ZmD3izYLAhW-Lg8o7vk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We visited The Marine Room in La Jolla for a special date night, and it was truly an unforgettable experience.

The ambiance is exceptional — candlelight, ocean views, and an intimate atmosphere that makes it perfect for a meaningful evening. It feels elegant without being overwhelming.

The food was outstanding. The tuna dishes were incredibly fresh and beautifully plated, with bold yet refined flavors. The seared entrée in the rich sauce was perfectly cooked and full of depth. The cocktails were equally impressive — balanced, refreshing, and crafted with care. Every dish looked like art and delivered on flavor.

Our server was amazing — attentive, knowledgeable, and genuinely kind. The service made us feel welcomed and taken care of from start to finish.

The Marine Room offers more than just dinner — it delivers a complete experience. Highly recommended for a special evening in La Jolla.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD_eAVEnaS-odjkXa1zKd5d&fid=0x0:0xb334ac43f0805067"],"When":"2026-1-31"},{"Name":"Doris Holderness","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW-DJmlMRhnHH813VvauHZSeXtSFDCqdQ8LDtOxKJ3kJV4MtElE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful setting! Waiter was very knowledgeable. Food and service were exceptional. Extensive wine list. Started with some focaccia then trout tartare which was excellent. Entrees included the ahi tuna and seared scallops both outstanding. Dessert was the apple spice cake as the base with cheesecake mousse on top. Very light and satisfying dessert to hit the spot. Ending with 2 complimentary chocolate truffles.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCwUt-wG_ZXW6zJ5PdM0isU&fid=0x0:0xb334ac43f0805067"],"When":"2025-12-13"},{"Name":"john leija","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWtPHQsin4cFVOVcVcZRUgnfh3XaDNgnB2QVAOe07gMIDb1GCs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Outstanding! Big meaty lobster, Japanese 4oz wygu was more fatty than meaty. Had better wygu other places like Animae but didn't try Australian wygu here cause Japanese is normally best! Shrooms tasted amazing. Couldn't taste speckled truffle on potatoe puree but squash was good with pomegranate seeds. All their mixed drinks were presented nicely in Small cups. Drinks like cast your spell and ain't talking bout pumpkin were our seasonal go to.
Great view of ocean and waves. Tried going during king high tide, but even at max peak, waves didn't Crash up against the windows like they did last time for us. $300 for 2 people with our order above, could've definitely doubled that with a bottle of wine or escargot or oysters.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBlyN9icDZmTcWZoH2isIbt&fid=0x0:0xb334ac43f0805067"],"When":"2025-12-4"},{"Name":"Macy House","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpNHTFxhGwhjThZQm3idZTmxHFkbs5UZQpgxvd_ziuEPPl1BML=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Took my boyfriend here for his birthday. Lovely atmosphere and food. Worth it.

The Bunny Slope drink was to die for. I can’t stop thinking about it.

Both tartare appetizers were phenomenal, specifically the steak. The caviar was lovely, just melted right in our mouths.

I ordered the Japanese A5 Wagyu and it was phenomenal. No words can describe. Boyfriend got the Australian Wagyu; tried and it was tender and juicy.

10/10 recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDHLb9zNbiGYv3I-gZp2VXW&fid=0x0:0xb334ac43f0805067"],"When":"2025-12-22"},{"Name":"Elyaa Hammad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWwIkndsE-c3DmiqYYq_KQPRogXEnTWmF2qilCOHk5QLB6I2GSpcQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Was amazing experience and good food. We love our time there. I ordered oysters and my husband ordered tuna both was amazingly cooked.  We celebrated our anniversary and they offered us a complimentary sweet.  Love the sunset time if you book your reservation and hour before sunset you should be good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDutsuVdRXmbigROeSzbsO-&fid=0x0:0xb334ac43f0805067"],"When":"2025-9-5"},{"Name":"James Davis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZOg9KJ-MWjdceaCYiRoLRm4k4Pnh7WXAPsdOdkIQaFxOEqLjG7A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Food was amazing and the atmosphere was great as well.  I realize this is Turks and everything is a bit expensive and we are willing to pay extra for the experience- but we also have teenage children with us - this restaurant charged us for every Coke and Tea refill - we had $30 in Cokes and refills - that is a money grab to me.  A restaurant of this caliber can do better than that.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB1UIdDqFTMigK1cauYbP3L&fid=0x0:0xb334ac43f0805067"],"When":"2025-12-29"},{"Name":"amy harvey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWqBfRzZxqB-08WarPdntCiclcotbBqMwQS6hJiKjuLEicgLE1h=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We visited there 21 years ago and we excited to bring our friends for dinner.   I made reservations for 14 a week in advance and was able to get in for a sunset dinner.   Located in the beach in LaJolla it is a great place to dine.   The service was wonderful and atmosphere was elegant.   I had the filet mignon and Cesar salad.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAfLzgiwOrhlL9QsiRlF4kr&fid=0x0:0xb334ac43f0805067"],"When":"2025-11-10"},{"Name":"Charlene Bernard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKmaReXTxdBSFjitiy_nt2eMBjoREu8RIBHEjCzoMZaCQCa6w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Tony at the bar was outstanding, started our experience off on the right path. Cassandra gave full service table side and ensured that our great experience continued.  Favorite part of our meal was the trout tartar","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCWnk89a2xmphgAxV9ScSx2&fid=0x0:0xb334ac43f0805067"],"When":"2025-12-2"}]

[{"Name":"Barbara Bolton (Looski)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVnXNlARnp2NY9kG1HZ2DYR03cPmTkHIP70iFX4O52mHZNhCH85=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"What a fun and unique restaurant, mini grocery, clothing boutique,  and lots of gift items.  The owner Lisa loves to gather folks together, an example,  she has a Tuesday lunch/game experience for older adults.  It's called "The 90's Club".
Check it out!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD9c-J-S69ZXmxwK4fbqhvo&fid=0x0:0x5ac36dc84354a96f"],"When":"2025-9-30"},{"Name":"Vincent Hartley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI7hsCnWr9REPTigTuh6yGgECetnjCg7kGkg06HUFOl2WvU4A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent and quaint place run by a retired married couple. Portions are smaller than one might imagine regarding what we ate — Pepperoni Flatbread & Tri-Tip Sandwich — but are by no means modest and leave you satisfied. The food is absolutely delicious, modifiable within reason and well worth the price, just don’t expect to have any leftovers. Service and atmosphere is home-y and personable in a genuinely authentic way — these people are earnestly trying to do a service to their community and it shows. More places would do well to learn from what’s being done here and bring things back to a human level.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Glen Gerhard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUnf9oROdUlCd0Y-LUWQehg1zs1sdURL49knoTdf3CT0Q1tJ7lN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Just stopped in to grab some deserts on the way home after the beach. We love their chocolate chip cookie and I also wanted to try their banana bread. Both are super sized and so we ended up eating only half of each. The banana bread is tasty and not overly sweet, although I would like mine with raisins and walnuts. The cookie was really great with lots of dark chocolate chips. I'll have to come back and try a full meal sometime soon.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCAqfi7sAE&fid=0x0:0x5ac36dc84354a96f"],"When":"2025-2-2"},{"Name":"Stacee Calderon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVPzn7PPgqhopuqo6vr8RbGA-IImBz8ChWtg9f2fvY-ttN9MLjN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Yum! The food was delicious and fresh! The owner was delightful to converse with and very attentive. She let my daughter customize her sandwich to her liking which was so fast great. Loved the overall vibe. Thanks for a great experience!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Seymour Titt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGtljownZL4eWz1hMSBPj3pQf7z7tk_gPca9idKHTEqunLQAs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"LUNCH STOP ! My wife and I rode our eBikes to La Jolla Shores on Sunday and chose this corner store to buy some lunch. Lisa the owner was very friendly and chatty with us. My wife ordered The Corner Club Sandwich to share which came on a ciabatta. We sat outside at a community bench table which was shaded. Our fresh made sandwich was brought out by a food runner and tasted fine. Lisa was kind enough to bring us a couple of chocolate chip cookies. They tasted pretty good. GIVE IT A GO !","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"sean Yufa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU4YmBoPQdU6_HP7RIhg2WUxmEGg2ob2NEv4DbJR95t1gLPGBRY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We stopped by hoping for a quick bite before heading to the beach, but our visit fell short of expectations. The menu offered soup, including a specialty minestrone, which seemed like a great option. However, we ordered a 12 oz portion and were charged $15.40 for a 16 oz size without a clear explanation.

The service, unfortunately, added to the disappointment. Ellie was friendly with other customers but seemed to overlook our order. After waiting 10 minutes, I had to check in, only to hear they were “looking for a container.” From the open kitchen, it was clear the soup was just being pulled from the fridge and hadn’t been warmed up, which was frustrating for a quick stop.

We really wanted to enjoy this local spot, as it has a charming setup, but the pricing mix-up and slow service made it hard to recommend. For now, we’ll look elsewhere for a reliable beachside bite.

P.S. The soup was good","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kathleen Hilsden","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXsZtEV0MWE9M0SOBm2AydnQKBhfvWiY-QQFEe7-EoWkbdzQ086=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stopped by this corner eatery on our was back up the coast and man it DID NOT DISAPPOINT! If you’re in the area or driving through and hungry stop by and grab a snack or something to eat! The ingredient are good and the door is delicious! They have a small kids menu and if you’re here for breakfast there’s also single cereals and milk. There’s a couple shops around if you need to wait a bit for the foods outdoor seating is lovely as you are surrounded by lots to look at and flamingos. The services is great! And did I mention how good the food tastes! Hats off to the cook.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDn767ZYw&fid=0x0:0x5ac36dc84354a96f"],"When":"2024-10-11"},{"Name":"Mary “Mom's Travel Team” Loeza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWq-QGN8xsM5B1ydXSZeQD-sY5t8U3193uigAqgqNaY8lGqTDBq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Perfect location for me to pop in and grab an iced coffee. Decided on a pastry too when I spotted the chocolate croissant. The pricing was great for the location too. The coffee was nice a cold, perfect after a morning at La Jolla Shores. Had a nice chat with Lisa, the owner. The croissant was fresh and I could actually taste the chocolate. Do you ever order a chocolate croissant and all you get are crumbs all over you? This one was fresh, moist and chocolate. I was greeted right when I walked in and given time to decide on what I needed. There are many great menu options and the air was full of a delicious aroma - I wanted whatever I was smelling but I stuck with the coffee and croissant. There are also candies and other items offered-things that would add to your beach day. Packaged food for grab and go and even fresh fruits. Thanks for another great option near the beach.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICLvJveGw&fid=0x0:0x5ac36dc84354a96f"],"When":"2024-6-16"}]

[{"Name":"Nadia S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIQa55nV3LMvQo8I_Ft3ayKzf9Xsgx9QqeVA9svuB2jr1Lgmyvg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Tried Bobboi Gelato in La Jolla and had a bit of a mixed experience at first. I sampled the charcoal vanilla and the dragon lemon, but honestly didn’t love either of them, the flavors just didn’t work for me. The charcoal vanilla was a bit powdery, and the dragon lemon was too tangy for my taste.

Then I went with panettone and dark chocolate, and that combo was amazing. The panettone had such a rich, festive flavor with bits of cake, and the dark chocolate was deep, smooth, and not overly sweet. Together they balanced each other really well. Definitely a must-try combo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAN6cKXX0VtyBInZNctxmrJ&fid=0x0:0xe95caa5fba9889f3"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"Stella","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUYMabqNGcfw9rin1JGvxRy0_l-9ZgqmpA9D5ZMSzPRrJELYI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It’s a beautiful little shop very close to coast. Ordered mocha and dragon lemon flavor. The mocha gelato has soft and tender texture, and they include small chocolate chips inside. Dragon lemon is plant based and has a thin and crisp fruit flavor. The flavors are good, but not very impressive :) There’re only a few outdoor seatings.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAAGOTr9nYVi7qvVEKTi8DJ&fid=0x0:0xe95caa5fba9889f3"],"When":"2026-2-1"},{"Name":"Carol S (石凱洛 Carol)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLWUJqns5fEVknCPt0hOTUH3im8z87v1sPVK4p42B9y6uKrwvsJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Every time I passed by, there was always a long line. Today I finally got the chance to try it!
I chose the Dragon Lemon and Cranberry Orange flavors—both were smooth, rich in flavor, and didn’t feel heavy at all.
The staff were very friendly and welcoming, always smiling.
I’ll definitely come back to try other flavors next time!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBE3Xv6-vqmesgrm6dRTCTY&fid=0x0:0xe95caa5fba9889f3"],"When":"2025-12-26"},{"Name":"Joshua Medina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVFOcjnLlXafMdEZGft-Nsg-3kdiyB7p5qcUWdQEWlTX5ftTuYYw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stopped by Bobboi Natural Gelato and it absolutely lived up to the hype.

I got a two-scoop waffle cone with Panettone (their holiday special inspired by the classic Italian Christmas cake) and Stracciatella (vanilla bean infused with dark chocolate chips), and both flavors were phenomenal.

The Panettone was rich, smooth, and perfectly captured the essence of the traditional cake—festive, comforting, and not overly sweet. The Stracciatella was just as impressive: creamy vanilla bean with high-quality dark chocolate that snapped beautifully in every bite.

You can really taste the quality and craftsmanship in their gelato. Fresh, balanced flavors, great texture, and an excellent waffle cone to top it off. If you’re in La Jolla, this spot is a must—definitely coming back","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCoybAge104xAbVr5DO49gx&fid=0x0:0xe95caa5fba9889f3"],"When":"2026-1-15"},{"Name":"Ashish Aggarwal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI_51eT3sg0eeSUUHEjC0CLYcxHod7XvUlNy6am4ZVLGhdzTA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"They’ve got a bunch of plant based flavors which is great. Generally found the ice cream / gelato just ‘ok.’ Flavors sound really cool but the taste is just ok

Got the pistachio and stracitella and it wasnt as good as I thought. But it was decent. Solid spot.. 4/5 stars but not winning any awards","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhABIXvmXKe2o1qFo9_5DgfM&fid=0x0:0xe95caa5fba9889f3"],"When":"2025-10-8"},{"Name":"Amy Thurston","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSMrFpKaVlo0ac0Sf3Syw6ADYv1-EsjMQDp2bLIPeL6rEOE3Sf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Appreciated the samples, the server was very helpful and informative, everyone loved their gelato. I got the bacio- dark chocolate hazelnut.
They had dairy free options too:
-coconut coffee
-dragon lemon
-dark chocolate sorbet
-pistachio California
-cranberry orange
-pomegranate","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBQRUjeR0oRG9YvU_ijR1-n&fid=0x0:0xe95caa5fba9889f3"],"When":"2025-11-21"},{"Name":"Wandering in Paradise","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSLRkcVKfn8mGP8HPJKIma5T3q5jdsoxt7AmvtkP6bVJnf5lw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious gelato at Bobboi Natural Gelato in La Jolla!  Definitely one of our favorite San Diego gelato brands. We enjoyed the pumpkin amaretto, bacio, and stracciatella flavors. Very friend service and quick to order. Nice indoor and dog friendly outdoor seating. Recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD5h243zF4yYnvLUW1XMZV8&fid=0x0:0xe95caa5fba9889f3"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"Alex Rodriguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVDi1fzPLeCmdzfaw2mABVIoTuf8HTqXrYJt8X32ckWre9EQv7FzA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place was adorable and welcoming, we tried a few free samples in the front before we headed to the La Jolla beaches. After the beaches hit the spot and it was definitely the highlight of our trip! The owner whos accent was definitely to melt for like the gelato was very sweet and do was the gelato! I highly recommend the Dragon fruit Lemonade flavor!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDjN-uTWFSTqGxePbEBDxzY&fid=0x0:0xe95caa5fba9889f3"],"When":"2025-9-19"}]

[{"Name":"Cindy Ly","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUqxCpIZNzTDfOlCYXPBLKlomA35Gn0qv1V5CM7Oh-jJjcmCxo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Ordered takeout for spaghetti marinara and chili cheese fries. Portions were pretty big and filling. Guy with the beard serving us was friendly with good customer service. Only thing was that the chili for the chili cheese fries was quite sweet, and tomato-ey tasting, which is a bit different from what I am used to from other restaurants. Overall decent food with good portions compared to dining halls!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCgxfb4Zw&fid=0x0:0x8d8e811672394108"],"When":"2025-2-19"},{"Name":"Angela Wu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7WAbsa92neLoO1gaNW3trR8Kdi06zH6y5GWG9i1YqFaOLVIE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Friendly customer service and large portions of sides! The atmosphere and music was energizing. The fries are seasoned well, the veggie sandwich is a little small but filled well. The breakfast burrito is large and very filling.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDnhtD1yQE&fid=0x0:0x8d8e811672394108"],"When":"2024-10-5"},{"Name":"Ashley Soleimani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWu5FQgufW8yR7CLbbhqevhU-vVzACJ-h_GDdWJIv3REwsXhl6m=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My colleagues and I, who all work at UCSD, had the pleasure of dining at Shores Diner today, and it was such a fantastic experience. It was our first time there, and from the moment we walked in, we were greeted by Matt, the bar manager, who was incredibly welcoming and accommodating. He and the primary cook were not only friendly but also so fun to chat with.

The restaurant is really cute, creating a perfect atmosphere for enjoying a meal. The food was delicious—fresh, flavorful, and made with care. We had such a great time, and we’ll definitely be back for another meal. I highly recommend it!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gary","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWjhad6ziSC5dHWW2XuH5fZdv1bCYEUy1Tfr6yXE_-MrwJZ5fY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Shores Diner serves a variety of traditional American diner fare in a casual setting. Known for its generous portions and attentive service, it is an ideal location for breakfast, brunch, or lunch with family and friends.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andie Smidler","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUwzP_2FER2baz6KzdYexPcLgVYwWI7ZiGMsLdyb0uD35R9wVHF=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been coming here for Summer lunches on campus, and they are great! They have all the standard diner fare, and an absolutely phenomenal beer selection. You have to access them by walking through campus, but they are worth it. The bartender/waiter Matt is so much fun to hang out with. He’s a hoot - and hanging out with him always makes for a fun visit.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Omar Perez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3HKMm51lzS3rVxEfbZTdlgFsh6fdOrnTsxi5vjXwcNXNC1zQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great food, great beer selection, and great service. Matt and the ownership definitely know what they are doing. Matt’s energy and service have made me a regular, I always enjoy walking into Shores Diner.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bradley Williams","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXDCfQnfGK37gdNk6wvV8jgE2w9YUL25Mx9z4PZ0Fxl84xOYRw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great vibes in here. Nice selection of draft beer. Interesting concept of the soju drinks. Really cool diner concept being here on UCSD campus with really prices from college students. Food menu is simple and straight to the point no room for error. Bartender and staff were very attentive to my needs.
Only cons is the parking situation besides that definitely recommend

Juke box is a nice touch","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joy Zhou","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVtf5_ESCXpAakKs02QGnuCtVnkF7M51yw3xVJKIWRyo_bXQo7L0g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We love this place, particularly Matt( the adorable guy working with the bar, occasionally with Orioles hat on !!!) user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Gerry E","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7YW8MqrhOmY6fI1CaAkQSBB4aOgEFwhVgy4wpSrt6rtlJ6Ism=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time in this place and it was a great experience. Went on a week night and place was pretty much open. Of course to be safe, we called first if there was a wait time.
We were seated right away and the menu selections offered a good variety of seafood, salads, pasta and steak.
Very nice atmosphere, soft lighting, quiet so conducive to conversations. Of course it was not at all crowded. May be a different atmosphere on a weekend.
Will definitely come back if we find our way back to La Jolla soon.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID06_afQw&fid=0x0:0xa45953dcabd4096a"],"When":"2019-11-1"},{"Name":"Ryan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQYXWHiZJRttAcEchwfnex2SDcrNvNlteiexPfns93kbMAHTTX8A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Overall, the experience was just okay. Service felt rushed by the server, food lacked flavor, and the atmosphere felt blah. Certainly has potential to be great.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Embersign","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXvfvd8uM7lyOmXmdAUp2A0EmzJsf-zTVZ5R9gVKhuzYhvJVWs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lovely atmosphere and the seating is very comfortable.  Plant life speckles the room for a relaxing experience. The tree cover outside makes it feel very pleasantly isolated from the busy streets.

My favorite, must-do dish is the Acai Bowl. It's smooth sorbet, decked out with a delectable arrangement of berries,  bananas, and kiwi, topped with a light honey that doesnt overpower the flavor or texture of the rest of the dish. The granola tastes amazing and stays crunchy through the whole experience. Love it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC2zem7iAE&fid=0x0:0xa45953dcabd4096a"],"When":"2022-4-26"},{"Name":"Michael Vo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJgYv4rxVuvnGXtwlO6cu3Dp-M1J-u4VBM4uNfHs9sfnwvITA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Small restaurant in the Sheraton. Had the ribeye and filet migon. Both were cooked really well. Service was wonderful.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC0_ZHJWw&fid=0x0:0xa45953dcabd4096a"],"When":"2019-10-8"},{"Name":"Balachander Padmanabha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV9X6YSKIKoCf5EsBUB_vgXW1LFmjpmXXTn9Avc9ZbH0k4yM_rkzw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Decent restaurant for breakfast if you're staying at the Sheraton!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDRkOmyoAE&fid=0x0:0xa45953dcabd4096a"],"When":"2023-4-15"},{"Name":"Bob Reinecke","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVSKsXDJlaPr3W3Kc8Unph_evUoZfCVJQGyoi56Ex0b_cjFnadopA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stayed at Sheraton and decided to check out the restaurant. The food was excellent. The prices were surprisingly very reasonable. Good selection of entrees. Did I mention the food was great. The service was pleasantly wonderful. I ordered the Lamb chops and my fiancee enjoyed the Halibut, Macadamia encrusted. Dessert was Butterscotch custard. Highly recommend. And after dinner slide over to the bar for some Karaoke.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"tien tran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX0LEA_tqkPkXSyoVOU8Huv1zdcToPYplfYx3bkZfezt08kWzA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Our waiter was great but man the food was not. We ordered salmon and asparagus which was grilled well, almost perfectly but it was drenched in hoisin sauce. Our risotto was cooked well but was so salty I couldn’t eat it. So even though the food was cooked well, it was seasoned badly.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shawna Yearick","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIiCM7fnnGzeJlXjnDuYk-iHlqatn5E35yJUJ0-Y1bz6obRQw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is a hidden gem! I really wasn't expecting to be impressed after seeing they have almost no reviews. We went for breakfast and got the bread pudding French toast and the Lox&bagel. Both were so good and authentic! The service was excellent. Very reasonably priced and opens really early in the morning! Even though the menu isn't huge with endless options, the options they do have are seriously so delicious.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Ruben Gonzalez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUdB32gjlPKzpNKD-7tTmRJ1oZyCxd7PwRyt3G9XjxDiq3ThxG5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fettuccine Ortolana was very good, pasta is fresh, cream sauce was just right. Our server Danko knew the menu well and recommended their special of the day, risotto with scallops, calamari and lobster on top. It was very good.  Plates are a good size portion, not too little or too much. Their house made Belgium chocolate bread pudding with ice cream alone would have me coming back. Prices are fair. overall we’re glad we chose this spot for dinner and would definitely come back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDdCWuQpPc6VXT6x1f9fFXj&fid=0x0:0xae2829d687680c51"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"AJ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWtIi-cOuSHsCiIRiR9BjKnsvEeYdoA7D6byFlAXCqhWqD4lp4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Filetto Rustico was definitely a solid main course.
The gorgonzola mushroom sauce had a beautiful depth of flavor that really complemented the meat perfectly.
For the sides, the broccoli was done well, but the carrots were much firmer than I prefer, which was the only slight miss.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCMOIriwjrH7W6_nS7N--bc&fid=0x0:0xae2829d687680c51"],"When":"2025-12-11"},{"Name":"username","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7s_wnJs6O3HGVBQmHgreXGusI91Ub7CchjN43l_mP0ROY9aoB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We loved this place. The food was super delicious. Probably the best lasagna I ever had. The meat and cheese seemed really high quality. The beet salad was also super fresh and perfect. Really charming ambiance here, it has homey rustic decor going on and felt very authentic. Would 100% recommend this place and look for the next I'm visiting SD","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD382Fudqbd2Qe2xqa6JFcg&fid=0x0:0xae2829d687680c51"],"When":"2025-9-11"},{"Name":"Rachel K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZmGccH-VlxyOWWhNvg5PUB040iU7XjCvnuteyAybpqyQw6oJZzA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I tried this restaurant because of the many positive reviews (also my friend recommended), but the food was very disappointing. It honestly felt like I was misled by the reviews.

The kids’ meatball spaghetti was one of the least tasty we’ve ever had, and the black linguine with seafood in white wine sauce was also surprisingly bland. The clam chowder tasted watered down.

The server was very friendly and the atmosphere was somewhat cozy, but overall, the food did not meet expectations and I wouldn’t return.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAWH2M9RP6QPszB39yTRoyM&fid=0x0:0xae2829d687680c51"],"When":"2025-11-19"},{"Name":"Maria Mnatsakanova","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvXbwttzyydYB06fa8wV9HX-aAoYsibNJz1nzDLykVyyDfSmr3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful spot, the service was great. I didn’t enjoy my Barramundi as much as I was hoping to - it was a special, but I am sure there are some other items on the menu that are great.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBqUTr9lKQweVdzcGn3ddpV&fid=0x0:0xae2829d687680c51"],"When":"2025-10-11"},{"Name":"Bay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVe_GrQCJA8u0-7Ug3FM0VqygNRyZBYVi_to8mEa8-mM4mx-QKg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This restaurant offers delicious authentic Italian food, their atmosphere is so nice and feels like you're in Italy. Customer service is excellent! Loved the food and the wine, highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAc7pqZWslPHZAD0oE0hGZJ&fid=0x0:0xae2829d687680c51"],"When":"2025-8-4"},{"Name":"Jason Koerner","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ5oyZ23bUtQZRJJfHlONF2L93jFl6VWY8rAQ0buqaghRDWpQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The food was really good.
Service was not great. I had to ask if there were any specials, he pointed to board behind me and said they are on there, well... I don't have eyes in the back of my head so he asked if I'd like to hear them. (I didn't ask for the specials and be like nah nevermind, was just wondering) He went over them and I was interested in the black ink noodles with shrimp, clams and lobster.
After we were delivered our food, he never came back over to check on us until after we were done eating and still didn't ask how the food was. He just asked if we wanted dessert or the check. We said we'll take the check, this took another 5 plus minutes for him to bring us the check. Keep in mind, they were not busy.
As we were waiting for the check three people were seated next to us with two smaller dogs, one was on a leash and kinda roaming around the other was in the lady's arms pretty much on top of the table. I don't mind dogs but in a restaurant seems to be a little much and the pugs were not service dogs. Plus the one dog on the leash jumped on the server when he was taking their drink order. There is a time and place for dogs and a restaurant isn't one","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBq2Ui2ASMC-pdxx0iM3F5D&fid=0x0:0xae2829d687680c51"],"When":"2025-7-8"},{"Name":"Janet Gentile","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVUDoBOEvNLQ7U6XvrM_bTO7Ud5uAGRkx3GhUExkKpEexbh2Hox=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My husband and I just had our 46th anniversary dinner at Osteria Romantica and it was SUPERB in every way!!!!! Delicious cheese ravioli and tortellini bolognese! Service was great from Simone, and Fabio, the owner, was there to welcome us like we were special guests invited into his home!!! To top it off, the prices are soo reasonable!!’
Best choice of where to spend our evening!!!","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Sara Carrizales","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVffPhxxesgnFTuJUXEt36F95e54cZQsdBME4poeUUE6FdlXxaxEg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Literally the best beach for families in San Diego. Lots of safety patrol - both helicopter and in trucks, pristine sandy area, and just an all around great atmosphere. Surfers, walkers/joggers, and families all sharing the park beach area together. Also great restrooms with showers. Such a great day on the beach here!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhChp8YV3TyJo8y_kbU0Bje8&fid=0x0:0x81095a613450d85c"],"When":"2026-1-11"},{"Name":"Outlaw Fishing","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXetT9sBWKFK7xgt3FjbR7SwZIN_zXEvmdtfDG2t1KZGSNbFhH65g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an absolute blast at La Jolla Shore Park! The scenery is stunning, and getting to see sea lions and seals up close was unforgettable. They were lounging on the rocks, swimming around, and put on quite the show — such an amazing experience, especially for the kids.

The park was clean, easy to walk around, and perfect for relaxing, taking photos, or just soaking in the ocean views. Definitely a must-visit spot if you’re in the area. Can’t wait to come back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCn7nv7H3wdp7iGSgYzxSkZ&fid=0x0:0x81095a613450d85c"],"When":"2025-10-21"},{"Name":"Brandi Sealy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKZElAsJuzVEi1ml1yBAYo6vR_y5fDf-SopuV4PUgukxO9kCg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The hardest part was getting there, tourists at our finest lol. The parking lot to beachfront is short and easy, can be a little bit of wait or circling for a spot. Came to stay all day. Showers and restrooms, lifeguards. It got crowded but not overly. Sea loins up the coast not far from beach, neat to see them. Beach was clean, people were kind. Lifeguards did a great job. Beautiful day.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAAXZV_6uMiJD0SZR8PgVbi&fid=0x0:0x81095a613450d85c"],"When":"2025-8-12"},{"Name":"Theresa Komperda","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLSXVrweSoTaQlQu5q2dkra0eklaGxT1C8K9whGioWHAqc8lA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful public beach, except the furthest hotel sent out a security guard and told us that this area of the BEACH IS PRIVATE,  SO WHY DON'T THEY HAVE A SIGN AND PERMIT FROM THE CITY OF SAN DIEGO????  WE WEREN'T THE ONLY ONES KICKED OUT!!! After walking from the pier to the EXCLUSIVE HOTEL WITH THEIR OWN PRIVATE BEACH, THIS HOTEL NEEDS TO BE ON A PRIVATE ISLAND,  SO THEY CAN HAVE THEIR PRIVATE BEACH!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBTBzwIIm_dNFI2sO3OWGdm&fid=0x0:0x81095a613450d85c"],"When":"2025-10-1"},{"Name":"UGURCAN SAHIN","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWPRiMBSLywwPMfXAf_qqRFavYQztBqqQhoQN5j7p3s_f8tXDgYgw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It’s a beautiful beachfront spot where you can easily walk and enjoy long strolls throughout the day. The area isn’t too big but feels open enough. Walking here during sunset and watching the palm trees is truly relaxing. If you stay at a nearby hotel, you can walk straight from your room to the beach. Restrooms and showers are free and cleaned regularly, but they’re not spotless. Parking is also free, but finding a spot can be tricky, so it’s best to come early. You can bring your own food and drinks and enjoy them comfortably while you’re here. Overall, it’s peaceful, safe and perfect for families and couples. Highly recommend spending a day just watching the ocean, listening to the waves and feeling the breeze. It’s a place that really calms your mind and lifts your spirit. 🌴✨","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB8IX4xHzcB95HaFJc9P7Xn&fid=0x0:0x81095a613450d85c"],"When":"2025-7-11"},{"Name":"Brittany Bedford","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXQ7OLzu9YKbRs4zNiRPgoxyeCPCZQJskDgBbqNXtVEzGgV5TA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Stunning beach area with some concerns about safety and maintenance
We spent our final 2 days of our 1-year anniversary vacation at La Jolla Surfers Beach (12/30-12/31/25), and the natural beauty here is absolutely stunning! The beach, mountains, rocks, and water are gorgeous. It’s mostly a clean area with lots of surfers, and there are bathrooms and showers available.
We had an amazing time and spent a lot of hours here over both days. On the second day it poured rain, so we walked the beach during breaks in the weather and sat in our car watching the waves and surfers when it was raining.
However, there are some concerns that detract from this beautiful area:
Dog policy not enforced: There are signs everywhere stating “No pets or dogs on the beach,” but there were dogs everywhere. If it’s the rule, it should be enforced.
Homeless encampments: There were a lot of camper vans and vehicles with people clearly living out of them. A couple looked like they’d been posted up for a while with surfboards and yard ornaments left around their sleeping spots on the ground. I understand people fall on hard times, but public parks and beaches are meant for everyone to come and go—not for free permanent housing.
Safety concerns at bathrooms: Over the 2 days we were there, we observed 2-3 men who appeared to be drinking heavily and essentially “guarding” the bathroom/shower area with cups in hand. Over time, their condition visibly deteriorated—from standing and being quiet to barely being able to walk and trying to talk to everyone. One stayed in his truck most of the time drinking, only getting out for bathroom breaks or refills.
While these individuals weren’t directly bothering anyone, their presence made the bathroom area feel unsafe and uncomfortable. This is a beautiful beach that deserves better maintenance and enforcement of basic rules.
The area itself is worth visiting for its natural beauty, but the city needs to address these issues to keep it safe and welcoming for families and tourists.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Daniel Chang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXQAMFdd4w4TuArZRqDbFPjw74kQmm-jz3d9eA3LLNejEY7yIw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful beach with facilities to wash and clean after swimming, snorkeling, or surfing. Finding a parking space could be difficult after 9 AM and on weekends.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAHd5fd1HSDN2lo-1gTIf2D&fid=0x0:0x81095a613450d85c"],"When":"2025-12-6"},{"Name":"Jennifer Buckley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWCnnreGogN7F72-cBC_Xa8PeB_4VKki_D7aoO-rDeVYNkmHRg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Gorgeous Sunset and pics taken! Sea Lions bathing and lounging were an amazing addition to the already stunning natural backdrop. The only thing I can complain about is parking- it fills quickly and we were lucky to get a spot. Very enjoyable place!","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Richard R.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU5q5trGJ3itme82ke2tnUhGp84rNcFHbHpMod8lqpEcqfce-w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Back for lunch today and the same great experience and the delicious food. See photos of today’s selections.

One of my companions was in the mood for a sandwich and boy did we find a great place. I had never been here before and was with two vegans. The menu was extensive and a huge amount of vegetarian and vegan options. The service was prompt and friendly. There is a kiosk system, but someone at the counter did the ordering for us. We had the vegan bon mi sandwiches all around!  They were wonderful. Tofu, some type of mayonnaise, Sriracha something sweet lettuce, etc. etc. etc. The bread was soft inside crusty on the outside. We also had a side of dill pickle potato salad made with vegan mayonnaise that we shared. It was also superb. Will be a definite stop when I am able to get here. I am kind of glad there are none of these in my area as I would be here much too frequently.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKENrtpcv03cL7Ww&fid=0x0:0x8f8ef46d68186aee"],"When":"2025-5-26"},{"Name":"Josh H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXymVw5FpQsNpoopyGX4s442cRJPawDkBLq4TIP1_HqMhtFl6yv=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mendocino Farms is a delicious restaurant and a great place to come for amazing sandwiches. They also have some incredible juices available for drinks, and I'd recommend trying them if you stop in.
We got the "not so fried" chicken and Peruvian steak sandwiches, and both were delicious. This was our 4th or 5th time here, and we keep coming back to these 2 sandwiches. I recommend the "not so fried" chicken for your first time. It comes with a delicious bbq sauce to put on the sandwich, and you won't regret choosing this one.
We also highly recommend grabbing a drink while here, as their options are unique and tasty. I always get the pomegranate mint lemonade, as it's my favorite and a great summer drink on the hot days!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD1kFYF4_wY71VRwiWcmvom&fid=0x0:0x8f8ef46d68186aee"],"When":"2025-7-8"},{"Name":"Maria Mnatsakanova","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUvXbwttzyydYB06fa8wV9HX-aAoYsibNJz1nzDLykVyyDfSmr3=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Updated review:
I had the most amazing meal yesterday, when I came back to San Diego after a long flight. The Steak and Chimichurri Sandwich and lemon chicken soup were incredibly delicious! I highly recommend!!!

Previous review:
Mendocino Farms calls itself a sandwich market, and they do a great job at that. It’s one of my go-to catering restaurants - I always get great service, good quality, and delicious food. Delivery is seamless every time.

I gave 3 stars for atmosphere just because I don’t enjoy dining in - it’s fast-paced and not cozy. But to be fair, they don’t claim to be that kind of place.

Overall, the rating is still 5, because this is genuinely a great spot to get sandwiches.

My most popular repeat orders: Chicken Pesto Caprese, Not So Fried Chicken Sandwich, Turkey Avo Salsa Verde, The Farm Club, and Mario’s Caprese.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCtGIiM5hLOB2PFU5AY_ZzL&fid=0x0:0x8f8ef46d68186aee"],"When":"2025-8-11"},{"Name":"I C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWIilwnzYutoziA5ZHGp_WNQaMYCMsJ-Yf6lrbHhDTQRu9YruOL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This was my first time here. It is really fresh and delicious. They have a variety of great salads, soups, and sandwiches. I did find that this is very family friendly. Lots of children and kids menu available. There were a lot of call head orders, and the place was busy. So plan ahead or expect to wait at least fifteen minutes for your food.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBDNDEO5Qy63gPU5w1kcN3W&fid=0x0:0x8f8ef46d68186aee"],"When":"2025-6-27"},{"Name":"Nooor Khan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUh_8p-_pCty7ntdk4R5H7RxNfu-AEPvFJLejrl1gqM8R_M2TKY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Calm place to go eat, spacious, and also have a small patio outside with heaters. Been here couple times with my friend when we want to catch up. We like it because the food is good and it’s chill. However, it is on the pricier side and the portion size of food you get is not much for the price. Depending on how much you eat, this place could serve as a type of snack or appetizer for some. Additionally the times I have visited this place with my friend, the employees who have taken our orders seem upset or not happy to be there which makes it feel like we’re annoying them more by ordering together or something. Other than that everyone else seems friendly. My friend ordered this tangerine seasonal salad that she loved, a chocolate cookie and a lemonade drink. You are able to choose from the lemonade options they have such as guava, pomegranate with mint, and a green one of some sort (which was empty) meaning it could be the most popular. There are also fountain drinks to choose from as well. I ordered the half sandwich with a deli side combo and my friend convinced me to get a cookie as well. I got the turkey sandwich with the pesto pasta salad. Everything was delicious! The pomegranate lemonade was also super refreshing and great! I also recommend the guava one.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDoirz_ogE&fid=0x0:0x8f8ef46d68186aee"],"When":"2025-4-23"},{"Name":"Shannon Spates","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUNFWZh7x8ncrm9QFQp-YtYKGTvCAX8A7CwGmA3dBVP9m6m-cFv=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I met Holly Ward  and Andy the LaJolla location GM at Mission Valley mall when they were there with other restaurants promoting their businesses and I entered the contest to win lunch for my office. I was absolutely ecstatic when I won and my office was so impressed with the amazing lunch Holly delivered to us!! The sandwiches and sides, salad and cookies were so delicious and they accommodated everyone’s dietary restrictions!
My favorite was the Steak and Bacon Chimichurri sandwich and also thoroughly enjoyed the Quinoa and Avocado Superfood Salad….and the cookies were great too!! Overall, it’s a solid place to try if you’re in the area,  I’d probably go back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCQ1p3bQg&fid=0x0:0x8cc7c9ea5610dbce"],"When":"2025-3-4"},{"Name":"sook75","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKEQeTiFvjmNEkBLnPw5FS1HF9-7uQ7SzIH0-nrHRcXAp1h3dPvQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I went there with a friend yesterday and had a dish with spicy pork and another with seafood rice. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Mariam Alobaidi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVgCaF0tVtR7R13Umr6-_eDGSPUwyDGG6rEXmYINmnwqSCAbTeDvA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Namino is a small hole in the wall spot, but the food was definitely delicious. We ordered a mixed plate, the eggplant dip as an appetizer, and a small Shirazi salad, and everything was flavorful and satisfying.

The staff was super nice, respectful, and patient, which made the experience even better. I would definitely visit again. The only small note is that I wish the bread was a bit different, but overall it was a great meal and worth checking out.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDCHwWFOyy78ssuTG7qraJx&fid=0x0:0xc704d2b3bbefadd1"],"When":"2026-1-12"},{"Name":"Brandon Nolte","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtoI3lwUCA8iBkLYqFo-PJFi8nZL1hASn6zauNOtNn1h7iNciedg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent Persian food. The beef kebab was incredibly tender and packed with flavor, easily the standout and a must-order. The salmon was also very tasty. Prices run a bit high, but the quality makes it worth it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBYiXs_IYhJY3-_hZaWB8st&fid=0x0:0xc704d2b3bbefadd1"],"When":"2026-1-2"},{"Name":"Shahbaz Salehi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWsbgr6SmAPEhFmhmcaR78qqYW_wrDDZL7lwNuJ2NTZt_LiQl41=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We were in the neighborhood and decided to check out this restaurant since the reviews seemed good. When we arrived, it turned out to be a small, hole-in-the-wall spot with non-Persian staff. We decided to give it a try and ordered one Sultani. Unfortunately, the koobideh was overly salty, and the barg didn’t look or taste right—it resembled koobideh instead. It was overcooked on the outside and undercooked on the inside. The service could use more training; I had to ask individually for basic items that should come with the meal. The rice was barely warm and couldn’t even melt the butter. Overall, the Sultani was below average, and for this price point and location, it felt overpriced. I won’t be returning.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAT0F_XqU-IL3_3SP6m3XKd&fid=0x0:0xc704d2b3bbefadd1"],"When":"2025-10-20"},{"Name":"Sheida Aghdaie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIVdswGb4uhjWcrSafZcZxL7S890BDNTQ7MF4n7SdAjLhtslg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an absolutely wonderful experience at this restaurant. The food was incredibly delicious, fresh, and full of flavor. The service was outstanding — everyone was so kind, attentive, and professional. The atmosphere was warm and welcoming, and the prices were very reasonable for the quality.

Everything was truly excellent. I highly recommend this place and will definitely be coming back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCzSo0_PK3ysVo-U6LB3Nqi&fid=0x0:0xc704d2b3bbefadd1"],"When":"2025-12-2"},{"Name":"Mehrdad Zandigohar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW_fA-EIVzpAEyR5jFsSfduhwEkldoWTghu-KiEc3W8NkKAqI0m=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a wonderful experience at Namino! Ali agha was incredibly kind and welcoming, and he really made sure we were having a great time. The service was fast, and every dish we tried was fantastic: ghormeh sabzi, koubideh, halim, and ash were all full of flavor and felt truly authentic. We also had tea, dough, and khaksheer, and everything was perfect from start to finish. Highly recommend this place!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAq7pVyuQ9mL4mYoMTZ275w&fid=0x0:0xc704d2b3bbefadd1"],"When":"2025-10-10"},{"Name":"Ryan E","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7XvOOFtWQgQtJOz7RcfDC2roTx6pmmqnfi2Tri8_MLoA9sAbINw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were in the area and stopped by for lunch. We ordered the beef koobideh kabob, chicken kabob, and the Saturday Special Ash. The beef koobideh and chicken kabob were both flavorful and solid as always. The stand out was the Ash - a stew with lentils, herbs, beans and meat. It was delicious and comforting. We always look forward to our meals here and can't wait to try out more daily specials. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBdarqFvH8XKTfrfL78YMJq&fid=0x0:0xc704d2b3bbefadd1"],"When":"2025-12-1"},{"Name":"Amin Mahmoodi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXetihdhzw6HOZeTR8Lq0tH4aTdXk1aSOsJj_-s1LL4t6SDqwHX=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Filet kabob, Ash, and Halim were all absolutely incredible. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"943stacyl","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeWB0GIG9gGd6g9zDFXwjE9TRuKRtAO6HvwA5jEdK_CrOJXcVxp8esjQRYTFMjay2JK=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"We have stayed here several times, the staff is amazing. I wish the rooms were more updated and that the distinct smell could be cleaned from it. It just still seems “old”. I really love this place and would stay if it could be updated even more with the bathroom fixtures, walls, and flooring. When I asked if the construction was to update the rooms- they told me it was to update the balconies. I feel like the insides should be updated first. But overall, staying directly on the beach is awesome and the price is great for it!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Danisha Henry","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVz-t06KeiylgauEMHIhF8NpSETjgAytoTtDks6W0HAzCjsqIqp=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dining at The Shores Restaurant is a true La Jolla experience, offering beautiful oceanfront views and a relaxed beachside atmosphere. The setting alone makes it worth the visit, with stunning scenery that pairs perfectly with a casual yet inviting vibe.

The food was enjoyable, with a solid menu that offers something for everyone, from fresh coastal dishes to classic favorites. What truly elevated our experience, however, was the service. Our waitress, Sarahi, was absolutely amazing — attentive, friendly, and genuinely welcoming. She checked on us regularly, made great recommendations, and ensured everything was perfect without ever being intrusive. Her professionalism and warmth made our meal even more enjoyable.

Whether you’re stopping in after a walk along the shore or planning a sunset meal with a view, The Shores Restaurant delivers a memorable experience. Between the ocean views, relaxed ambiance, and standout service from Sarahi, it’s a place we’d happily return to.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"debrawL8990TM","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QchZeuqqdsc2mxTzAL46o1Zp-eQpx0fXItgIlFx_-eADsDQzpyjY9GuirM6XH9EgCdepg=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"The room was very quiet, a great bed, wonderful staff and beach view if you stand up. It's great that they except dogs. Since they're remodeling you should know there are less amenities. Until it's remodeled "resort" is a stretch. Luxury rooms is a complete miss for the money. The beach helps make up for that but not enough.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"O5087KTcarolynm","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QfCm-MBS7Itwd4h-55xcyygsVKq1IZbUTNyg17UKkQsT2C3oSXBlQ_-pGTl8imnrFVtVw=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"The beach/ocean view was 10/10 and the major reason why we chose this hotel over others in the area. Our balcony was clean and very comfortable, and I spent many enjoyable hours enjoying the view and sea air from it. The room itself was also quite comfortable, though the only bathroom in our 4-person suite was accessed through the separate bedroom. It's not a common problem in hotels with this type of room, and if we'd been staying with friends vs. family it would have been uncomfortable.||||The pool and hot tub were not in service during our stay, and while a shuttle was provided to another hotel with those amenities, I wish we had known that the on-site facilities were closed before we arrived.||||Overall, though, we thoroughly enjoyed our time at the La Jolla Shores Hotel, and I would stay here again on a future trip to the beach.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jamo Urban","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVYUwjyoaXKMnNBi_1vFdWve3pKfKPgsqjjWMcjtBkbd3OjRrGu=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Very frustrating experience. We have been traveling prior to our stay at the property. We really needed to wash some of our clothes. None of the dryers worked, spent multiple hours trying to get the clothes dried. Mention something to the front desk multiple times and the only response was they couldn’t fix it and it would have to wait. Now our room is filled with wet clothes. This is our fourth time staying at the property and I am unsure I will be back. I love the location, but the amenities and staff interaction is a bit underwhelming.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"JESSICA LEE","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ8eEDVJPMTTVNrYY5UZ8rJx6C-VlDizIDUAZVTgs1bIdSl2CDc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"We stayed in an oceanfront room and the view was absolutely stunning. The service was wonderful, and the free shuttle was incredibly helpful. I truly wanted to leave a 5-star review, but everything changed on our last night when new guests checked into the connecting room beside us. Because there was only a locked door between our rooms, the noise insulation was basically zero. We could hear every single word they said — it genuinely sounded like they were talking inside our room, right in front of us. We also heard every cabinet opening, coffee stirring, and their 7am alarm that woke us up hours earlier than planned. The guests weren’t doing anything wrong; they were just living normally. The real issue is the hotel’s poor soundproofing and the decision to put strangers in connecting rooms. Everything else about the stay was great, but this made our last night extremely uncomfortable.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Angel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIG9_jV1G3tGKlVwKSlChoNLQj-XsA8Iula8lhuMFPlGFiqcgOk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Location is great! Room horrible!!!! We were in the garden view room the room Location itself was fine. The smell of the room was horrible!!! It smelled like mold! The air conditioner made noise all night and didnt help with the smell or didnt keep the room at a cooler temp. Rooms needs to be updated! I would not stay here again for the price I paid you except nicer cleaner rooms. Food was just okay nothing great about it just the Location. The drinks from the bar just okay, the breakfast was pretty good even tho the waiter got my order wrong I just decided to eat it because I hate sending food back. The golden hour latte I had in the morning was the only thing I truly enjoyed from this place. I think I can be pretty fair and open minded when it comes to reviewing places but this place I will not be staying at again you pay over 1,500.00 to stay at a nicer place for a couple days and this is not what I expected to get. Service was rude I was denied moving rooms but to be honest the other room my friends were in smelled the same way and the rooms they were cleaning while you passed by smelled the same way. Was not happy with this stay.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Adventure18117962168","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QfjHmZg8gr7jpDgKhrh5KsR_Mq7L6pkVedvpKQz-f3LMiOd3OjI90CK4uLtF3wE59zZgA=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Hotel experience was great from many aspects, Large rooms, great location, and most staff (sales, frontdesk etc)  were excellent.  However we had a bad experience with the Catering/Conference Service Manager. Customer engagement in friendly and cooperative manner was sorely lacking- constant citing of policy, lack of willingness to work with us and a feeling of charging for every little ask was disheartening.   We felt that every opportunity to squeeze another buck was a central focus.  for that one reason we give the hotel a low rating","Images":null,"When":""}]
