user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Carol B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ6eRfZkpiRTc4dPnwhnedvnr1iDJuZqML8xBc2fCoE1PWxhQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"First of all, Don’t let the pictures fool you. We booked the New Year’s Eve 5 course dinner to celebrate with our family (5 people) and were extremely disappointed, especially for a meal that cost over $1,200 While the dishes looked good visually, the flavors were very poor and inconsistent. The halibut was either overly salty or had no salt at all, the short rib did not taste like short rib and was served barely warm, almost cold, and the scallops crudo was not flavorful and did not taste fresh. The cheese course was very basic, with cheeses you can easily find at a grocery store. Desserts did not save the experience. The cheesecake was bad and the only reasonable item was the lemon tart. We brought our family expecting a special night, but most people barely ate. For the price and the occasion, the experience was unacceptable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDipeAsaEZtOrxEGRu16dnm&fid=0x0:0xc879800b1726097b"],"When":"2026-1-15"},{"Name":"Danielle Coleman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjURyH6AnYwZVlN5hZszatFaZN0wKw-dZkKay79OyS9Bsm5S__SGyA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The atmosphere of this restaurant is beautiful, however the service is mediocre. At one point our waitress disappeared for a good 45 mins. It took a long time to receive the food which did not taste fresh. We had the shrimp pasta and chicken plate. They give a very underwhelming amount of flavorless chicken with beets on the side, a very interesting combo. The shrimp pasta was a good proportion but tasted like frozen food.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBqWqb6CQp_Qk65AD0stajL&fid=0x0:0xc879800b1726097b"],"When":"2025-10-11"},{"Name":"Pasha Javadi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUqF2Uh5tyxwzPruAk0S_RIavhf8ZEx_Sa--oPc9XoH6y4GhRey=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We visited this restaurant for the beautiful terrace, and it absolutely delivered—spacious, charming, and perfect for a relaxing evening. The atmosphere was lively but not too loud, making it a great spot to unwind. The staff were friendly and attentive throughout the night, which really added to the overall experience.

The starters were a pleasant surprise—flavorful and well-prepared, with the Brussels sprouts standing out as a real highlight. Unfortunately, the mains didn’t quite live up to the setting. Both the filet mignon and the chicken were overcooked, which was disappointing given the quality we expected.

Overall, a great place for drinks, light bites, and a beautiful terrace evening—but if you’re going for the main courses, you might want to manage your expectations.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCYpKOnZQ&fid=0x0:0xc879800b1726097b"],"When":"2025-5-1"},{"Name":"Wandering in Paradise","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSLRkcVKfn8mGP8HPJKIma5T3q5jdsoxt7AmvtkP6bVJnf5lw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Magical dining experience at the stunning Mediterranean Room in the La Valencia Hotel in La Jolla. Sitting on the dog friendly patio you can see a beautiful view of the ocean and downtown La Jolla. We enjoyed the red wine, Oaxacan Spanish octopus, striped sea bass, and coffee crusted lamb. The service was friendly, quick, and accommodating. Recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCRV-rdvSSsOL1-2-tSZwq9&fid=0x0:0xc879800b1726097b"],"When":"2025-10-25"},{"Name":"Carrie Glad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWP7sszhdTDZGzuZ79XROVWW0pzJzavmKrPGYYHCl0t7MmC-rD8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent food with stunning views of the ocean. Easy to get seated, service is top notch and quick.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAXTxkG4aBVgqOoOrGLRrng&fid=0x0:0xc879800b1726097b"],"When":"2025-11-26"},{"Name":"Janelle Radak","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXaAx1fJzjm8s21fMS1sIg9evQN7DZEQKnQWaSLP5lpC_TQG_8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I attended the Holiday tea on 12/19 and it was one of the best Teas I have attended!
Ashley and Aaron waited on myself and my mother in law and they were fantastic!

I have a nut allergy and had mentioned it when I made the reservation months ago and they took me by surprise when they brought out a fully separate plate with all the items that they knew there fully nut free and did not mix with any of the pastries that had nuts in them.
It was such a nice touch and made the tea less stressful!

We plan to return to the Spring Tea as well!

The only “issue” was that as we enjoyed the table and food so much that we sipped our tea slowly and the tea did get cold after 1.5 hours since there was not anything to keep it warm.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Midilee D. Limsiaco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUt-2jlCJvz2ut5_B-jal7bSIh73ZBbkAiI0Aaqr__FqjatZKnr=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I just enjoyed an excellent meal at the Mediterranean Restaurant at La Valencia Hotel! The chilaquiles were rich, delicious, and incredibly filling. The laid-back vibe and stunning ocean view made it the perfect spot for a relaxing and tasty brunch. I highly recommend it!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBpIGt2UacMdhJDozeWagHm&fid=0x0:0xc879800b1726097b"],"When":"2025-7-28"},{"Name":"Marina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUaSeI3ACml6nYrxeNOk3jrKx1z5lMoF_yTLZz7eG_76y7H7rru7g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Come for drinks only. I love this place for the romantic vibe, flowers, and sea view. Atmosphere is great. The drinks are not going to be up the the standard of speakeasies in SD like Youngblood, Mothership, Remedies, etc., but close enough. I am quite disappointed by the food. The burger/fries was cafeteria quality. The sandwich looked like something I'd slap together at home. The side salad was a pile of greens, nothing else. For those prices, they could fix whatever is wrong with their kitchen. As for the wedding venue, from what I saw of it, it's also overpriced and overhyped unless you're really all in on that slice of ocean horizon. To each their own.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Daniela Alvarado","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU8ClpJSPJK9QN649Kq2a9HHQm0Vn5oY8wWXRkYnNP6q-MkYLDz7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've been to other locations and it's safe to say they maintain the standard across all locations!! Came in on a Sunday for lunch and was so excited to eat but I wanted something healthy.

We walked in and only waited about 2 minutes in line. The inside had plenty of seating with really nice wall art and photos everywhere. The woman working there took our order and was very patient as we asked questions. She was very kind when she gave me the code to the bathroom too.

We ordered a Grains bowl with mixed meats, both chicken and lamb, saffron rice and added romaine lettuce. We also ordered the San Diego wrap and added grilled sirloin steak to it. The grain bowl was so balanced, I added the dill yogurt sauce and the Jalapeño sauce to my bowl which just brought all the flavors together so perfectly. The saffron rice was cooked perfectly also with great flavors the lettuce was crisp, and the red cabbage slaw, picked onions and tomato and cucumber just gave every bite such a fresh taste! It was a perfect meal! The San Diego wrap was well toasted, the fries inside were fresh and the grilled sirloin steak had a nice smokey taste that gave such an authentic flavor to the entire wrap!

Overall, just great place! One of my go too's especially when I want to eat clean or show my friends a new spot! I will definitely be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCyar26N_lxT9cTeGgLnus5&fid=0x0:0x19d164062201bb84"],"When":"2026-1-10"},{"Name":"Awelesombata Morah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLfYjCaINNJBPmKMoSEAdCcUjCuu9LFdOgUFdso5wh6SJYY6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had such a great experience at The Kaba Shop in La Jolla! The store itself is clean, well-organized, and has a welcoming atmosphere  but what really stood out was the amazing customer service. Vanessa, the cashier, was incredibly friendly and helpful from the moment I walked in. She went above and beyond to make sure I found exactly what I needed and did it all with such a cheerful attitude.

It’s rare these days to meet someone who genuinely enjoys helping customers, but Vanessa is truly a delight to work with. Her positivity and professionalism made my visit memorable, and I’ll definitely be coming back because of her. Highly recommend stopping by if you’re in the area!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCb-0pAc3sQtbsF_1p57yEb&fid=0x0:0x19d164062201bb84"],"When":"2025-10-18"},{"Name":"Cassandra Mobley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUdqZOx0e0XK034ScTw3GF4DhY_0vNP_gAeiFM5Zm9CKnyK6phv=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The staff were so sweet, but there is a tablet to order on too if you’re more visual! The food was phenomenal except the rice could have had some more flavor because it kind of tasted watery. Overall, highly recommend this place if in the area!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAId3pU6Y3AsDaSEV3erSNn&fid=0x0:0x19d164062201bb84"],"When":"2025-12-15"},{"Name":"Gen the Agent -","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUcbZ310CxZX6UN7cJjAWWJkL4Q5mbdHO5cmp7aTxZCRfw89nxN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tried this new spot, because I heard the food was good. [{"Name":"Peraza Real Estate","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWgTezZScMQXe4_urCMzp9DhvYS1FbcSyuQSQYgVI5k4PSfbgYE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tried Dough Mama Pizzeria and it absolutely lived up to the hype.
We ordered the traditional wings with their house sauce and the hot honey pizza with red sauce. Both were excellent. The wings were crispy and flavorful, and the pizza had the perfect balance of sweet and heat with a great New York-style crust.What really stands out is the sense of community. You can tell this place genuinely supports local teams and causes, and it feels like a true neighborhood spot. Friendly staff, laid-back atmosphere, and consistently good food.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCipk5DwZ762iQPuzZmH3Wr&fid=0x0:0x389c95dcfd6ac160"],"When":"2026-1-28"},{"Name":"Angela C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVq9EId3pCpyX0vLO7vdcu-RgCzWlCh259eYNzytWIa2yDTpfeQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The pizza here totally hit the spot! We took it to the beach and it was perfect New York-style, flavorful, and we loved adding ricotta. The salad wasn’t our fave (a bit too much arugula), but that pizza? So good. Even the ranch was great. Simple, satisfying, and exactly what we needed for a beach night.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDN_ZZ8hc2B65-AGLaKFBqO&fid=0x0:0x389c95dcfd6ac160"],"When":"2025-10-23"},{"Name":"Ruby Rodriguez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX3De1zH9E-fG0enYYztnIjzpn2y_fiUrXcxgnkPkVqe6kfsg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I walk in and it seemed BUSY!! TIKTOK did it's thing!! The girl at the counter was acknowledging walk ups, making wing orders, and answering phone. The two chefs in the back were making pizzas like the pros they are. I wanted their 2 slices and a beer ($14 deal) but they ran out of pizza, no prob. I got a house blonde, garlic knots and wings traditional. She said here's your beer hang out and give me 10 for the rest. They have a cute outside patio and indoor dinning. Indoor TV had sports, movie and a kid friendly show. After scoping out the patio, I came back inside and she spotted me sitting down apologized for the wait and said we got more slices if you want to take a look. I thought she would have forgotten. I got a slice of meat lovers and she brought it to me. ☺️ Hot Honey is amazing. Great meal after a trip to the aquarium.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alex R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlwG3eIsiet7qOongD9URermqVSSpK8V8_gErItps6b6h7XcI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great size of pizza and pretty good price especially near the coast! Was expecting it to be more expensive. Good service and really good New York style pizza.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDQO_FoKNTubPD1vHZx-4ri&fid=0x0:0x389c95dcfd6ac160"],"When":"2025-12-31"},{"Name":"Joseph Perez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJpvomQj5c3iFVg-ffHOrONCDmEAJr2278i0w6ndBNvIXz5JQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Tried calling a handful of times before making the 30 minute trip to get some wings after I saw them on Facebook and got no answer! I arrived and figured they'd be slammed with customers but it was pretty dead inside and nobody was on the phone. To top all that off they ran out of wings at 6:30 in the evening!! They advertise 50% off wings all day so it would've been nice to at least save the trip if they would have answered the phone, it was two young girls working the front who couldn't say anything other than "we're cooked!" Was really looking forward to their wings but unfortunately I don't think their service is worth the trip again!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alex Buchanan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUklEQB02xMA-6EgXLGU470KTBm77xQW0hVV7JcvuB2x7qkPWA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We checked out this pizzeria for the first time while exploring La Jolla, and it definitely has that cool, urban, hippie vibe. Still, worth it if you’re not in a rush!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICfgKDLDQ&fid=0x0:0x389c95dcfd6ac160"],"When":"2024-12-25"},{"Name":"Alex Sutedja","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLh-YK5_ra8JVEHXrFxs1iP84njSpImWOi2pr6J4Zf8QdL4Ig=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Plenty of choices for the pizza-by-the-slice! The taste is still good though. I really enjoyed the slight kick of the hot honey and it paired well with the dollops of ricotta.

They also have beers on tap, wings (half off on Wednesdays) and garlic knots.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDQxZ_95AE&fid=0x0:0x389c95dcfd6ac160"],"When":"2025-3-12"},{"Name":"Chris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIl8SC70phttKj_7wAl4XeRjmGgr5lGHxrcM8M7OrXwagxkNQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time ordering pizza from here. Don’t hesitate to try.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Christopher Walton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYnE43je6IvBBH9w53CYtl-sA3_EMCQdy8-6ihJd5W_J6ZyT8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"You ever have a place just call to you? It was almost 10 years ago I was with family and I was just standing outside drawn to this store. The nicest person came out and started talking to me. Little did I know this was the owner and I told him I was unusually drawn to this place. He made his recommendation and that was history. Any time I am on the west coast and I have the time to get here, I make it my soul mission to get a sandwich, and those awesome world famous oatmeal cookies. If you're a local, stop here and support your local business. If you're from out of town, come on by because you will feel welcome and the amazing staff will not lead you in the wrong direction when it comes to an amazing sandwich for you.... and don't forget the cookies!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDATy0WAMrSmCBNWCYUsU6-&fid=0x0:0xb44e42ec8dfaa9a8"],"When":"2026-1-24"},{"Name":"Erica Trittschuh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcGmZ7xAmKxa6VmA9FpYrcfzWdLLf1PTivDzme5Lrc_7xTO7rlkQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious deli sandwiches! We got our sandwiches, chips, and cookies to go. Tuna, turkey avocado, pb&j were all really tasty and fresh. Not too long of a wait to order, or to get our order. They had lots of candy for sale, too.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAc4PNVyRe5N73Oa7E5XoBh&fid=0x0:0xb44e42ec8dfaa9a8"],"When":"2025-11-26"},{"Name":"Lexie Edwards","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXET0uWhURam9G1PEFyqOmwTSQRSPFD_iw1uV_8wvHLIX_4lkS5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We ordered ahead so we could pick up and go to the beach. They were so delicious and filling. We will absolutely be back!! Highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBQLgW7wzpho94kQrbZXH3S&fid=0x0:0xb44e42ec8dfaa9a8"],"When":"2025-6-14"},{"Name":"Gaby Rivera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKLEXITTIBPlhJkV9UL8Q7CsbjzCLxoIxHODAjW30WKMjAkOj9=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"horrible service and food. don’t order the breakfast sandwich unless you like an insane amount of pepper on it. Waste of $8","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA0tYMSe6qWGnur-w48o_Tj&fid=0x0:0xb44e42ec8dfaa9a8"],"When":"2026-1-19"},{"Name":"Eva Pruitt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWEUafDm-L-TeGr51u9HT7UuDF3DwyxnkA1DOQYfvdiymqjMmqi=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Literally the best place ever. Dave and Dan are so sweet and the food is so so good! They have gluten free bread too for any allergens. If Dave is making his homemade tomato soup, you HAVE to try it (dairy free!). Perfect for a beach day or quick lunch and super friendly atmosphere!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKELebuKXs5PrglAE&fid=0x0:0xb44e42ec8dfaa9a8"],"When":"2025-5-12"},{"Name":"C Violaris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLzW1CJ2JIUzN801RHuqw_V5tpwZWlCU2JfVBXoVz0bk_6CgQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nice spot to get a break from the beach.  Sandwiches are good.  Only drawback there is no bathroom to go to, so you use the next door restaurants which is not fare to them....so either you go to another restaurant or take your sandwich to go and don't sit down.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBCI8BEQRe8cH-O9GXSCt2E&fid=0x0:0xb44e42ec8dfaa9a8"],"When":"2025-7-4"},{"Name":"gabriela barajas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJk-P0g6oezg9xpR0tKInED5kAQxTCK10vG-2dfeEjc36fx0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Cheese Shop is a hidden gem that truly impressed me. The roast beef sandwich on sourdough was absolutely delicious. It was one of the best sandwiches I've had in a long time. The flavors were rich and well-balanced, with perfectly tender beef and fresh bread that made every bite memorable.
What really stood out, though, was the exceptional customer service. Dave went above and beyond, offering my friend and me generous samples of their house-made roast beef, vegan tomato soup, and creamy potato salad. All of which were flavorful and thoughtfully prepared.
For dessert, the oatmeal cookie was a delightful surprise: sweet and chewy with a crisp, satisfying outer layer that made it uniquely enjoyable.
This spot has officially earned a place on my list of favorite food finds, and I’ll definitely be returning soon.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDovb2TmwE&fid=0x0:0xb44e42ec8dfaa9a8"],"When":"2025-4-28"},{"Name":"Hayden Ogden","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWm4RIdchWDbu7gxq8vm5MkPFWeoY3FcIMnaKO8NdQAKrBnrHfhQg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing food, get the oatmeal cookie trust me. It’s amazing. Dave the owner has worked there since it opened and is so sweet. All the food is fresh, made the order and you can’t go wrong. I got the Italian grilled cheese and my friend got the famous turkey avocado and  goth were amazing. The hype on TikTok is real for this place. Plenty of outdoor seating and good people watching.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICXm6XUSA&fid=0x0:0xb44e42ec8dfaa9a8"],"When":"2024-10-20"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"lissette pedraza","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUoRuAcdvZsEFSbpZScwuEd7wHWi66HUAMZq9Q4TN9XZFUBo8_ceA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Destiny Coast is a casual spot where you seat yourself first and then order at the register. The service was good and the food was solid — pretty simple but tasty. I ordered the Mediterranean coffee and French toast, and my friend got the burrito. Everything came out nicely made and fresh.

One thing I would definitely recommend: check the weather before you go! The view is the highlight of this restaurant, and on a cloudy or foggy day, it’s just not the same. I went when it was overcast, so it didn’t look like the photos at all — kind of a bummer since the scenery is what really makes the experience special.

We did valet parking for $15, which covered 2 hours. If you don’t want to valet, there’s some street parking available, but it’s on a curvy uphill street. Overall, it’s a good place to grab brunch and enjoy the view — just make sure it’s a clear day to get the full experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAxiM9B8ZqIY59TRs7HjHKs&fid=0x0:0x75786dc941fe6868"],"When":"2025-11-10"},{"Name":"FlowRider 13roz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV1PiXqpcZoVc49N5A8ApxrCJ_Z9N_loNJT1Q55dL7ps2nenI8dfw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Fantastic views and atmosphere. Unfortunately, our crab cake Benedict had poached eggs that were extremely runny—the whites were barely cooked, so we had to send it back. The crispy potatoes were enjoyable but heavily over-seasoned. The smoothie was good, though at $15 plus tax and tip it felt overpriced. Overall, the ingredients were high quality and the flavors had potential, but the execution missed the mark in a few places.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA8MEQMyX5WJnQ_7PNIrVD6&fid=0x0:0x75786dc941fe6868"],"When":"2025-12-21"},{"Name":"Vita & Vox","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXQ4scpln3ripT7aKeiW2l6V85Nsv83px9l1_K0KPFGiqlZCP3Z=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I found this restaurant while hiking, and the location immediately caught my attention — absolutely beautiful and peaceful. The atmosphere and setting easily deserve 5 stars; it’s the kind of place you want to sit and relax for hours.

I came here for lunch with a friend. Unfortunately, the food didn’t quite live up to the setting. My chicken was dry, though the staff were kind enough to replace it with another dish — which I really appreciated. The service was friendly and accommodating.

That said, waiting for the exchange meant everything else got cold, and for $40 a person, it just wasn’t worth it. The cappuccino, however, was excellent — smooth, rich, and perfectly made. If I come back, it’ll be for the cappuccino and the view.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDq05xKyaQMN2geJl3_Vn4d&fid=0x0:0x75786dc941fe6868"],"When":"2025-10-29"},{"Name":"robert","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVXUy36IOa6aP90_iFZ3yrJZWbYIc1z1aFfd9fyFOMFZu0yUm_B=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food here is really good the staff were really nice and the atmosphere was amazing. You order your food and then find a table inside or oustide but more likely outside because the views look amazing. I got the Smashed Local Avocado BLT Tartine which was really good and ended it with a Cherry Almond Turnover. For a drink I got the Pacific Coast Cloud Coffee and the Dragon Fruit Clear Protein Water. It was all very tasty 😋.  It was a little pricey but definitely worth it as the food paires with the view were perfect.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD9dTN7oem38-5XKxQGxJvF&fid=0x0:0x75786dc941fe6868"],"When":"2025-10-17"},{"Name":"Samantha Hardy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJqSq1oe8cQ__E8hhUoinVH5Udp4Hgqs6l7lLbWTzrmCG9_Xg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I cannot say enough good things about this new restaurant.  Delicious, creative food and unparalleled views.  Also close to La Jolla Playhouse; great before or after theatre spot!!  We had breakfast, but they are now open for sunset dinner and the menu looks amazing!  And attentive helpful wait staff!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBDZhEyhx7bzMGb3SgMiSqf&fid=0x0:0x75786dc941fe6868"],"When":"2025-12-8"},{"Name":"Amie Sarte","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUsz7bxDn8D_p2OPS6AK39VCsz-9Rfn4y4A9qbpicjMnEAIPVw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The restaurant with an ocean view. We parked at the street which is great to have few steps before having a meal. I liked the wine country salad, the dressing was perfect. The purple haze latte was good. The blueberry coffee cake was a bit dry inside, I like it because it’s not too sweet. The place was clean. The staff were very nice and friendly. It was lovely when they go around and chat with their guests.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAcJqT45K9P02Mu79tvSkSr&fid=0x0:0x75786dc941fe6868"],"When":"2025-8-10"},{"Name":"Mike T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIzws6HFzUYrmBq-ixVTvn6xVQ4qfTXGxPVSmVmbjfFMaOlXRKt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came here for Sunday brunch and really enjoyed it. As others have mentioned, you’re definitely paying for the view—but the food quality was surprisingly a lot better than expected. We had the Smashed Avocado BLT Toast and the Mahi & Meyer Lemon Sandwich. Both were excellent—the bread was fresh and paired perfectly with the avocado, and the Mahi was cooked just right with the flavorful lemon remoulade. They also offer a nice variety of pastries - all made in house daily. Service was attentive and friendly, and our food came out quickly.

Tips: Visit on weekdays to avoid long waits. Free parking is available on La Jolla Shores Dr., or valet is $15 for the first two hours.

On weekends when they have a waiting list, once you are seated, you go up and order at the counter.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDRYf75EPYbSfvYnyWDp2_V&fid=0x0:0x75786dc941fe6868"],"When":"2025-8-24"},{"Name":"Cindy Freeman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKGQuv01T7jKkj7FzX5hohmVsR0VzJRe5qnCVXDsxtgNHLbIQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Destiny Coast has to be one of my new favorite restaurants for sure!!! What a beautiful & quiet place to enjoy a gorgeous view of the ocean.
The food my husband & I ordered was delicious and had such a beautiful presentation!! I ordered the broccolini special with blacken shrimp & my husband the scrambled egg burrito. We also enjoyed a pecan praline to share. Oh my goodness!! All our choices were excellent!!
The service was fast and friendly. We definitely will be back again real soon.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBBGpYw2AcRc2oc-ozcEpsJ&fid=0x0:0x75786dc941fe6868"],"When":"2025-9-29"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Kaiah","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVvxlKlLOhSYieaLeSh3XN47oCt-z9vjH53XAyxEbf6TLAvccu-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nothing less than a masterclass in elevated dining. Our server was a study in refinement — warm yet dignified, attentive without hovering, and fluent in the unspoken etiquette that separates true hospitality from mere service.
I ordered the 22oz ribeye, a house favorite held in the highest regard, accompanied by the crab cake recommended by our server. My husband chose the filet mignon with the truffle macaroni and cheese, indulgent and decadent in the most luxurious way.
For cocktails, we selected the Golden Hour and the Smoked Old Fashioned—both executed with a level of craftsmanship that deserves applause. Silky yet commanding, these were not drinks; they were experiences. Easily some of the most impeccably balanced spirits we have ever tasted.

We were celebrating our anniversary, and were graciously welcomed with complimentary champagne adorned with rose petals, along with a handwritten card. Though neither my husband nor I typically enjoy champagne, this one was undeniably exceptional—balanced, elegant, and surprisingly delightful.
A complimentary dessert followed, because of course it did. The bananas foster, flambéed tableside, was theatrical in the most tasteful sense, finished with “Happy Anniversary” elegantly written on the plate.

The view was impeccable, and sincere admiration goes to the chef for graciously allowing me to add crab to my ribeye. Portions were generous, the warm bread service was comforting and impeccably prepared, and I highly recommend the caviar. The crab was beautifully fluffy, and the lobster—simply magnificent.

There is, in truth, no place quite like Eddie V’s.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB0Mm9NSIfmPzJLVtD-gPyc&fid=0x0:0xc4a7c808c159fec1"],"When":"2025-11-16"},{"Name":"Becky Henderson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLKLRYx3_NdbJ74SuOb053hP8ciBGAk3ptpjF5yyWiBLNAE7g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This EDDIE V's location is Magical, Gorgeous and Spectacular!  It is my favorite restaurant in the world.
We were a party of 12 celebrating a very important 80th Birthday Party.  Eddie V's made our event so MEMORABLE for all of us.

1.  Service made us feel like royalty.  Eddie V's treats customers like they are important.
2.  Appetizers, dinner & dessert was all flawless-unbelievably good.
3.  The most beautiful view in the world.

This event was very special for our family.  I visited 3 restaurants to review for our event.  Delany Whitesides, Manager at Eddie V's, made me feel so special and confirmed that they would take care of us.  She way exceeded our expectations.  The other 2 restaurants I visited made me feel like I was one of several parties they would be taking care of....take a number.

Ramon, our waiter was so professional and great.  What I loved about Eddie V's is that even though this was a Saturday night, they did not rush us out.  We were able to stay there without pressure to get out.  (Note- The Marine Room pushed us out after 90 minutes during another visit).

I cannot say enough about how much we all loved our Eddie V's event!  I would give them a 10 out of 5 if I could.   I have been to Eddie V's 5-6 times in big and small parties and EVERY VISIT was perfection.

You WILL BE TAKEN CARE OF at Eddie V's.  There is no other restaurant that even comes close to Eddie V's for Service, View, and Food quality.

You will love it!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDnz0th18ez4W5c19l0Y8eG&fid=0x0:0xc4a7c808c159fec1"],"When":"2026-1-28"},{"Name":"parmida Momeni","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX4NI9qDOLR_PvGxutfkGHqyPB5OBfYpraWD22KXMhaQ2WIlCgT=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was our second time at Eddie V’s La Jolla and it was just as amazing as the first. The atmosphere is elegant yet warm, the food is absolutely delicious, and every plate looks like a work of art. From the bread and appetizers to the seafood entrées and dessert, everything was perfect.A big thank you to Max, our server, who made the night truly special. He was attentive, kind, and stayed with us until the very end without ever making us feel rushed — even though we were the last table. That kind of service turned a great dinner into an unforgettable memory.
Eddie V’s is now one of our all-time favorite restaurants. If you want outstanding food, impeccable service, and a memorable experience in La Jolla, this is the place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCqMHyCgd8uFNUX2m5Of04Y&fid=0x0:0xc4a7c808c159fec1"],"When":"2025-10-2"},{"Name":"Now.Loading.Carlos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVury9suV02k6snzsK-VdQ82xZHPWXtHtHDQ0FLW1HfEt38Fww=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My husband and I came to Eddie V’s in La Jolla for dinner on the day we got married, and this place made our night unforgettable. From the moment we arrived, the staff went above and beyond they surprised us with a beautifully decorated table overlooking the ocean at sunset, complete with champagne, rose petals, and a “Congratulations” sign. It felt intimate, thoughtful, and truly special.

The food was incredible. We started with the lobster bisque, rich and velvety with the perfect depth of flavor. Our filet mignon was cooked flawlessly tender, juicy, and melt-in-your-mouth delicious. The creamy mashed potatoes were pure comfort and the perfect pairing. To top it off, the team surprised us with a complimentary dessert that was out of this world.

The cocktails were delicious, the service was warm and celebratory, and every single person who approached our table made us feel genuinely cared for. Eddie V’s didn’t just give us a dinner
they gave us a memory we’ll cherish forever.

If you’re celebrating something meaningful (or just love amazing seafood and steak), this is the place to go in La Jolla. Highly, highly recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCDhAHebBt1ZO5gDePTktI2&fid=0x0:0xc4a7c808c159fec1"],"When":"2025-11-16"},{"Name":"Angel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIG9_jV1G3tGKlVwKSlChoNLQj-XsA8Iula8lhuMFPlGFiqcgOk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely loved this place will definitely go back!!!! Our waiter did fantastic! Food was great! Drinks were great! Nothing bad about this place! Great time with friends or just a date night I would highly recommend this place. Service was spectacular!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAezp6Ett2-jFp151CIAGX9&fid=0x0:0xc4a7c808c159fec1"],"When":"2025-10-31"},{"Name":"Neal Benson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV7SJnUZn8XD3B5_TN-fT6eWf2FzaINKsuIUINa9Tg_YDu9TQKX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We came here for a wedding rehearsal dinner, and had dinner out on the patio and it was absolutely stunning. We had this fantastic view overlooking the La Jolla Cove and the food was just great.

I was able to try a lot of different options on their menu because they continue to bring them out. One of the things they brought out was a lobster tempura on a skewer, which was super good.

There was a calamari with almost like this spicy Asian sauce that was really good and then I ordered lobster bisque for my starter and really enjoyed that for my entrée I went with the New York bone and steak and that was super good too, and then we ended with this amazing chocolate dessert that was also really good so if you can go eat here","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDEzJ8OgKEbJZ4x_OAx3JOe&fid=0x0:0xc4a7c808c159fec1"],"When":"2025-8-17"},{"Name":"Eva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJlmVoKTpYXBRmpMJy_g3Wa4V9CTimDUv7Yq1rsI-wvRE8Cvg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My server was phenomenal. The food was amazing.
The view… breathtaking.

Will definitely revisit in October when I’m back in San Diego!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAnMVv2K3EMfiO-KeV8qziA&fid=0x0:0xc4a7c808c159fec1"],"When":"2025-9-22"},{"Name":"Berna Allego","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUMPkaw9WqcR6LbY9SDffo1nBxlC5tP_n07RtRc9G0AbgnE4q1RBA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My dining experience last night at Eddie V's was truly exceptional. From the moment we entered, the welcoming atmosphere and attentive staff made us feel right at home. The menu offered a delightful array of dishes, each expertly crafted with fresh, high-quality ingredients. Every bite was a culinary delight, and I can't wait to return to Eddie V's to explore more of their delicious creations. Highly recommended!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB986DyPuER0zzYopjxfvP6&fid=0x0:0xc4a7c808c159fec1"],"When":"2025-8-22"}]

[{"Name":"Al Aguirre","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJh_qilMvV0gGg365vY-G2iDvXsDphVgoRgmdIUIZg52VGi1A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a terrific experience at La Jolla's Lucien for NYE. Great new addition to the San Diego food scene. This is one of perhaps less than a handful of restaurants in SD offering world class ingredients and innovative cuisine with impecable service (Lilo and Addison come to mind). The food was extraordinarily creative with standouts including a light and silky risotto with a soft poached egg and white truffle; a delicate wild turbot with celeriac and a hazelnut sauce; and a wonderful uni dish flavored with fennel and light flecks of Espelette pepper. Another standout was arguably the best buttery, laminated brioche I've ever tasted with impossibly fine layers; a viennoiserie love letter. The palate cleanser was also a triumph, somehow preventing a truffle sorbet with shaved black truffle from overwhelming after two earlier dishes containing truffle. On the pastry side there was a terrific Mont Blanc with the traditional chestnut vermicelli and an exquisite chocolate tart.  There were no outright misses, though a lobster dish with a wonderfully flavored dashi broth felt a tad underwhelming on the lobster front, given the presentation of the beautiful blue lobster ahead of the dish.  Service was on point; far from pretentious, it was warm, welcoming, and efficient. This felt like a professional group of good human beings who love what they do. The Sommelier was approachable, engaging, and knowledgeable; and the wine list is interesting with some non-obvious gems, but, as one could expect, a work in progress that still needs some breath and older vintages. All in all, we could not have asked for a better experience on NYE and look forward to visiting Lucien again. This restaurant is worthy of Michelin recognition and of customer support to ensure it remains a star in the San Diego food firmament.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDBBj6iIuTN7g594XEK5_U3&fid=0x0:0xd04295df6e129de8"],"When":"2026-1-1"},{"Name":"Bernard Kok","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIulXEL76NWFkqQKVr6-5-9TvkwaRqKTjvQaGPGY1XtDEkw4w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic new restaurant, it has a lovely little sitting area prior to starting your experience and it was beautiful sitting under the calamansi tree. The dishes were inventive and delicious, and beautiful to look at. One of the most memorable experiences we've had eating in San Diego. Everyone was lovely and very friendly, and it was great experiencing the restaurant tour. You can tell how much thought, pride and love Chef Elijah, his family and team put into this gem of a restaurant.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCVs9XfuWnTR3G0dvB09vCu&fid=0x0:0xd04295df6e129de8"],"When":"2026-1-15"},{"Name":"Alan Wong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUmkaDh8pR6uAux9p7YyyGkVF1hOezetqIW4TjmzHAoUw7DhmfM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My wife and I had an incredible evening at Lucien.   From the moment you're seated in the courtyard, you're greeted with wonderful hospitality and creative and delicious bites.  Their is nothing like it in San Diego.  The creativity of the cuisine is akin to something you'd have to travel far for, nothing is derivative and everything is unique but works so well.  Chef Elijah and his team are super friendly and accommodating to allergies and dietary preferences.  The front of the house is super friendly and knowledgeable; Brian, James, Joey all took the time to explain the various drinks and dishes to us and answered any questions we had around the cuisine and restaurant.  While it is a special occasion type of place, the evolving menu makes me want to come back often.  They also have a nice bar you can pop in for a drink to try their cocktails, which are also seasonal.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDG6OGrXgCRtkfo-VqLauDU&fid=0x0:0xd04295df6e129de8"],"When":"2025-10-1"},{"Name":"Ankita Aparajita","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVIe9dtc_m_Pr4PMNR4e2gsnXPACIDKSRxIx3PapjbGvBq44iJKcw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A Classic, Exquisite & Extravagant Affair is all we needed on our anniversary.The Japanese-French fusion culinary plates, New York professionalism, top notch service, classy ambience - Outstanding!
What made our experience top tier was them giving us a tour of the kitchen,goodie bag and also clicking a pic with all of the chefs making our day Extra special.The owner himself came and introduced himself and had a delightful nice chat…A gentleman! Must Have experience, thank me later!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCxvC1FfOU91XZC6DxOIIdM&fid=0x0:0xd04295df6e129de8"],"When":"2025-11-29"},{"Name":"Allison Koo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLeqc9BglHU5z1jC7kK1j3XbQTfzIVs3BIUjHtCMkP0vofKpoQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a wonderful family dinner at Lucien. The food was inventive, cooked perfectly, and presented beautifully. The atmosphere and service were immaculately curated, but managed to have a laid back California feel that was never too stuffy or formal like many fine dining restaurants. The staff also easily accommodated dietary restrictions without making any of the dishes less special.

It was a really enjoyable experience all around, and I highly recommend this restaurant for a special dinner.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAzoQiTEkNoP3XY6Vl-S3bc&fid=0x0:0xd04295df6e129de8"],"When":"2025-12-24"},{"Name":"Anthony W.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJwPJmX46LLcnwuVwZ14xExoWXdBGiXMtXRLePjaX0cEXctAw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dining at Lucien last night was a unique and amazing experience! The food was incredible, with each course being thoughtfully presented. The restaurant staff even introduced each course with the finest details. The service was impeccable and beyond comparison. Throughout the evening, there was plenty of interaction with the chefs and restaurant staff. We were even invited to tour the kitchen. The price was definitely worth the memorable experience. We will definitely be coming back soon.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBdocR0gKz0iKLXQdpXtroC&fid=0x0:0xd04295df6e129de8"],"When":"2025-9-28"},{"Name":"L. Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLQjEcvHPHLea_ZmKKGnlMEK38DTUbIbPgSsNvogEADZgNqNEM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From the moment we arrived, the experience at Lucien was exceptional! We were warmly welcomed and began our evening in the garden with a beautifully balanced welcome cocktail and amuse-bouche. It was the perfect prelude to what was to come. The transition into the dining room felt almost secretive and intimate, like stepping into a modern speakeasy.

The restaurant itself is stunning with the walls reminding me of the blue ocean, warm stone finishes, and soft, intimate lighting. Our booth had a great view of the open kitchen, where you can watch the chefs working over the hearth. Every member of the staff was genuinely friendly, knowledgeable, and attentive without being overwhelming. A brilliant team!

As a food and wine lover, you must get the tasting menu with wine pairing. Chef Elijah curated such a poetic menu. Every dish was thoughtfully composed with vibrant colors and flavors, textures, and bites full of depth. So flavorful! James, the wine director, curated an incredible pairing that elevated each course.

One standout was a course featuring Iberico pork paired with Château d’Yquem which was an unexpected twist and absolutely mind-blowing combination. I’m still dreaming of this pairing! Oh! And uni ice cream with purple potato foam is the die for and also my favorite… I can go on and on… the whole menu is my favorite! It’s quite a memorable meal.

The bread with the seaweed butter was so tasty and nourishing and didn’t make us feel bloated at all… we ate the whole loaf! The progression of the meal felt perfectly paced, and I loved the generous use of foams, caviar and uni, my personal favorites.

Each dish had a sense of story, showcasing the best of seasonal ingredients and their relationship with farmers and vineyards. I like that the main ingredients were highlighted/enhanced and not overwhelmed with flavors.

It’s refreshing to see Lucien in the fine dining scene in La Jolla.. sophisticated yet welcoming, creative yet grounded in exceptional ingredients. I can’t wait to come back to experience their next menu.

You can also have a more casual visit to their bar which looks like a great spot to drop in for a drink and a few plates.

I’m getting hungry typing this review and excited to come back for more!!! :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAiMgFZe0tg3r3zEJe62c8C&fid=0x0:0xd04295df6e129de8"],"When":"2025-10-31"},{"Name":"Andrew Sartory","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKgz-SRN8FfPA0_V-vOlQikx3a0-ye4gHqzqllbbO1HSZusbsQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Most Luxurious and Heartfelt Dining Experience of Our Lives!

My husband and I both agree that our first evening at Lucien was, without question, the richest and most luxurious dining experience we’ve ever had in our lives. And there is so much to say about the magic we experienced.

⸻

Arrival & Warm Welcome

From the moment we arrived, we felt immediately at home. The warm and inviting hostess greeted us with a radiant smile and playful laugh when we asked, “Is this Lucien?” She replied, “Yes, this is us! Are you Andrew?” — and from that moment, we knew we were in for something special.

She led us to a charming courtyard under a majestic tree, where we began our evening with a welcome beverage and first bites. It felt as though loving friends had invited us into their gorgeous home to share something deeply personal — a night of art, surprise, and joy.

⸻

Atmosphere & Ambiance

When we moved indoors, the setting became even more intimate. The minimal seating and warm design made it feel exclusive and serene, almost like we were part of a secret experience few get to witness. It felt very VIP!

Each of the 15 courses felt like a chapter in a story — full of creativity, elegance, and delightful surprise. With every plate came something unexpected and beautifully executed. The pacing was perfect, the transitions seamless, and the attention to detail was immaculate.

⸻

The Service & Staff

We were celebrating major milestones in our marriage and life, and Lucien could not have been a more perfect setting. The staff treated us as though we were royalty — warm, kind, and effortlessly professional. There wasn’t a hint of pretension, only genuine hospitality and passion for what they do.

Natasha, James, Keira, Jeff, Brian, and others whose names I wish I had caught were all a tremendous delight. Their depth of knowledge, professionalism, and heart elevated the entire experience. I asked a whole lot of questions about the dishes and ingredients — and they were always happy to answer and elaborate, helping us savor and understand the artistry behind each bite.

⸻

Behind the Scenes & Chef Elijah

We were blessed to receive a tour of the kitchen and meet Chef Elijah, whose creativity and passion are palpable. We learned that he loves evolving the menu several times a week — which makes me even more excited to return. It was inspiring to see the staff embrace such innovation with grace and enthusiasm.

We were there for almost four hours, and not once did we feel tired or restless. In fact, if they had offered several more courses, we would have joyfully stayed for another hour!

⸻

Intuition & Discovery

When I first saw Lucien on OpenTable, I hadn’t heard of it before — but the photos caught my attention, and I felt an intuitive nudge to book. The tasting menu was beyond what I had initially planned to spend, yet the moment I felt that call, I knew it was meant to be. I’m so glad I trusted that intuition — because what we received was easily worth twice the price.

⸻

A Living Work of Art & Experience to Remember

Dinner at Lucien was far more than a meal. It was a journey, an immersive work of art, and a theatrical experience where each course played a unique role in a living, breathing masterpiece. Watching the staff orchestrate each moment was its own form of performance — filled with heart, precision, and love.

Getting to know the team was one of the greatest highlights of the evening. They now feel like new friends to us, and they turned what could have been “just dinner” into a sacred memory we’ll treasure for the rest of our lives.

Getting to share in the entire experience with my husband, the man I love more than anyone, was truly a great treasure. It was a great space and setting for us to have quality time with each other and have a night we will cherish forever!

⸻

Truly worth every penny — and so much more.
Thank you, Lucien team.
We love you all so much and are grateful for what you have created.
Can’t wait to return soon. 💛","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBuPIP2DecO8ZV3rgCAm4HE&fid=0x0:0xd04295df6e129de8"],"When":"2025-12-5"}]

[{"Name":"Jay C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXd_5rOqfGy1Nl0ysPWBQc5jqnUOPomHTBNBvCXusoqszclb1At=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I absolutely love Tous Les Jours, and I highly recommend it to anybody who is in the area 👍 You'll especially find a lot of UCSD students coming here to grab a coffee and do some work. I personally really enjoy the Tiramisu latte the most, but I also tried their Matcha, which was good. Their pastries are also super delicious and great to snack on. I recommend their Tiramisu, the banana & nutella pastry, and the mini sausages pastry.
The only thing that kind of sucks is the limited seating indoors, so it's often pretty hard to find a table, but there are tables outside they just don't have outlets.
Overall, I would say you can't go wrong with anything here!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAgvUrXsOs4ZjN0O9Kjf2ia&fid=0x0:0x347524a121ad6fe0"],"When":"2025-11-1"},{"Name":"Rina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXkCvzF10p5M8FaZcu0kuNwJEOZzKnIEjfUQvoV56AyUbZE1Qqz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I visited this café located in the La Jolla Village shopping mall on a Saturday morning, and it was a really pleasant experience overall. As expected for the weekend, the place was quite busy and almost all the seats were taken, which to me was a good sign that it’s a local favorite. They have both indoor and outdoor seating, so depending on your mood you can enjoy a cozy atmosphere inside or a more relaxed vibe outside.

What stood out right away was the variety of pastries. They offer everything from donuts and muffins to different types of breads and cakes, so there’s definitely something for everyone. The display looked fresh and inviting. I tried the pain au raisin, and it was excellent—the outside had a nice crispness, while the inside was soft and chewy with just the right amount of raisins for sweetness and texture. I also had a sausage roll, which was warm, savory, and really satisfying.

Their drink menu was another highlight. In addition to a solid coffee selection, they also have teas, which is nice if you want something lighter. The staff were friendly and efficient even with the morning rush, which made the experience even better.

Overall, this café is a great spot to grab breakfast or a quick treat while shopping in La Jolla Village. The combination of tasty pastries, good drinks, and a lively atmosphere makes it a place worth revisiting.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCOJY36Cls5AUMXDAOFC8q3&fid=0x0:0x347524a121ad6fe0"],"When":"2025-9-12"},{"Name":"marjon farz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVFxOn2m_6_nyv5Kbv-mHhjD5lC2X8rdxSkV7nelEepYjqkDzVgvA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My husband and I were looking for breakfast / pastries and he found this spot on doordash. I'm a huge pastry and bakery fanatic and I've been to a lot of the top ones in San diego, and I cannot believe how I did not come across this place!
I don't understand how they do not have five stars, I would give them 10 Stars if I could.  There stars and not a true reflection of how good this place is! It is TRULY AMAZING!
I love love love this place! There are so many items on the menu that we were interested in so we ordered a whole box and made it our own tasting experience! Everything was wonderful, the bread of the pastries was made in great quality and fresh. Everything came with unique and wonderful flavor combinations. I was honestly so impressed. This is a 10/10 French Asian bakery! Honestly this is going to be my new bakery to go to from now on.

A few of my favorites: garlic cream cheese, feta danish, onion pastry and blueberry filled donut (sorry I dont remember there exact names)

They have officially made it to my second favorite place I've eaten all year! ❤️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCKfzofoOClSuSV-1cJu1Pa&fid=0x0:0x347524a121ad6fe0"],"When":"2025-8-23"},{"Name":"Iryna Yaresko-Linska","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUw_2Pz9RNXU9t0fibN6OM650P1QH_Am6MwwuApbUkAD1OwYAT1=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We came here to eat something delicious. I've been to restaurants of this chain in other cities before.
I liked it here, but there were a few nuances.
There's a great selection of desserts. There are also cookies, bread, and salty snacks.
Overall, I liked it.
The only thing I didn't like was the atmosphere. Not too many seats and there was no feeling of comfort.
Also, my friends' coffee was too hot and it was not possible to drink it right away. Also, given that the drink was made very hot, for some reason they didn't add a hot hand holder to the cup.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDA9smhbg&fid=0x0:0x347524a121ad6fe0"],"When":"2025-2-8"},{"Name":"Kha Le N.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUCtiJeLzY98Xl4mUubV0TN5yWpJl30tKmKbXiGdKpoZ6CEeds2Kg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been here on most days during my visit to San Diego, and I have to say it’s the best spot in the city, in my opinion. They have a wonderful atmosphere, a great bakery (the garlic cheese bread is the best), and good drinks (I especially like the Shakerato and the Tiramisu Latte - with oatmilk). The prices are also very affordable, and the service is exceptional.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kexin Weng","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXAreP7MbkmGxzLlyzKypqacghRrKS3cs0MNY6DKEM6E2O82niN=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Best bakery in San Diego! Everytime we just wanted to buy too much of the dessert! The best place for birthday cakes - Good looking and great taste!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCNsw2x-kEShbl_uHl9s9zq&fid=0x0:0x347524a121ad6fe0"],"When":"2025-11-21"},{"Name":"Kun Ryu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJqjZXEYKKeoLrtCKutKfgD99dYH1APboueKzVnsKMB4eA79Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"No smoothie… Placed order four times and are always out of it. Why is it even on the menu? They take the order, I pay for the smoothie, then they realize they dont make smoothies anymore at 11:30 AM (So they cannot be out of ingredients). They just look at me and ask me to choose something else, as if I did something wrong. No refunds, no apologies. Quite disappointing. Want to note that it is just that one young guy that really has no clue on how to work (He happened to take 3 of the 4 orders). Everyone else was quite supportive.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Agustin de la Calle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFiCjHvW17wCMUBOs05BhZPdt-lEyZlKJnmooeU3FhlI2wf_zjqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really enjoyed the relaxed atmosphere and the professional service of the team. I had not one but two americanos, a croquette and a chocolate croissant. I get easily heart burn when cheap ingredients are used, but this feels perfect, high quality and pretty tasty.
My group also loved their oat milk based iced coffee called: Shakerato!
I also noticed that the fruit in their pastries is very fresh.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID7_uDeaQ&fid=0x0:0x347524a121ad6fe0"],"When":"2024-8-24"}]

[{"Name":"John K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4_X7UO5IluBtaZPcLJ2MKwu-8g7IPa3Qjhob4SdL7d0W38PU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I first tried Cava in Austin and I couldn’t wait to eat at this location. We arrived around 1:15pm and there was still a long line for ordering food. It’s worth the 20 minutes or download their app, which I now have, and skip the line. The restaurant is clean and they have indoor and outdoor seating.
I ordered the Build Your Own Bowl and I had arugula, white rice, grilled chicken, hummus and tzatziki, diced cucumbers, olives and feta cheese. Plus you get a quarter of a pita. The ingredients are fresh and Delicious! The pita is warm and tastes so good. The restaurant has a positive upbeat vibe. There’s a large parking lot in front of the restaurant.
Sorry about the picture of my bowl. I remember going for the first time being absolutely blown away, wanting to show everyone I knew about it.

My most recent experience has been downhill. A guy by the name of Rahim gave subpar service last week. I placed a pickup order directly from the Cava app. Upon picking it up, I realized the bowl was really light and only about half full. I waited by the register for a while, trying not to interrupt the workers who were tending to the line, but I finally got asked what I needed by Rahim. I at first really appreciated him checking in, but when I asked if I could get a bit more since this was less than I was normally served, he told me that what I was given is normal. I pointed to a couple other bowls on the counter and also mentioned that past times I’ve been there I’ve been given more. He told me that the other bowls ordered greens, but not all of them were. I also saw much more protein being served to these bowls. Rahim continued to tell me that not everyone is properly trained and that the portions in mine were correct. I told him, “cmon man this bowl is half full. I paid for a full meal. If I don’t get that, could I at least get a partial refund?” But he stood on business and continued to say the portions were correct.

Others in line agreed the portions were pretty skimpy and that they had to ask for more earlier in the line. I even had someone come up to check out what the bowl looked like and when I showed him, he was like, “oh nah that’s way less”. Rahim finally told me that he’d remake the bowl (not at all what I needed and actually used more portions) and told me that if I wasn’t satisfied that he’d give me a refund. This was an alright solution, but honestly I just wanted more protein since it was so lackluster.

I mentioned to him that, although he had probably had a long day, it would be really appreciated if he had first started with apologizing and acknowledging ANYTHING rather than going straight into defense. I told him a few other things and he said, “thank you for your input” in a sarcastic manner. I told him to have a good night and left. Upon eating it, he had fluffed up the portions with a bunch of rice and I had only a couple pieces of chicken (not at all what I saw in the other bowls being served).

This was a subpar visit and not something I think I’ll go back to when it comes to a later night meal. I attached a photo of the second bowl he made which was better, but definitely not what I expected from my past awesome experiences at Cava. I wish I got a photo of the last bowl, but I’ll just say it was about an inch less tall than what I pictured.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBwJOM9jmVdbkugsLaEto7f&fid=0x0:0xe79215646c496e21"],"When":"2025-8-30"},{"Name":"Chris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKJuBtqYDlNwx-UZPXfjvlDE8zm1vv-8lewMj9RpZgD5hBDWg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This is the slowest CAVA I’ve ever been to. They always get it right and the food is amazing!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhABvba3aeYfxpC8IUj7_s4n&fid=0x0:0xe79215646c496e21"],"When":"2026-1-26"},{"Name":"Ryan Magbanua","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXsonBA6fEzrFGbrBzvOhBIThgVTQy_fRCxEhUBVYyoWGQBHyeD=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"First time at cava and I decided to go to the one in La Jolla. Lots of my friends say really good things about this place so I was really excited to check it out. This has been a place I’ve wanted to visit for nearly a year or two (just kept putting it off).

There’s a pretty decent sized menu and it’s not overly complicated but I was a little hesitant because I wasn’t sure how to completely go about ordering exactly what I wanted but I had the spicy lamb avocado bowl and added rice. After I asked for rice that I was going to pay for, one of the workers (older dude pushing 50 with glasses) was being sassy for no reason- rolling his eyes, groaning after my request saying “Well if you’re gonna want more rice I’m going to have to charge you extra”. I’m pretty sure if anyone’s asking for extra anything they’re expecting to pay for it but I just didn’t realize I was asking for an arm and a leg. On top of that, he gave me half a scoop of rice. I usually don’t nitpick this way but I was pretty hungry and that just ruined the initial experience for me. The other dude at register had that thousand yard stare and was just pushing the line through. It just felt like a problem being there.
Everything else about this place was good- lots of good options and tasty sauces + proteins. I must have came in on the wrong day since the workers were in a mood. I just wanted to ask more questions just to understand how to order for the future but I didn’t think a line of 4 people and asking for some extra rice would cause such frustration. This location was nice and clean too but I probably won’t come back to this location after the service I got.","Images":null,"When":""}]

The first time at a restaurant I like to order a little bit of everything to see what I would like the most. I like the wings here more for some reason but they’re all good. Same with the fries. I would say, unless you’re gonna finish it all in one sitting, order the sauce on the side. There was definitely a lot of sauce and I can’t see it remaining crunchy after you heat it up again. I also would order like a little bit lighter sauce because these were covered. Don’t forget to ask for dipping sauce if you want that.

My advice to costumers:

Original review:
Hi, they have really good white rice and miso soup is good too.
This restaurant has changed tremendously from Decent to a terrible- scary bad restaurant. I’ve been to this place more than few times and got sick twice in the past. (They didn’t deserve my generous second chance.)
It takes a lot of ignorance from the kitchen for passing old and stinky fish to people, instead of throwing it in the garbage.
My advice, save yourself and your money by trying  any other Japanese restaurants in the neighborhood, like Blue ocean & grill in UTC Mall, my last few visit at this place was very positive so far, much better quality of ingredients and flavorful sauces, bigger portions and less expensive.
Happy dining","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Seymour Titt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGtljownZL4eWz1hMSBPj3pQf7z7tk_gPca9idKHTEqunLQAs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"FABULOUS SERVICE ! My wife and I moved house to La Jolla a few weeks ago. Since then we've been enjoying the many quality eateries close by. In fact on Saturday we decided to have dinner here for the first time....just a short walk from our townhome across the street. We arrived around 6.45pm and a hostess / server named Kate told us the wait would be about 10 minutes. The place looked totally packed out as you would expect with a top quality eatery. Within a few minutes we were seated at a booth table near the front entrance but totally comfortable. A smiling server named Alice brought us tall iced waters straight up. We ordered some appetizers...1 x Assorted Tempura, 1 x Chicken Gyoza ( potstickers ), 1 x Spicy Dumpling to kick things off. For our mains my wife selected Chicken Teriyaki Don while I went for the Gyu Don ( Japanese Beef Bowl ). FIRST UP ! Our complimentary bowls of Misu Soup came out fast followed even faster by our 3 appetizers. Everything tasted really good ! Our main courses arrived at the perfect time, looked great and tasted wonderful. We appreciated the very courteous service of our servers Alice and Kate. CAN'T WAIT TO COME BACK !","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Grace C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU_-7gcrzSELGVrTCx-2IAyrk3IhssG5-aiCQTAp4j3h9fqdlvEJA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Casual, colorful, floral decor.

Geisha roll

[{"Name":"Gary Giffin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6cPhj4NoATy-dNMcRV3pbKhjrkoliPTKBHK4vdvMugvSwlz99=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Service was 5 Star! Great place to take your family who likes variety. They have a little bit of everting on their menu. I tried the Tr-Tip steak and it was delicious. I like my rare and that’s not an option. The French dip sandwich was full of meat and they really packed it! Not many choices of all around good American food in UTC area so this is a great place to find something for everyone.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDtnbJPTXB5QJektAxXyrgd&fid=0x0:0x8a1bae277834e60c"],"When":"2025-12-27"},{"Name":"Edna G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9wxr_9VeIoYYVc4hGcextKYAGGCarFmH7j_z3CdRYu4geOwX8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"BJ’s is always open late and we came here just for that since we arrived in LaJolla late in the evening and was hungry. We also have this in the Bay Area and it’s pretty slow service though. This place is a little faster service. Food is good. Good for groups or just to hang out at the bar to watch sports.

We shared their BJ’s personal pizza and new sampler platter. The sampler had bbq tri-tip sliders, mozzarella sticks, chicken wings and spinach queso dip. Everything was good but I really liked their pizza and chicken wings the best. Oh I chose the lemon pepper flavored wings with bone-in. We also had blue moon beer tap. Would have loved to have Pzookie dessert but I couldn’t fit anymore food in me. LOL. Those are a must have!

Inside the restaurant was decent and seemed new but so dark inside to see what I was reading on the menu or trying to eat my food. Servicer was good, friendly and she tried her best to accommodate us while waiting for our meals. Would come here again","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBlHlJs7drdIWqjHECrZNZV&fid=0x0:0x8a1bae277834e60c"],"When":"2025-11-1"},{"Name":"Charlene Hsu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYm2AHqPn55t7qWiTX-2jJPaSqRQ1FgAB05oWwYNtsBOfWLFN_Lg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"THE MONKEY BREAD PIZOOKIE IS SO GOOD! It’s honestly the best one and its not too overwhelming in sweetness. I like how it comes off into basically already bite size pieces. Super yumalicious! The dubai chocolate one is alright, nothing too special honestly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCa5OU6sY0AaOpi2KLDisSv&fid=0x0:0x8a1bae277834e60c"],"When":"2025-12-24"},{"Name":"susu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLJk-6wr28tj7HM7bBpn5_OatuJJP76DaWCKkkrbhhiQbxSdwBE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Never Get a steak from this Location and will never come back.
I person love Bj's steak . Always cooks it perfectly and not too seasoned usually I love it. However, when I got a ribeye steak it was straight up pepper and salt . The cook was good tho but the taste I couldn't eat it all.
I even let people from my party to have it they all agreed and couldn't handle it. I asked the server she did go ahead and helped me to get a new one.
I got a new one about 23m later. It was not as crazy salty as before but it was still super salty and yes my party also agreed with it. I did tell the server she asked for either a togo box or to just give it to another person. I just said togo box bc who other person will eat it if everyone agreed it's salty?
Maybe if I boil it in water or eat with something else I could bc it has that much seasoning in it. even the togo box I got was a pizookie box. Very confusing and disappointed.
I like Bj's but I will never be coming back to this location. The mash potato and the soup coming with the steak was good and my party got a burger it was really good too.
I guess they only suck at making a steak.
The photos are from the second steak. Imagine the first one","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBEkq8LTkTlzcC5AUDc9Mzp&fid=0x0:0x8a1bae277834e60c"],"When":"2025-10-1"},{"Name":"Zachary Mandel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUC_2gWAcGN7U5yDe5ii3ZOQTj_ICjOy8Zavce5h9LxBxO4fDw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I don’t even know where to start. Tonight’s dinner at BJ’s was one of the most disappointing restaurant experiences I’ve had in a long time. We sat on the patio, where our waitress (who proudly mentioned she’s worked there for 2.5 years) somehow managed to make every part of the evening worse. It took her over 15 minutes just to come by and ask if we wanted drinks, which she never refilled once during the entire hour and a half we were there.

We specifically came for the limited-edition pizookie, so we asked to order it at the very start of our meal to make sure we’d get one. She said she’d “put it in right away.” Spoiler: she didn’t. After waiting through our painfully average food (which honestly tasted like it came straight from the Sysco freezer), she came back and casually asked if we wanted dessert. We told her we’d already ordered the special pizookie, and she hit us with, “Oh yeah oops we have none left.”

Meanwhile, we literally watched three other tables around us get served that exact pizookie after we’d ordered ours. The complete lack of attention, honesty, or care was ridiculous. If this is the kind of service BJ’s keeps around for two and a half years, I’m genuinely concerned for their hiring standards.

Save yourself the frustration and go anywhere else. Even a drive-thru would have more professionalism and better food quality than whatever that was.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBDK9RTpeTIRu4JC4mDjbgu&fid=0x0:0x8a1bae277834e60c"],"When":"2025-11-9"},{"Name":"maggie yu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUwyCFJdkZ6LzxYYNqIVQ-WHUXAh9qjKE6B2lTJAQTOcaMX0Io=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Strawberry Shortcake Pizookie was the best out of the three (Salted Caramel and Choco Chip). Very rich and Crumbl like. Mini were a good size. BBQ chicken pizza was also pretty good, crust was my favorite part","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAB65am0iBQT9ToV1d3tYQH&fid=0x0:0x8a1bae277834e60c"],"When":"2025-12-21"},{"Name":"Ralisha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKVTcG0hCRtnL9R_4jxGnHYb9le-f_t22YBUYNmBtdYpDuRow=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Katelynn Rose was an amazing server! Super friendly, attentive, and made sure everything was perfect. The food was great, and her service made the experience even better. Definitely a reason to come back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nadia G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI-9FH5CD65x7R-y_1nIEScHiCzc2FB6VhbK_gGt5-t7gFLnQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We took advantage of the $13 Pizookie Meal and Happy Hour - such a steal. The service was fantastic- thank you to server Lihi for your speed and great service, as well as server Kate’s help.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAJ6pv8IBxzP9YmF-6SWCqA&fid=0x0:0x8a1bae277834e60c"],"When":"2025-11-11"}]

[{"Name":"Rina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXkCvzF10p5M8FaZcu0kuNwJEOZzKnIEjfUQvoV56AyUbZE1Qqz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Rock Bird Coffee has a cozy, relaxed vibe with both indoor and outdoor seating, making it a great spot to enjoy coffee in La Jolla. It’s conveniently located right in front of an urgent care, but once you’re inside, it feels calm and inviting. I ordered the vanilla bean latte, and it was so good—smooth, flavorful, and not overly sweet. They also offer a nice variety of pastries. I tried the almond croissant and the croquant; both were good, but the croquant was definitely the winner. I’d happily come back again.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAKV0tL3_gqlXTg4qPxrfxL&fid=0x0:0xa82f76faa021c305"],"When":"2025-12-27"},{"Name":"Alan Bialostozky","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIZ8a-5bn_VwONBcZE-jYlrC9RtM6Y_ktu24u2C4IR85SFTTw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Total hidden gem inside Bird Rock Coffee. You walk in for coffee and suddenly Francesco is offering pizza, which we had no idea existed here.

That turned out to be dangerous knowledge because the pizza is seriously good. Fresh, flavorful, and way better than expected for a spot tucked inside a coffee shop.

Francesco was super welcoming and clearly cares about the food. Do not skip the margherita.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAi63H2ooNHFGD4DbmRcl1p&fid=0x0:0xa82f76faa021c305"],"When":"2026-1-12"},{"Name":"Melissa Piccirillo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUd8tMiROgAybDo9I3DWzGFr216-B5NUpLUNzlNJPiOE1bgEsBI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came for the coffee (which was a great iced latte - not overly sweet and could taste the richness of the espresso) and was incredibly blown away by the pizza! Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBV2fVGvr6ioLGwn9YNbm7U&fid=0x0:0xa82f76faa021c305"],"When":"2025-11-11"},{"Name":"Ben Sappey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVytFfws_kegaFfjQoTMbZN1hdjdFUwjnla7BWqey6EvT2EUNjf=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent coffee and absolutely exceptional pizza at this location.
