It's great to have this style of pizza so close to UCSD.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC1ODUaQ9UWnmLaR1cpb0To&fid=0x0:0xa82f76faa021c305"],"When":"2025-10-18"},{"Name":"Dustin Sutton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXVQPK01r5x36VWJYnrwyrSBCNb4qZ6vPXHO3JlY5S8asrgH8VR=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been here many times for the coffee. Chai Lattes are great
Just had the pizza and it was amazing!!!
Maybe the best I have had outside of Italy and New York.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDvIew-irV6OIqlkj9hPTST&fid=0x0:0xa82f76faa021c305"],"When":"2025-11-10"},{"Name":"Jay Schimke","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJmzXTu7UsbPyGIiDGt1h6F4nSdq1hpfdPiQmRJxnwcTLONm1U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great coffee!
Stopped in for a cup of coffee and was surprised at how efficient these people are. I ordered my coffee and the only question they had was light roast or dark roast (I hate when people ask me if I want it iced, if I did, I would’ve ordered an iced coffee). I replied with dark roast and before I could pay another employee had poured my coffee, and was handing it to me.
Everyone was very friendly, and the store was clean. The bathroom was very nice and clean.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCo4YSQWw&fid=0x0:0xa82f76faa021c305"],"When":"2025-4-17"},{"Name":"Evelyn Li","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKXZvABSb286koaZlYQe32MANmm20S5n9G9xx71YAt-dr7mU4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I made them remake my iced latte because I swore it tasted like the milk was bad, and they were kind enough to do so.
But then it tasted the same.
So, my fault? I felt terrible like I was just throwing away drinks for the thrill of it; for the love of the game. But I did not like it. I had two friends and one got whole milk and his also tasted pretty weird. The friend who got oat milk? His drink tasted great.
Maybe overnight friend 1 and I's tastebuds revolted against lactose but anyway, the atmosphere and service are nice as long as you get there early enough to claim a table.
But I kind of can't stop thinking about it like I want to try to the milk on its own just to make sure I'm not crazy. The paranoid part of my brain says they just remade it using the same milk. But no one else is going up so idk I guess it's a me problem but I thought I knew what souring milk tasted like.
Maybe I'm crazy but I'm for sure not crazy about this drink.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Howard Tai","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV2LWjqTqp5dbbHqqq5ZlHtFvEPQ3ImHWmUMsA6jLSbeHzga3hi=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I come here often for the coffee but just tried their pizza for the first time and can wholeheartedly vouch for its quality. The chef, Francesco, is from Naples and his margherita ranks amongst the best I’ve tried outside of Italy. There’s also plenty of indoor and outdoor seating for doing work or hanging out with friends.","Images":null,"When":""}]

We would definitely come back on our next visit to La Jolla.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Edward Garbuzov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKm1iAKYFgWGHTr_udR43Ov4QqA5PrOq05BQ9SCGUwhnpiewA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Absolute worst hotel experience to date. We stayed in the inn with our 10 month old child and within 3 minutes of getting there, our child’s hands, feet, and knees were black with grime from crawling around the room. We have never stayed in such a dirty room. We even called the manager to switch rooms hoping we just got unlucky with a dirty room. However, the room we got relocated to was just as dirty if not more so. Floors seemed like they’ve never been moped, random stray hair in the bathtub, and exposed wire in the kitchen. Walls were also paper thin and we could hear neighbors talking and walking upstairs. Not to mention there is no air conditioning! We woke up at night sweating from how hot it got in the room. We dreaded coming to the inn at the end of the day because of how hot and dirty it was. 0/10 stay.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"yayakats27","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QcAMX6x1kyyC4a8uKPBZCeWlT90KjmNFkgsk2nwAxhNYMl35txt0LKhr7WJeqrhDy9dMA=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Initially I was happy with my interactions with the management. I had called two days before to ask if I could charge the room on a different card. The front desk said “of course”. When I arrived, I reminded her that I wanted to switch the card which meant she would have to credit the deposit on the original card and charge the whole amount to the new card. She said it was no problem. Then she told me to get a parking spot it would be $15. I said yes, but then she said someone e else was in my spot but would be leaving soon (was just unloading). This was fine as I had to drop off some stuff at the beach. When I came back the car was still in my paid spot so I called and the front desk told me to go find parking on the street until they left. I was planning on parking and leaving for the rest of the day. I don’t know why she didn’t call them to ask them to move their car? I’ve been asked for my money back for the spot and parked on the street.. |I had two rooms and we arrived at 2pm with check in at 4pm. I called earlier in the day and she said the rooms would be ready at 2pm. One was ready and she said the other would be ready in 30 mins. Totally fine since we were there early. However if you say the room will be ready in 30 mins. We should be able to count on it. We saw the people who were cleaning taking a break. They did not come back to clean u til after 3pm. The room wasn’t ready until 4pm. The next day when I checked out, I asked again about switching the card and charging the full amount to the new card. Again, she said no problem. I don’t get a copy of a receipt or invoice. Today I checked my card and they only charged my new card the tax and fees. And when I called they had already closed out the ticket and could not charge my new card the full amount. The woman who helped me today was very helpful.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"P4931ETja","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0Qd0Gzx7-o-W0qn7F-oHhorx-ann6UFYRniBmE7Ar1MhRFtO-x6vY7U2LNCPC1lcQidkpw=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Best spot for families, we did not want to leave!! Full kitchen with everything you need, makes it easier with kids to cook meals and have snacks. The place extremely clean and very spacious. The palm trees across the street were so nice to wake up to each day, and light up at night. Cannot wait to return. The manager Debbie is the best also!! 😊","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"918reginan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeWB0GIG9gGd6g9zDFXwjE9TRuKRtAO6HvwA5jEdK_CrOJXcVxp8esjQRYTFMjay2JK=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"It was very close to the shores and comfortable. Perfect for the La Jolla 10 mile relay race. I was able to walk to/from my destination without worrying about parking. We arrived late and found plenty of street parking. The hotel setting is like a 1 bedroom apartment, huge amount of space including a kitchen and dining area for a good price. The sand wash was also convenient.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Natalie Justin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKtW9FkV6bd86Ajz5A4x2FjrKyaLaI0NW2Lq6FkbarrwVyO2Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place to stay! Rooms are comfortable and RIDICULOUSLY spacious - you've basically got a whole apartment with kitchen, living room, and all. Plus, everything was spotlessly clean! Ample parking. Checking in and out was a breeze, and the manager was just the friendliest. She had great recommendations for places to go/things to do. We would 100% stay here again, and definitely for longer next time! This is a great place to relax and unwind. :)","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Lorena Weinmann","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9sEgbulxnG5jCOvirDlJjT9kexoWvID-hWLlcH5J36ajPfbsF=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food “Neophobia,” is the fear of trying new or unfamiliar foods. Get out of the way and let your tastebuds try something new. Come on “live a little, taste a little.”
At Phó La Jolla, I have eaten so many appetizing dishes. From Phò, Vermicelli Noodles, Bán Mì Sandwiches, to the array of their appetizers like Spring Rolls, Crispy Salt and Pepper Wings, or Steaming BBQ Pork Buns. Not to mention their New Cajun Seafood Boil Menu, where you choose the flavor and the level of heat. Just remember, you “feast” by the pound so bring your appetite. My mouth is watering as I am leaving this review.
So, when “Tammy” the owner of Phó La Jolla mentioned the new dish “Bún Riêu,” I was eager with anticipation.
“Bún Riêu” is a Vietnamese noodle soup, with a vibrant red-orange color from the tomatoes and crab paste, it’s aromatic and savory. Served w/ Vermicelli noodles and substantial amounts of Shrimp, Chicken and Tofu. Mmm…, it was delectable, a taste so unique and different.
I asked Tammy what influenced her dishes, and she said “a replication of her mothers’ taste and her own innovation.”
Take it from a “foodie,” @ Phò La Jolla, where every flavor tells a story.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAcr7sCDP1Q7U041ZMFRX-J&fid=0x0:0x7c0e8b3482a1f976"],"When":"2025-11-15"},{"Name":"Billy Weinmann","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVDk_gguCxo1zeBRPSiSBY5Kc7Y_APOeR6k0DXz4Z8fgQzlp5Qm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My wife and I have been dining here @ La Jolla Phò, for the past 15+ years. It is our go to spot! The ambiance is quaint, with a welcome home type of atmosphere. I promise, they have something for everyone! With a vast menu, that covers the absolute “Best” & “Colossal” bowls of Phó in San Diego county.
So over the past decade and a half we tried every dish on the menu. Just when you thought, it couldn’t get any better than this. Bam 💥 💥 Tammy the owner launched “Cajun Seafood Boil” Now I’m a carnivore so I tried the New “BBQ Pork Buns” mmm.. pillowy soft buns filled with savory & slightly sweet bbq pork. Mouth watering!
My wife the pescatarian ordered the “Bowl” she chose “Clams, Mussels and Shrimp” the set-up was priceless. Butcher paper for a table cloth, equipped with a bib,  and gloves. (Definitely needed) she described the flavor as “Smoky, spicy, and aromatic, with a robust and complex flavor” but you can choose your spice level. She gave it her all and fell short to finishing it. All I can say is this “mom and pop shop” is a diamond in the rough!! Shame on you if you don’t try it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDiYccqaVCO2KJ1YEB-vHE1&fid=0x0:0x7c0e8b3482a1f976"],"When":"2025-10-13"},{"Name":"Yvette Z","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW8DXPV6CxJlqEVe-2Oie2eYxGhZ0vVr1US05MDKjyFkok0vdop=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I’ve been here before about 15 years ago with my mother. I do not recall this lol
They added a “Cajun Seafood Boil” and I happened to be here for their soft opening. The staff is very attentive (TY Jesus) 😊 and the owners made me feel very welcome asking me if I liked the food, almost like family 😍 I did not get the pho I was craving, but the Cajun seafood boil was delicious. I enjoyed the flavors and of course a lot of garlic. Thank you 🙏🏼 for this experience as I was having a bad day 😊🤤you made my day!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhApjoR4iX46hdVf35ROJbzb&fid=0x0:0x7c0e8b3482a1f976"],"When":"2025-9-27"},{"Name":"kayla","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJaeMJh-Sp4x5FjmYb_h6pqcXJ2vQzx4s6NyHnj7iF4XAY94w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love this pho place so much! I highly recommended. I usually get the rare steak pho and mango boba smoothie!! It is soo yum and always comes out super quick. They also have amazing spring rolls and everything is really good. They even just expanded their menu. I usually go for lunch but I recently went for dinner with my mom and the female owner came out and gave everyone including us a delicious complementary dessert sesame ball. I love this place so much and will continue going here a ton!! They even just expanded there menu to have crab boil!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB6L6lHhEjx80DFdPDuOWbS&fid=0x0:0x7c0e8b3482a1f976"],"When":"2025-11-4"},{"Name":"Kyle Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2YkLoeeTs1aEnNHm9EniuBxVjZtx35CPQ3kxu9BjQB2cWOLyq=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I visited San Diego for the first time in a long time and went to a Vietnamese noodle place without much thought and sat down. The most ordinary #1 was &18.99. How could this be!! The taste was ordinary, the tables were narrow, the taste was nothing special, and the price was probably overpriced because of the location. I paid $23.48 including a 15% tip.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAqhK7LPI8OvkFHtCwAD-Qs&fid=0x0:0x7c0e8b3482a1f976"],"When":"2025-7-8"},{"Name":"Josh H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXymVw5FpQsNpoopyGX4s442cRJPawDkBLq4TIP1_HqMhtFl6yv=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was pretty good and great for our late night cravings. It wasn't our favorite pho place, but the food was good and we were happy we went here. The portion sizes are great, and the staff were very friendly and wanted us, and everyone there, to have the best dinner experience possible.
It's nice that this place is open much later than others, so it serves as a great place for those late night pho cravings.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCsCNUN5JCorofRvnLfnXyf&fid=0x0:0x7c0e8b3482a1f976"],"When":"2025-7-22"},{"Name":"Matty PoshLife","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXl4vEx07sbravDxhwnrMQcOVjy_Xj5YEHCF3Vgao0OC5HRsgkJ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My sister and I recently visited Pho La Jolla—it’s become a cherished tradition to get Vietnamese food either right before or after she flies out of San Diego, and this is officially our new go-to spot!

This restaurant truly is a cultural icon in La Jolla, serving absolutely phenomenal, high-quality Vietnamese cuisine. We were lucky enough to meet the owner, Tammy, and her husband, and sitting next to them and hearing about their 17 years of building this successful, fantastic business was such a highlight.

We took their suggestions on food, and everything was fantastic! From the crispy fried spring rolls and refreshing fresh spring rolls to the perfectly seasoned wings and the truly amazing rib pho, every dish was a winner. It was all seasoned and cooked to perfection.

Thank you, Tammy and husband, for the incredible hospitality and the wonderful food. We can’t wait to come back. Everyone must try this place—it’s more than just a restaurant; it’s a staple of the community!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Derek Li","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWeLNh8hmvR0Hv-eZRrYloDdb5pLjlFTXd82AEOTQVWFJmVVlYMVw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Pho was decent but quite overpriced. Service took way too long (>35 min) and the server quietly added a generous tip for herself before simply telling me to tap my card with no receipt or check.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Sharon B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUY8ATWFqFHtMY-uZA8yZeNzypNczr_2bV8FovyBug5HQ5sOPXRXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The food was delicious! We came here on a Saturday for dinner and requested to be seated in the bar area. They have a piano player that provided live music around 7pm. This place was bustling after 6pm.

They do not have valet parking but there's public parking across the street for $15.

I ordered the pasta combo for dinner. It came with shrimp scampi (2 big shrimps), lobster ravioli (about 3), and 1 big cannelloni. We also ordered the fried calamari and the shrimp scampi appetizers.
We table side Caesar salad, bananas foster, and cherry jubilee desserts were all delicious and fun. I highly recommended ordering the Caesar salad and Banana Foster.

Service was ok from our waitress. She wasn't very friendly and warm. Service from the young man doing the Caesar salad and desserts was much better. He was very nice.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCIdhGLoB9FV7tOi0hRTOKV&fid=0x0:0xfd9cd0a1d0a38208"],"When":"2025-7-29"},{"Name":"Thomas J. Nelson, Realtor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXMFO0bNMhQ6uO8o0D-V1IIIFM6l21JtPvWAaJDndvzt5N_MVfn5w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Manhattan's has long been a cherished favorite of ours, a go-to destination for special occasions and hosting out-of-town guests. Last night, we returned to celebrate my bride's birthday, and it was truly a magical evening. The staff greeted us with warmth and friendliness, and the exquisite food never fails to impress. Our waiter was so friendly and quirky, sometimes he got a little busy and we had to ask for him, but nothing that ruined our experience. The enchanting Jazz Band created a captivating atmosphere, perfectly embodying a classic evening of elegance. Manhattan's is truly a place where one dresses up to savor a remarkable meal, making every visit an unforgettable experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCQ7cjdIg&fid=0x0:0xfd9cd0a1d0a38208"],"When":"2025-3-6"},{"Name":"San Diego Swim Week","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVR2DvyoDLJVjwwQSqVi63MecMxCJ8bSWuH4HAsHVFpKZNWQAI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Manhattan in La Jolla is all about incredible food and flavor. Every dish comes out hot, fresh, and perfectly prepared. You can truly taste the passion and pride Chef Toney puts into his cooking—he is absolutely fantastic. If you’re craving rich, delicious, high-quality meals, this is the spot. Hands down one of the best dining experiences in La Jolla, located inside the Empress Hotel. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAXtqu8ojjj0QXkoJAX95yD&fid=0x0:0xfd9cd0a1d0a38208"],"When":"2025-12-27"},{"Name":"Bella R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4r0PLUREl5oO7H_mvH4h6xcY79dbb3-zktUQU-SFQRiRiZwH-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Great atmosphere ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️, but disappointing food and service ⭐️⭐️.
The restaurant has a great atmosphere and a lot of potential, but the food was extremely buttery and greasy. Even the broccoli seemed soaked in butter or some kind of oil.

The veal, in particular, was very greasy. I mentioned this to the busboy (a young blond gentleman who was kind and attentive) and asked him to check the veal for oiliness. He agreed that it was overly greasy. However, when I brought this to our server’s attention, she said, “That’s just how it is.” She didn’t seem concerned and was not particularly warm or welcoming.

There was also a noticeable focus on offering additional items such as paid water, wine, and dessert, but the issue with the oily veal was never addressed. I had hoped to exchange it for another option, such as shrimp, but that didn’t seem to be possible.

I disagree with the server’s response, as I’ve had veal at other restaurants where it was breaded, crispy, and dry—not oily like this. I’m curious if anyone else has had a similar experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"LULU LIVE Art","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5ygnApAewoweQAk5p3wb5bpNLSKQiVaQNV78P96atCNid4QI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just walked in and was greeted by live piano music and singing, giving off a classic piano bar vibe. The dark, vintage decor feels straight out of an old-school Manhattan restaurant. Guests were dressed up, making my Crocs feel out of place, but no dress code here!

The food is fantastic and worth the price. The complimentary bread was fresh, and the calamari was one of the best I’ve had, packed with squid heads. We ordered the Manhattan Trio pasta—lobster ravioli was a highlight, and the sauces were so good I wiped them clean with bread. The NY cheesecake was authentic, though I still prefer Yanni’s.

This place is perfect for a romantic date, especially if you appreciate vintage charm. Definitely a hidden gem!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICni63XAQ&fid=0x0:0xfd9cd0a1d0a38208"],"When":"2024-9-29"},{"Name":"Ibrahim A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZkxYzhVEkyUZ11zzuQWYb0O8576TCDkApWoV58Xkqy8GQt7LePg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Took a date here and we had an absolutely magical night. The atmosphere was incredible, as they had a live singer performing all night. The staff and clientele were classy, but not at all pretentious. The highlight of our night was our server, Manny. He was a delight to talk to, and he made sure our dinner was special. Towards the end he even introduced us to the owner, who was an absolutely lovely lady. Overall, it was a 10/10 dinner.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dan Gaffey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVQ2Ar3zNHblaIBnljN2L_A6t2PiCZNP6ZaVeB49kEKoEmkqa7Txg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Located inside of the Empress Hotel in La Jolla, this a very nice restaurant and a local favorite.  The menu is extensive with a wide array of options.  The veal chop Florentine was delicious and make sure to order a Caesar salad, the staff brings a cart table side and makes the salad right in front of you.  On the weekends there is live music and a lively bar scene.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDQnpv5zwE&fid=0x0:0xfd9cd0a1d0a38208"],"When":"2025-3-11"},{"Name":"Everett Roach","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWe5ye7T9-dW4O5NihhS6AnBmE1-WElK5ULKvfQol6Y3zT9OZs=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I hope this was an exception, but I went to Manhattan tonight and the experience was so much worse than I’ve ever Had there before. They couldn’t get our drink straight and brought one drink instead of two. I had to cut my veal’s scallopini with a bread knife because they didn’t bring the proper utensils. People were standing around doing nothing but when he asked him to do something, they did it wrong. The food seem to lack its usual flare as well. I hope this is an exception.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCnkKPKRq2kqMQCRS-5XVqy&fid=0x0:0xfd9cd0a1d0a38208"],"When":"2025-7-4"}]

[{"Name":"Jennifer Sterns","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUsQOIchSRUgZz5KLT-6zqneQE9-UvdgGSCZR8xBohBH30Ff7VLGg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Shops at La Jolla are wonderful!
First of all it is right across the street from the trolley stop for Nobel drive in La Jolla and it is so very easy to get there from the Blue Line or from any of the trolley lines ...  you just get to the Blue Line & it goes straight to Nobel Drive Station and you can shop at plenty of places.
There are small boutique shops, specialty shops like Sephora, fun shopping like Nordstrom Rack, practical shopping like Whole Foods and CVS, FedEx Office, banks and more!
The dining options are fantastic .. with one of my favorite places ... The Melt ... staying open until 2a.m. for those late night cravings for delicious delights.
Also, there are plenty of places in between shops where you can just sit and do your own thing ... read a book, text friends, listen to music (headphones of course), eat a snack that you brought with you or bought there, or just kick back and relax
Definitely go and explore the whole area of the shopping mall, it will be a treat to visit!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lexie Nørgaard Petersen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIZ-gka0kWPVGO1n7U4YHM1zs36cotluSvcOPRROaWFCPAZ8g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This is the WORST shopping center I’ve ever been too. It is SO poorly designed it’s almost comical. I’m shocked it ever got approved. The parking lot is absolutely horrendous and you’ll get stuck in one parking lane for 30 minutes with no where to escape. Now add in the modern day idiot behind the wheel and you’re bound to want to bang your head in the windshield. I would rather drive 30 minutes to the next closest Whole Foods than ever step foot here again","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dr. Andy Mraz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUHFKXYOFqXICLn0QIVrsVWrxKNfSjGbvqc2paArRt-VRoKZh4OtQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nordstrom rack has every single thing you need!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD131XcLt34NNbU9LnkubGi&fid=0x0:0x8d88c1eb95c4c325"],"When":"2025-11-24"},{"Name":"Shondra J","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlP8-654JlqP9dC91EAB4gK741k6Gfq_y_rxQMR-m6C7KjaSyU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"There are a variety of stores to include places to get grocery items, clothing, housewares, and electronics. There are multiple selections for  food also. Dining options include Chipotle, a greek kebab place, a place to get poke, and a Crumbl cookie store. The AMC theater is an all recliner theater. The common areas are well kept and there is lots of parking available.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICev6DsMA&fid=0x0:0x8d88c1eb95c4c325"],"When":"2022-9-28"},{"Name":"Hesam Abedini","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWqV0t7ifXKCVdnP1hk4ckgBTeIK83opkd_Fq4Cr4U84Mh1W5Z7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nice shopping center with good restaurants and shops! The chicken kebab was perfectly juicy and flavorful. As was the rice which was so delicious and buttery. For $16 you get a ton of food which is great. The lady behind the counter (maybe the owner) was so kind and gave me a sample of their soup of the day. I’m not sure what it was but it als was very good. I’ll definitely be back","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDf-aqtk2uq7XGJV70Cwf7g&fid=0x0:0x73d69efd8b90a39"],"When":"2026-2-1"},{"Name":"Behrooz F","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLE8DObSd4qOCg2yvwLS5u-nqo_sSZhbKqZ00e2htVD8lXqxA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Absolutely phenomenal Ghormeh Sabzi (vegetable lamb stew). Deep, balanced, and comforting flavors packed with fresh herbs, tangy dried limes, and tender, fall-apart lamb that makes every bite memorable. The stew is rich and aromatic, perfectly cooked, and tastes like true homemade Persian food. Mr. Ali's hospitality made it even better; he welcomed us with a plate of crispy tahdig (scorched rice) and a refreshing doogh (yogurt drink). Generous portions, authentic taste, and a warm atmosphere. We will definitely return.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBVW0bA7P7W6n7ETddqA8Ey&fid=0x0:0x73d69efd8b90a39"],"When":"2025-9-26"},{"Name":"Geri E","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWNgRP3cMnqnZJ1jqUGkpOkP0EO8y2NsR7Y7dAejGQvsMr-VI3h9w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Been a loyal customer since they first blew me away with the food truck. I am super picky when it comes to beef koobideh which is what I judge all Persian restaurants I visit. I tried their beef koobideh - flavor, juiciness, tenderness  and was blown away. Its the best I've had in SD.

Also highly suggest the chicken kebab - adding barberry rice is the move. The combo of the savory chicken, the sweet tartness of the barberries on their rice with some sumac is what dreams are made of. I usually need to get some tuom (garlic paste - its a lebanese sauce not persian)  with my chicken kebab - but I don't even need it here because the flavor is so good.  I also love to order the special dish as well because everything they make is sooo good.

Order some Doogh to drink with your kebabs and its just chefs kiss perfection. ENJOY!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gregory Harris","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUCzaaN2Lk_ukTT9eVEUzyfYo-4FXVWsRjxRhJnNXQAsjjDbCXjcw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"We really wanted to like this place. We like to support locally owned businesses. Located next to pho and chicken places, we felt like we made the wrong choice.
The service was fine, even though he forgot whether we had paid, but it's counter service.
We were planning to eat in, but the lighting was so garish we couldn't handle it.
The food was just ok. The chicken kabob was tasty, the beef was a chewy cut. Lots of onion.
I'm sure there's a secret menu that insiders order.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Y Bear","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWyuMoVoKRa9TiP369Rd-hKdDTIrCpXbPoaMvG4cjD2V57mHtrv=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This is the worst Persian food I have ever had and I know what Persian food is. Don’t go here to eat if you want the real thing!

My grandmother was born in Iran, she spoke some Farsi, and made authentic Persian food. I came with a Persian friend of mine and we both agreed:
This was the blandest, most inauthentic version of what can be called “Persian food”.

The rice was dry and unflavorful. Nowhere near “saffron rice” more like turmeric rice, a cheap colored version.

Also what Persian restaurant puts thousand island on their salad? If I wanted American food I would’ve went to McDonald’s.

Only the beef kabobs itself contained any real flavor, but paying $20 for one kabob with terrible rice and thousand island lettuce is absurd.

One positive, the food presentation was nice lol.

Will definitely not be back. Y’all have been warned.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCb90VOjTT0C_RWYvF-0P7v&fid=0x0:0x73d69efd8b90a39"],"When":"2025-9-9"},{"Name":"Kushan Peykarian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUAJIzCrQtA6kyeWes-foJKirV1brg3RSjUUfwobn3t_35zNX3r=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been going to Persian restaurants for well over 50 years and time to time I run into one that stands out and has the authentic Persian experience and quality food. This place is one of them.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAlLcvV0IVyynhf0NBYstUN&fid=0x0:0x73d69efd8b90a39"],"When":"2026-2-1"},{"Name":"Raman Ebrahimi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWzSxeHvbA0EgawUcN-2S_NgWyj3IFJYCbjW3naPsgAYjJ3ZyjL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is amazing. Easily the best persian cuisine in San Diego. The food is lovely and they make it right in front of you there is no back kitchen. They also sell most of their ingredients except for meat and chicken. Awesome crew as well very friendly, kind, and warm.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDIj6jhPw&fid=0x0:0x73d69efd8b90a39"],"When":"2025-4-13"},{"Name":"REZA VEYSEH","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXvk5R6wmHxBe2L5SXE9bwP3nFPIAXjy7DWROb6sXZ9ZKVXCEtpMg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Namino Persian Restaurant is an absolute treasure, and I can’t say enough good things about it. From the moment you walk in, you’re welcomed with warm hospitality and the unmistakable aroma of authentic Persian cuisine. Owner Ali Zabdi has done a phenomenal job bringing the flavors of Iran to life — every dish reflects care, tradition, and culinary mastery.

The kabob koobideh is incredibly juicy and seasoned to perfection. The barg melts in your mouth with every bite, and the lobia polo is the perfect balance of savory and aromatic. But the real standout for me was the tahchin — golden, crispy on the outside, soft and flavorful on the inside. It’s a masterpiece!

Ali truly knows how to make very, very good food — food that not only fills you up, but makes you feel at home. You can tell everything is made with love and high standards. This is more than a meal — it’s an experience.

Highly recommend Namino to anyone craving delicious, authentic Persian dishes. I’ll definitely be coming back — again and again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD7vz8zZBdMVjXbtPttbjtP&fid=0x0:0x73d69efd8b90a39"],"When":"2025-8-2"}]

The broth years ago was abundant but not with the newer recipe.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Benjamin Hoga","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXeKCHzFlj5RaUbPJ4ME678u1cNoknGxjzjUNqOTePUfazSS3M94w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We've always experienced Rubio's Coastal Grill to be great quality with great service and we weren't let down.

However, it wasn't Tuesday and the prices seemed to be through the roof. Yes, it's been quite a while since we've been here. We walked out, got back in the car and Googled to see what else we could find.

...didn't take long to find out other restaurants in the area were in the the same price range.

The three of us went back into Rubio's with the comfort of knowing the quality and service we'd be receiving.

We shared a quesadilla and had some tortilla chips with some great salsa from the salsa bar. All for less than $17.

Next time we'll be showing up on Tuesday","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICehfaPPA&fid=0x0:0x194afc7099430745"],"When":"2022-9-18"}]

Definitely a must-visit spot. 🌊🦭","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD-WiURW3c4rCgL7a9MoXj_&fid=0x0:0x4f79ae423227b0cb"],"When":"2026-1-5"},{"Name":"Niki Gondola","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVaeu6GxNuFLjZL7LgQCT-S_DJiLJVmPxCGIpvRUd663JePdDI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The smell of fish is immediate due to feeding Sea Lions but the experience swimming with Sea Lions out weighs that. My daughter really enjoyed herself. The Sea Lions will swim towards the shore. Experience of a life time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB9nKBaRz--aXhLFhp58v9J&fid=0x0:0x4f79ae423227b0cb"],"When":"2025-12-24"},{"Name":"Alda Hernandez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXrGY5pST-XISL_-PK_XOvZdchiodrzq5Ui1FGRiqCs6qzGJs4b=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Visited La Jolla Cove with my family and had an amazing time! The area is absolutely beautiful with stunning ocean views and lots of sea lions and seals lounging around. There is a bit of a fishy smell at first because of the wildlife, but you get used to it quickly—and the scenery is definitely worth it.

It’s a perfect spot to stop, explore, and enjoy the coastline. While walking through town, we found BoBBoi Natural Gelato, and it was honestly the best gelato we’ve ever had! Highly recommend grabbing a scoop while strolling around La Jolla.

Overall, a wonderful family-friendly place to visit!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBefzD-IpQ8u1E2Tdqob8Jp&fid=0x0:0x4f79ae423227b0cb"],"When":"2025-12-3"},{"Name":"Michael H Jaranilla Sr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWOmS_szCbZyWOE-iG6z2hhjumRcXVNSQAWsYksBv0IpIa4jQ8S=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Well here's a famous Beach to go to. And trust me head, it has some amazing stores, scenery, and sunsets. This place is located in San Diego, and is a big and I mean big tourist place. It has the Cove that's connected to the store, and is also known to have the illuminating Waters at night. Unfortunately we didn't get to see those can't remember when that happens but we didn't get to catch it. But if you ever come to San Diego this is a must see spot. And it's also located to La Jolla Shores where are you in the family can go down at any one of these beaches to go swimming and snorkeling. Or you can rent a kayak or bicycles. Either way I recommend you put this spot on one of your visiting destinations. Hope you enjoy the pics God bless","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDuUsk9TH9iXxnZ4hpM9Io3&fid=0x0:0x4f79ae423227b0cb"],"When":"2025-7-25"},{"Name":"Subramaniam K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXm5cz92mDLXvNCpC9CQePTNuruueHrP6LBq3NxKohMLn0vNFmh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Pacific Ocean sea front ... Seals resting in their natural habitat. Good tourist spot to relax","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAN9BKfeqY1-rfmyGP25rXm&fid=0x0:0x4f79ae423227b0cb"],"When":"2026-1-21"},{"Name":"William Hitchcock","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXkJrCWvBnXISzy3EoPyQfjBku683mz4LNe-NfoBMBB01F43fo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If you are in the San Diego area, try and find some time to walk along the shore in La Jolla. It’s relaxing and beautiful by the ocean, and if you luck out like we did in December, you’ll see lots of wildlife!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDKteNTSP8gDi2WDQ8oxO2_&fid=0x0:0x4f79ae423227b0cb"],"When":"2025-12-24"},{"Name":"Jeff Mraz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWioLnCEKsVOXDFgoRxhJwihTY6TCxapU2vdc71Eztddwpskec-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"La Jolla Cove is an absolute gem and a must-visit if you’re anywhere near the San Diego area. One of the most incredible parts of the experience is being able to get so close to wild seals and sea lions in their natural habitat. Watching them lounge on the rocks, bark at each other, or swim gracefully through the water is both fascinating and unforgettable.

Access to the cove is easy, with walking paths, steps, and scenic viewpoints all around. While it’s tempting to get close, it’s important to remember: do not engage or touch the animals — they are wild and deserve their space and protection.

Beyond the wildlife, the cove itself is stunningly beautiful. With crystal-clear water, dramatic cliffs, and sweeping ocean views, it’s perfect for a peaceful stroll, taking photos, or just sitting back and soaking in the coastal beauty.

Highly recommended for nature lovers, photographers, and anyone looking to experience California’s coastline at its best.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD4Ti78YLBL8QAmsaW4o5xc&fid=0x0:0x4f79ae423227b0cb"],"When":"2025-6-30"}]

[{"Name":"Ali Marjaninejad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcLtrvAoMJTzG5z3xDmqFfUaQNPmv4x8Y8moMX2NROGWK03iqI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is one of our favorites both for their food/drinks and the vibe!

The food here is really tasty and served with attention to detail. We have tried their drinks, main entries, desserts, etc., and all were great!

The atmosphere there is very nice; ideal for dates, professional dinners, or friends’ gatherings, and the service is professional.

There is plenty of parking in the Westfield parking (first 2 hours free), or if you are in a hurry, they also have valet services at the door, which is a great convenience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAxZuj490PrjKbd0MgUTF7d&fid=0x0:0x3f1463a1ea4e1f24"],"When":"2026-1-2"},{"Name":"Joe Camarillo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWtc8FvF_3skMS-f3ctvCoiZIVwUQ2cbQ9ZkGn5CZxvP_UOXxSHFg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I got to celebrate my birthday in style at Javier's Restaurant in La Jolla, and it was truly unforgettable! 🎉 The food was absolutely on point, with every dish that hit the table being a flavor explosion. The service was top-notch, with our server going above and beyond to make sure we had an amazing experience. They made my birthday evening awesome! If you're looking for a special spot to celebrate a milestone, I highly recommend Javier's!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBz1wGHICIXCSDOetvg8Sb6&fid=0x0:0x3f1463a1ea4e1f24"],"When":"2025-12-31"},{"Name":"Valerie Upham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWVMIEwuT8wpVAst6vUEmzc-hzBmdndrdTfZ1N5440eD_VWRQprJA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The food at Javier’s is delicious. It’s pricey, but worth it for a special occasion. Alcoholic drinks are around $20 each. My niece ordered the taquitos (see photo), and I ordered the Trio de Enchiladas del Mar. The crab and other ingredients tasted very fresh, and the salsa was excellent. We chose to eat there for the atmosphere and the food, and it delivered. That said, it was louder than I remembered. We had a group of eight, and it was hard to hear the person sitting next to me.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCwayXOHUW37YE7sfe6HUc1&fid=0x0:0x3f1463a1ea4e1f24"],"When":"2026-1-16"},{"Name":"Adriana Urbina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK-avhcHAioOaXfgwWoGA_DaxUtZK8tQIZW320XkTrAoMCNzw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"You are paying for the atmosphere. The presentation of the food was nice, but the flavor left much to be desired. It is overpriced and subpar: the mole (pictured) was thin and salty. The tortillas were not freshly made and tasted like the cheap store-bought ones. An $80 meal of steak and shrimp included two shrimps and a small steak.  The carnitas (pictured) were good, but the beans that came with them were very salty. Overall, the price did not match the quality of the food. The one thing that was up to the price standard was the service, which was friendly, cordial, and attentive.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDBZoCbKP--urVNPVAwmKkZ&fid=0x0:0x3f1463a1ea4e1f24"],"When":"2025-11-21"},{"Name":"Amy Thurston","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXSMrFpKaVlo0ac0Sf3Syw6ADYv1-EsjMQDp2bLIPeL6rEOE3Sf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious food, excellent service and beautiful building. Waiters were attentive and regularly refilled water and snacking chips and salsa. Everyone loved what they got. I got the house salad (which was delicious and light) and the 3 fish enchiladas: shrimp, lobster and crab.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAesy7WUHuzJsU1OeNkpKBq&fid=0x0:0x3f1463a1ea4e1f24"],"When":"2025-11-21"},{"Name":"Mrinalini Mishra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUg5Va6ivy2mu4bLfDlyRphh_69aTa5yHRp1qfqrGxI0GK0Zsfz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came here to celebrate our anniversary and had an amazing experience!
Absolutely loved the ambience and the food. Our servers, Gio and Juan, were fantastic — Gio was especially attentive and friendly, making our evening extra special.

I ordered the vegetarian enchilada, which was delicious, and their esquites are hands down the best I’ve ever had!

Pro tip: Make reservations in advance, especially on weekends — they get busy!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBA9MBOkM9Sfa72flV4yDR4&fid=0x0:0x3f1463a1ea4e1f24"],"When":"2025-11-9"},{"Name":"philboytano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWlVGjs9jpLQeh4CWCahN1lY8r-XsO08T_jyFXLWA9PQQ-w8c3y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time coming here with my gf.  My first impression was the interior design of the restaurant, very classy and beautifully decorated.  Was expecting the menu to be really expensive but to my surprise it was fairly priced and the food and service were 👌.  I give this place an A+.  Our total meal with alcohol drinks totalled to less than 150 for 2 people, not including tip.  Not bad at all.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCuMQDT082fri-a_QfJ2AH4&fid=0x0:0x3f1463a1ea4e1f24"],"When":"2025-8-31"},{"Name":"Jajjj","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIh8CbvwsdeGKmxmUe5x05Q_IwRGk6iKVEX9ThW92KWY-5XSw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Why is no one being honest about this place? I came here yesterday for a birthday dinner and was completely disappointed. It’s a really loud atmosphere (think club music in a fine dining setting) you literally have to shout to hear each other speak. The overall vibe was confusing - one part of the restaurant was like a sports bar with TVs, another was like a networking event with people in suits & the other part had people in sweatpants? The decor is beautiful but the food was below average & certainly not worth the price. I ordered lamb chops medium but they came out rare. The steak was under seasoned & the chicken in the taquito was dry as hell. For a $250 meal it felt subpar at best. Overall would not go back.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAwvG_NV8nliku7rkh97f76&fid=0x0:0x3f1463a1ea4e1f24"],"When":"2026-1-29"}]

[{"Name":"julio m","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocItYBOAFy7wIDKD4P85Z5gt9lKWZtWvXs9j7LoEZavb2D_vqg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Chick-fil-A is a nice place, although I am not crazy about chicken I won't deny that the food I enjoyed was fresh and delicious, good price and friendly staff make it an "I'm coming back" kind of place.
It's location is very nice also, close to highway access and other good stores and a movie theater, it is a very convenient stop for a quick bite.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lily Nguyen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJGfdqN_uyBn7H-8j1ikZIeGwvhxuDR6xGhsrLQWXj-9rKEQA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Terrible. I placed an order 10 minutes before I got to the store and had to wait and additional 15 minutes when I arrived. I was picking up breakfast before work and figured it would be quick. I was better off going straight to work. This is the 3rd time it’s happened to me at this location. I literally ordered one thing and it was a sandwich! RIDICULOUS YOURE FAST FOOD","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"tdriggs0511","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK4yEIwuRDcN2oPHik73ckU5H6Bk-lJsP_sxBdYMgAZtC_dRw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I've done almost 100 reviews.  This will be the biggest fail so far.

You want to pay the fast food workers how much per hour California?  $4 seems fair for the type of people you employee. Clearly counting, thinking and reading aren't required so what do you pay them for?  Mistakes?  That would make sense.

Extra pickles. Extra = 0.  Great understanding of the word extra.  Sauce requests?  Who cares, just throw some stuff in the bag.  5 piece nuggets?  One, two, three, five.  Go California public schools!

Honestly I'm not surprised. Fast food workers are disappointing most places. I should have known that the worst of the worst would be in California.  I'm surprised I even got chicken as I expected Hamburger with as confused as you people are.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDnqsSZUA&fid=0x0:0x43c0d8167b23e418"],"When":"2024-10-5"},{"Name":"Scott L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBBjILatt8CktZFIorsQsjr_uF8dXbfvqgRo_HDwWT6sN9IaI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Glad to see the franchise come to La Jolla/UCSD area. Everything is pretty new, desks, chairs, bins...all the decorations here even there would be the smell of the wood. The A/C works well as it's cool enough inside while hot outside. My favorite hash brown bowl is made perfect for chicken, hash brown, eggs and the cheese.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC7_4SBmQE&fid=0x0:0x43c0d8167b23e418"],"When":"2024-8-19"},{"Name":"Betty Cortes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIp9uDJI2dtdeJwo_S0JksEB-AUvCYdaF5ATXcpYafJYUEaDA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This Chick-fil-A does not have drive tru
So I had to get out I ordered my food, but I guess my order never got to anyone because after 10 minutes me waiting for my food I had to ask the girl she ended up telling me that they were going to re-enter my order , told her I had to leave because I was on my break lunch. They rushed my order and I ended up with a chicken that tasted like soap and was cold. Not to mention the fries were nasty looking all that for $15 dollars what an experience","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDw3qzP0wE&fid=0x0:0x43c0d8167b23e418"],"When":"2025-3-26"},{"Name":"Swati Bharti","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJAdsJmedzZk3I_a1Sx4Jl3_5zehh-sQDl02yCbJE-o4z-cDA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Seriously, Chick-fil-A is selling this and calling it a Deluxe Spicy Chicken Sandwich? I’m really disappointed. No taste, no size, just a total letdown.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrea","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUdltW7Lizow4W4q-UGU2ATkdAr2hzNHPCwJjTn7fizECunPA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was fresh, the service was fast, and the staff was super friendly. [{"Name":"cathyc 444","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIKjVG0eCwBxhEqWqRygnyA48fWOZlQy1d5L-b21_3V4VxsNC69=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a gem!  Maybe only the locals know about it…

The View:  As the namesake it is as beautiful as is the ambiance on a blindingly sunny day!  All tables are positioned to see the sea, sky and beyond.

The Service: The restaurant is quaint and well staffed and the service is on point.

The Menu: Lunch Menu is simple and a must try is the wild salmon sandwich, but be ready to get messy!  Come here hungry!😋

The Chef: Executive Chef Ernest Lopez has been with the restaurant since 12/2024.  He brings with him a spin to the local bounty La Jolla  is known for!

If you are looking for: great food paired with a good wine selections… look no further!

It just maybe my new meet up place in La Jolla!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA1FhgI6jsnZ4-oDTXsWuyv&fid=0x0:0xd3c0f6dafcf62ffb"],"When":"2026-1-21"},{"Name":"Rina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXkCvzF10p5M8FaZcu0kuNwJEOZzKnIEjfUQvoV56AyUbZE1Qqz=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I had the chance to visit this restaurant located near La Jolla Shores, and it was such a memorable experience. The restaurant sits on the 11th floor of a nearby hotel, which means the view is absolutely stunning. From the moment you walk in, the wide windows showcase the coastline and ocean, making it a perfect setting to enjoy a relaxed meal. It’s the kind of spot where you can sit back and take in the scenery while enjoying good food and conversation. I went there for lunch and ordered the BLT, which was prepared really well. The bread was nicely toasted, the bacon had a satisfying crunch, and the vegetables were fresh, making it a very enjoyable sandwich. I also tried the hummus, which was flavorful, creamy, and came with just the right sides for dipping. The combination of good food and that kind of view made it feel special without being overly formal. I can definitely see this being a wonderful place for a date or even just a relaxing afternoon meal with friends. Overall, I would recommend this restaurant to anyone visiting La Jolla Shores who wants great food in an unbeatable location with an amazing view.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA_e5C3U8YO5yPqmtQKOdE5&fid=0x0:0xd3c0f6dafcf62ffb"],"When":"2025-9-15"},{"Name":"Bericbogan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVv8s7f4J4ccxloKqbIedNqfri7QCtxcZ2Z39PiP0JB966UAtj6ng=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Dinner at Sea and Sky in La Jolla was absolutely exceptional. From the moment we arrived, the staff made us feel genuinely welcome with attentive and friendly service. As we dined, we were treated to one of the most breathtaking sunsets over the ocean, creating the perfect backdrop for the evening. The food was nothing short of amazing — every dish was full of flavor and beautifully presented. This restaurant truly captures the essence of dining by the sea with a touch of elegance. A must when you’re in La Jolla! 🌅🍷🍴","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhChYV7MuzZEUE0FdDCZFYT1&fid=0x0:0xd3c0f6dafcf62ffb"],"When":"2025-8-17"},{"Name":"Danny A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLmV0TisR9aXj9Z_Qr7Ss6i_hJSKpLUILAb3gNS6nuUL3qdSQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After moving from NYC back to SoCal, I missed this seaside cuisine. Located on the top floor of the hotel, great service from Dennis. Takes a bit of time to cook, but the HALF GRILLED SNAPPER was fiery peppery and delish! The add on flank steak to the ceasar salad was so flavory! Delish ginger ale too. The carrot cake dessert icing was to die for!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDWlqA0fl9ehJTcaKSI2b1z&fid=0x0:0xd3c0f6dafcf62ffb"],"When":"2025-12-7"},{"Name":"Angela C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVq9EId3pCpyX0vLO7vdcu-RgCzWlCh259eYNzytWIa2yDTpfeQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This spot on the 11th floor has such a mood with live music, soft lighting, and views that make you want to linger. Dinner was beautifully presented (though a little pricey), but the happy hour is where it shines. I had the steak and frites off the bar menu.  Complimented well with the garlic aioli for the fries, a chimmichurri, and a demi glaze for the tender steak.  My date had the scallops. [{"Name":"Jessica Bondoc","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXCuqWDGRbO2E_ifoAGeePLTolu2DVcBv8VQhM3-ViP3poXjuI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I like it when there's lunch specials 😋 and beer combo. But the day we went they were down to 4 slices and it was the tail end of lunch so they were not making more. It was not enough for the whole table to partake. So, we ended up ordering a pie . Come to think of it the pizza was great and I wanted to eat all of it in one sitting. We noticed the chairs where different in designs , i wondered why? I did choose the one with a bar in the middle coz I'm short and I need to put my dangling feet somewhere. Overall, I recommend trying it for yourself 😃","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA-uB3fHWmPp_e0juidTQUk&fid=0x0:0x1ab9801af889bc6b"],"When":"2025-12-12"},{"Name":"Joann Rodriguez (JoJo)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJDK-JwKBB1KJqGCeGSAhkIOyfH5WezCxSEu19dgZwL1qe2CQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"My husband and I went there for had dinner it was our first time there the girl that worked at the front counter didn't ask us if it was our first time or not. Was not familiar with beer taps, Lack of service and had to figure out were everything was .... The pizza was fairly okay. The chicken wings were good! best to say, if you want a beer, I guess that would be the place to hang out for beers and pizza only don't expect anything else! 👎","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gil Corpuz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVcgJXJ9BMDvSfS4mSxOfp0MD1F39EW0HAIwXAMJcm2TYeXvjmKNQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Came here for dinner on a Friday night while doing some shopping at the other stores.  There was no line and plenty of tables open.  It's all indoor seating, but the pseudo-patio section extends out to the mall walkway.  You place your order before grabbing an open table.  We ordered 3 small pizzas (Bacon Alfredo; plain Cheese; and Truffle Mushroom with added Chicken), and a tap card for their draft system.  The tap card for their draft system tracks how much you pour to the tenth of an ounce for each drink they have, so you can try a bunch of different drinks without committing to a drink that you may end up disliking.  Between my wife and I, we tried 7 different drinks while keeping the total pour for us under 40 ounces.  We found some good ones we have never tried before.  The pizzas were delicious and cooked well.  The Cheese pizza, although seemingly plain, was good and met my expectations.  They bring out your order to your table, and every else is self-service.  The place is clean and a very cool setup.  The staff was friendly, proactive and provided good help and recommendations.  I would definitely come back here with friends and family.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC1ocLKOA&fid=0x0:0x1ab9801af889bc6b"],"When":"2023-12-30"},{"Name":"Mehran Baghaei","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWunUOUf26UGzpiEc2kBD2pE4xaNv3gd_qqCwChI40pMNsllpKFJQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A Slice of Perfection at The Pizza Taproom!

The Pizza Taproom is a gem that stands out in a sea of pizza joints. From the moment you walk in, you’re welcomed by a cozy, inviting atmosphere and a friendly staff eager to make your experience exceptional. The combination of artisanal pizza and a fantastic self-serve beer selection makes this place a must-visit for any pizza or beer lover!

The pizza is top-notch—perfectly crispy crust, flavorful sauce, and generous, high-quality toppings. Whether you’re into classic margherita, loaded meat lovers, or unique specialty pizzas, they offer something for every palate. The dough is fresh, the ingredients taste like they’re straight from a local farm, and the creativity behind their menu shines through in every bite.

But what truly sets The Pizza Taproom apart is their tap wall. They offer an impressive selection of craft beers and ciders, and you can pour as much or as little as you’d like! It’s a fun and interactive experience that lets you try new brews without committing to a full glass. There’s always a variety to choose from, including local craft favorites and some seasonal surprises.

Service is impeccable, with staff members always ready to assist with recommendations or just provide a friendly chat. The vibe is laid-back yet vibrant, making it the perfect spot for a casual date, a gathering with friends, or even a solo pizza-and-beer session.

The Pizza Taproom excels in every area: food, drink, atmosphere, and service. Highly recommend it to anyone looking for a unique and delicious dining experience!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDXuO7CbA&fid=0x0:0x1ab9801af889bc6b"],"When":"2024-10-24"},{"Name":"hzpn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUCsqMPdFHTKPGKuPlTnuucluHL_8aGOXBAC3soSyWNw-We8GUNQg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The interior design is quite spectacular and gives off rustic vibes. The pizza dough and crest are relatively thin and allow for the toppings to really shine through. I got the meat lovers pizza in a size large and it could easily serve 3 to 4 people!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCg2e7QtwE&fid=0x0:0x1ab9801af889bc6b"],"When":"2025-2-18"},{"Name":"Jamal D. (JamalRunsThisCity)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKpulS7VSw027CiWWkwtO95bDPT-twQgnrBSgvKN5MP_uSHup4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The first sign of the bad food was them offering a $5 gift card for a review. If they're willing to pay you for a good review they need it.

Order the supreme Pizza they put hot dogs and sandwich meat on it with corn. Had to ask the waiter where my food was.

They pray on drunk people eating their food. Took about 30 minutes to get two pizzas.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Peter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKaF39xqCFz5cwn_ZQvOZGNHVvLF0qJnVSQKlNYVFmL1ZtXeg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is our go-to local pizza place now. So, we decided to use them for a kids bday party, too.  Pizzas were great and delivered on time…kids demolished them.  Pastas are good as well.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Henry Zhang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKNLUaY--YlUiEV1uInvsbfMchhSo_BfhPcYbTXX3gIDyfTzg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Surprise! I wish I had come earlier. The pizza is fresh with crunchy bread and melted cheese (look at that!). Truffle mushroom taste with fresh onion, sweet and baked flavor. The wings are soft and the sauce is great. The skin is a bit hard for some pieces but overall great! Great service as well!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDh1faTLA&fid=0x0:0x1ab9801af889bc6b"],"When":"2023-3-14"}]

[{"Name":"John K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4_X7UO5IluBtaZPcLJ2MKwu-8g7IPa3Qjhob4SdL7d0W38PU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I ordered the Snooze Classic with three scrambled eggs, crispy bacon, fresh fruit versus hash browns, and sourdough for my toast. The eggs were cooked perfectly with no browning from overcooking. The bacon was crispy and not burnt. Delicious bacon! There was a very good variety of fruit. I couldn’t pass on getting the sourdough and I wasn’t disappointed. Great flavor! I received friendly service. This restaurant has a happy vibe to it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC51rWnFwjDp6eqsiVkZE9d&fid=0x0:0xaef6a7aaf9668975"],"When":"2025-11-4"},{"Name":"Damien LierOmen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXgGq1aL60KSz7CYnKnWhMv7-J732wTviRgnDKnEZZfTGNRcexo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved this place. Had a few options to choose from for breakfast you won't usually find at other places. Certain dishes felt healthy, while the others jus were jus straight up good! Great pancakes, biscuits and gravy, grits and service. Go ahead....make your way to Snooze. So good!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBQBQdU-Tfp5GS9aqFVcFuw&fid=0x0:0xaef6a7aaf9668975"],"When":"2025-12-8"},{"Name":"Clay Wu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLhvVauxHMziC8xDbji0pjfRXjFPrY4TdJOI1EnVLOoX4G2mQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We went to Snooze on a vacation trip to SD. This location is in a mall with easy parking. The staff is very friendly and welcoming.
We ordered the Benny duo (one smashed avocado, one barbacoa chile verde), the habanero pork belly breakfast fried rice, and the OMG french toast. The food was good and came at the same time. One hiccup during our visit was that we found hair in one of our benedicts, but our waitress Natasha and the manager were very professional, compassionate, and comped half of our Benny and the French toast. Staff and management who really care about their customers is refreshing to see. Would definitely recommend this particular location to anybody in the area who wants good food and even better service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCbdezJ_DvAz_Qm_A1EuvuQ&fid=0x0:0xaef6a7aaf9668975"],"When":"2025-8-19"},{"Name":"Mark Ames","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWvAJ7OEkM-s7CZv-IgyLsskYOFVDSmeF-LhkaHQD9CO3f1xrSB=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Food was pretty good; surprisingly the biscuits and gravy was a favorite. The other dishes were good, but didn't knock my socks off. We'll have to come back and check out other items. Service was excellent. Their advanced check in was well run and we got in much earlier than expected. Really liked the atmosphere.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDpvl7Q2jI_UQTt_nx9fdq7&fid=0x0:0xaef6a7aaf9668975"],"When":"2025-8-20"},{"Name":"Jannah Tarabishi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVyXIVCnhyEwPOt2fSUZn0vPm7wTBuezsmBJT9oQjmx1uOG1aMd=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Snooze A.M. Eatery has a lovely location and a big menu ranging from Benedicts to pancakes.
The garden omelette was delicious, and while the breakfast burrito wasn’t quite to my personal taste, my sister absolutely loved it, so I wouldn’t say it’s bad at all—just not my preference and a bit bland maybe. Their coffee is fantastic and makes the perfect addition to any breakfast.

This visit, they were offering their limited-time “Maple Doodle” pancakes, and wow… they completely stole the show. The pancakes were light, airy, and fluffy, with white chocolate chips in the batter. They were topped with a cinnamon-brown sugar glaze, caramelized pecans, and served with a side of cinnamon-infused butter that was absolutely to die for. The cinnamon and brown sugar were perfectly balanced, and every bite felt like dessert for breakfast—in the best way possible.

Their service overall wasn’t particularly memorable, but I do want to highlight a really nice gesture—they offered to take the burrito off my bill after I mentioned I didn’t enjoy it, which I appreciated. I ended up taking it for my sister, but the thoughtfulness stood out.

All in all, I’ll absolutely be returning—especially for those heavenly pancakes. Don’t miss them!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB6786I30dDCFP-P0iR-499&fid=0x0:0xaef6a7aaf9668975"],"When":"2025-8-9"},{"Name":"Zana Hawleri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVTLfkpa3tmrXu0T1xUxxWPlYUsC-XCslgDUeQxl35MobQrPhvm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The food was amazing! We had the Shrimp & Grits, Chili Verde Benedict, Greens & Grains Bowl, and the Pancake Flight for dessert. Very friendly and knowledgeable staff recommendee some great options.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBXx337_lpXz-eb41h9KkQC&fid=0x0:0xaef6a7aaf9668975"],"When":"2025-9-2"},{"Name":"Kimberly Ransom","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWUk5c3vZD2iWeiyf_TdS3fc1kpiMK1VwpmAz6yux_TeDVWfQEG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved the food here! Super fresh, creative combinations, so flavorful!! We were outside on the patio, had the garden omelet and the habanero pork belly benefict.  Had fresh grapefruit juice and a lavender latte. All excellent!! I highly recommend this place and will definitely come back! Adam was our server, and he was helpful and excellent!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCsbzHZ0OMKrWqP3uT6KgY3&fid=0x0:0xaef6a7aaf9668975"],"When":"2025-9-13"},{"Name":"McKenna Pruett","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUJHmIqy0PO1ev0MJPHE-sXL136BavlAvjNQhIDqviDdOkcqyM-=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a great morning and breakfast at snooze in La Jolla. She needs a raise!!!! Will be back just for her!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBjye-OsuSyUBb9tGMe7Op7&fid=0x0:0xaef6a7aaf9668975"],"When":"2026-1-31"}]
